suras.translation: Bring me sheets of iron" - until, when he had leveled [them] between the two mountain walls, he said, "Blow [with bellows]," until when he had made it [like] fire, he said, "Bring me, that I may pour over it molten copper."
suras.arabic: ءَاتُونِى زُبَرَ ٱلْحَدِيدِ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا سَاوَىٰ بَيْنَ ٱلصَّدَفَيْنِ قَالَ ٱنفُخُوا۟ ۖ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَعَلَهُۥ نَارًا قَالَ ءَاتُونِىٓ أُفْرِغْ عَلَيْهِ قِطْرًا

suras.text: So Gog and Magog were unable to pass over it, nor were they able [to effect] in it any penetration.
suras.translation: So Gog and Magog were unable to pass over it, nor were they able [to effect] in it any penetration.
suras.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْطَـٰعُوٓا۟ أَن يَظْهَرُوهُ وَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ لَهُۥ نَقْبًا

suras.text: [Dhul-Qarnayn] said, "This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes, He will make it level, and ever is the promise of my Lord true."
suras.translation: [Dhul-Qarnayn] said, "This is a mercy from my Lord; but when the promise of my Lord comes, He will make it level, and ever is the promise of my Lord true."
suras.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذَا رَحْمَةٌ مِّن رَّبِّى ۖ فَإِذَا جَآءَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى جَعَلَهُۥ دَكَّآءَ ۖ وَكَانَ وَعْدُ رَبِّى حَقًّا

suras.text: And We will leave them that day surging over each other, and [then] the Horn will be blown, and We will assemble them in [one] assembly.
suras.translation: And We will leave them that day surging over each other, and [then] the Horn will be blown, and We will assemble them in [one] assembly.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَتَرَكْنَا بَعْضَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَمُوجُ فِى بَعْضٍ ۖ وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَجَمَعْنَـٰهُمْ جَمْعًا

suras.text: Those whose eyes had been within a cover [removed] from My remembrance, and they were not able to hear.
suras.translation: Those whose eyes had been within a cover [removed] from My remembrance, and they were not able to hear.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ كَانَتْ أَعْيُنُهُمْ فِى غِطَآءٍ عَن ذِكْرِى وَكَانُوا۟ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ سَمْعًا

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "Shall we [believers] inform you of the greatest losers as to [their] deeds?
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "Shall we [believers] inform you of the greatest losers as to [their] deeds?
suras.arabic: قُلْ هَلْ نُنَبِّئُكُم بِٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ أَعْمَـٰلًا

suras.text: [They are] those whose effort is lost in worldly life, while they think that they are doing well in work."
suras.translation: [They are] those whose effort is lost in worldly life, while they think that they are doing well in work."
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ضَلَّ سَعْيُهُمْ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا وَهُمْ يَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُمْ يُحْسِنُونَ صُنْعًا

suras.text: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - they will have the Gardens of Paradise as a lodging,
suras.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - they will have the Gardens of Paradise as a lodging,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ كَانَتْ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتُ ٱلْفِرْدَوْسِ نُزُلًا

suras.text: Wherein they abide eternally. They will not desire from it any transfer.
suras.translation: Wherein they abide eternally. They will not desire from it any transfer.
suras.arabic: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا لَا يَبْغُونَ عَنْهَا حِوَلًا

suras.text: Say, "If the sea were ink for [writing] the words of my Lord, the sea would be exhausted before the words of my Lord were exhausted, even if We brought the like of it as a supplement."
suras.translation: Say, "If the sea were ink for [writing] the words of my Lord, the sea would be exhausted before the words of my Lord were exhausted, even if We brought the like of it as a supplement."
suras.arabic: قُل لَّوْ كَانَ ٱلْبَحْرُ مِدَادًا لِّكَلِمَـٰتِ رَبِّى لَنَفِدَ ٱلْبَحْرُ قَبْلَ أَن تَنفَدَ كَلِمَـٰتُ رَبِّى وَلَوْ جِئْنَا بِمِثْلِهِۦ مَدَدًا

suras.text: Say, "I am only a man like you, to whom has been revealed that your god is one God. So whoever would hope for the meeting with his Lord - let him do righteous work and not associate in the worship of his Lord anyone."
suras.translation: Say, "I am only a man like you, to whom has been revealed that your god is one God. So whoever would hope for the meeting with his Lord - let him do righteous work and not associate in the worship of his Lord anyone."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُكُمْ يُوحَىٰٓ إِلَىَّ أَنَّمَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ وَٰحِدٌ ۖ فَمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ لِقَآءَ رَبِّهِۦ فَلْيَعْمَلْ عَمَلًا صَـٰلِحًا وَلَا يُشْرِكْ بِعِبَادَةِ رَبِّهِۦٓ أَحَدًۢا

suras.text: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
suras.translation: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
suras.arabic: ذِكْرُ رَحْمَتِ رَبِّكَ عَبْدَهُۥ زَكَرِيَّآ

suras.text: When he called to his Lord a private supplication.
suras.translation: When he called to his Lord a private supplication.
suras.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥ نِدَآءً خَفِيًّا

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy.
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy.
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى وَهَنَ ٱلْعَظْمُ مِنِّى وَٱشْتَعَلَ ٱلرَّأْسُ شَيْبًا وَلَمْ أَكُنۢ بِدُعَآئِكَ رَبِّ شَقِيًّا

suras.text: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."
suras.translation: [He was told], "O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name."
suras.arabic: يَـٰزَكَرِيَّآ إِنَّا نُبَشِّرُكَ بِغُلَـٰمٍ ٱسْمُهُۥ يَحْيَىٰ لَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ مِن قَبْلُ سَمِيًّا

suras.text: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, \'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.\' "
suras.translation: [An angel] said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, \'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.\' "
suras.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ قَالَ رَبُّكَ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ وَقَدْ خَلَقْتُكَ مِن قَبْلُ وَلَمْ تَكُ شَيْـًٔا

suras.text: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."
suras.translation: [Zechariah] said, "My Lord, make for me a sign." He said, "Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ ٱجْعَل لِّىٓ ءَايَةً ۚ قَالَ ءَايَتُكَ أَلَّا تُكَلِّمَ ٱلنَّاسَ ثَلَـٰثَ لَيَالٍ سَوِيًّا

suras.text: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allah] in the morning and afternoon.
suras.translation: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allah] in the morning and afternoon.
suras.arabic: فَخَرَجَ عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنَ ٱلْمِحْرَابِ فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَيْهِمْ أَن سَبِّحُوا۟ بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا

suras.text: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allah
suras.translation: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allah
suras.arabic: وَحَنَانًا مِّن لَّدُنَّا وَزَكَوٰةً ۖ وَكَانَ تَقِيًّا

suras.text: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.
suras.translation: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.
suras.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَيْهِ وَلَمْ يَكُن جَبَّارًا عَصِيًّا

suras.text: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.
suras.translation: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.
suras.arabic: وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْهِ يَوْمَ وُلِدَ وَيَوْمَ يَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ يُبْعَثُ حَيًّا

suras.text: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allah."
suras.translation: She said, "Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allah."
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنِّىٓ أَعُوذُ بِٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِنكَ إِن كُنتَ تَقِيًّا

suras.text: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy."
suras.translation: He said, "I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy."
suras.arabic: قَالَ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ رَسُولُ رَبِّكِ لِأَهَبَ لَكِ غُلَـٰمًا زَكِيًّا

suras.text: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"
suras.translation: She said, "How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?"
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ أَنَّىٰ يَكُونُ لِى غُلَـٰمٌ وَلَمْ يَمْسَسْنِى بَشَرٌ وَلَمْ أَكُ بَغِيًّا

suras.text: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, \'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.\' "
suras.translation: He said, "Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, \'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.\' "
suras.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ هُوَ عَلَىَّ هَيِّنٌ ۖ وَلِنَجْعَلَهُۥٓ ءَايَةً لِّلنَّاسِ وَرَحْمَةً مِّنَّا ۚ وَكَانَ أَمْرًا مَّقْضِيًّا

suras.text: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.
suras.translation: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.
suras.arabic: ۞ فَحَمَلَتْهُ فَٱنتَبَذَتْ بِهِۦ مَكَانًا قَصِيًّا

suras.text: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten."
suras.translation: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, "Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten."
suras.arabic: فَأَجَآءَهَا ٱلْمَخَاضُ إِلَىٰ جِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ قَالَتْ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى مِتُّ قَبْلَ هَـٰذَا وَكُنتُ نَسْيًا مَّنسِيًّا

suras.text: But he called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.
suras.translation: But he called her from below her, "Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.
suras.arabic: فَنَادَىٰهَا مِن تَحْتِهَآ أَلَّا تَحْزَنِى قَدْ جَعَلَ رَبُّكِ تَحْتَكِ سَرِيًّا

suras.text: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.
suras.translation: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.
suras.arabic: وَهُزِّىٓ إِلَيْكِ بِجِذْعِ ٱلنَّخْلَةِ تُسَـٰقِطْ عَلَيْكِ رُطَبًا جَنِيًّا

suras.text: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.
suras.translation: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, "O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.
suras.arabic: فَأَتَتْ بِهِۦ قَوْمَهَا تَحْمِلُهُۥ ۖ قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمَرْيَمُ لَقَدْ جِئْتِ شَيْـًٔا فَرِيًّا

suras.text: O sister of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste."
suras.translation: O sister of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste."
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأُخْتَ هَـٰرُونَ مَا كَانَ أَبُوكِ ٱمْرَأَ سَوْءٍ وَمَا كَانَتْ أُمُّكِ بَغِيًّا

suras.text: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?"
suras.translation: So she pointed to him. They said, "How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?"
suras.arabic: فَأَشَارَتْ إِلَيْهِ ۖ قَالُوا۟ كَيْفَ نُكَلِّمُ مَن كَانَ فِى ٱلْمَهْدِ صَبِيًّا

suras.text: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allah. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.
suras.translation: [Jesus] said, "Indeed, I am the servant of Allah. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.
suras.arabic: قَالَ إِنِّى عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ ءَاتَىٰنِىَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلَنِى نَبِيًّا

suras.text: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakah as long as I remain alive
suras.translation: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakah as long as I remain alive
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلَنِى مُبَارَكًا أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُ وَأَوْصَـٰنِى بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ مَا دُمْتُ حَيًّا

suras.text: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.
suras.translation: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.
suras.arabic: وَبَرًّۢا بِوَٰلِدَتِى وَلَمْ يَجْعَلْنِى جَبَّارًا شَقِيًّا

suras.text: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive."
suras.translation: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive."
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّلَـٰمُ عَلَىَّ يَوْمَ وُلِدتُّ وَيَوْمَ أَمُوتُ وَيَوْمَ أُبْعَثُ حَيًّا

suras.text: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.
suras.translation: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ عِيسَى ٱبْنُ مَرْيَمَ ۚ قَوْلَ ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يَمْتَرُونَ

suras.text: It is not [befitting] for Allah to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is.
suras.translation: It is not [befitting] for Allah to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, "Be," and it is.
suras.arabic: مَا كَانَ لِلَّهِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ مِن وَلَدٍ ۖ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥٓ ۚ إِذَا قَضَىٰٓ أَمْرًا فَإِنَّمَا يَقُولُ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ

suras.text: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.
suras.translation: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.
suras.arabic: أَسْمِعْ بِهِمْ وَأَبْصِرْ يَوْمَ يَأْتُونَنَا ۖ لَـٰكِنِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ ٱلْيَوْمَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَرِثُ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَنْ عَلَيْهَا وَإِلَيْنَا يُرْجَعُونَ

suras.text: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.
suras.translation: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ إِنِّى قَدْ جَآءَنِى مِنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ مَا لَمْ يَأْتِكَ فَٱتَّبِعْنِىٓ أَهْدِكَ صِرَٰطًا سَوِيًّا

suras.text: O my father, do not worship Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.
suras.translation: O my father, do not worship Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَبَتِ لَا تَعْبُدِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ كَانَ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَصِيًّا

suras.text: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."
suras.translation: [His father] said, "Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time."
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَرَاغِبٌ أَنتَ عَنْ ءَالِهَتِى يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ ۖ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ لَأَرْجُمَنَّكَ ۖ وَٱهْجُرْنِى مَلِيًّا

suras.text: [Abraham] said, "Peace will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.
suras.translation: [Abraham] said, "Peace will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.
suras.arabic: قَالَ سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَيْكَ ۖ سَأَسْتَغْفِرُ لَكَ رَبِّىٓ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ بِى حَفِيًّا

suras.text: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allah and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy."
suras.translation: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allah and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy."
suras.arabic: وَأَعْتَزِلُكُمْ وَمَا تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَأَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى عَسَىٰٓ أَلَّآ أَكُونَ بِدُعَآءِ رَبِّى شَقِيًّا

suras.text: And We gave them of Our mercy, and we made for them a reputation of high honor.
suras.translation: And We gave them of Our mercy, and we made for them a reputation of high honor.
suras.arabic: وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُم مِّن رَّحْمَتِنَا وَجَعَلْنَا لَهُمْ لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ عَلِيًّا

suras.text: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
suras.translation: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
suras.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ مُوسَىٰٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مُخْلَصًا وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا

suras.text: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].
suras.translation: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].
suras.arabic: وَنَـٰدَيْنَـٰهُ مِن جَانِبِ ٱلطُّورِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ وَقَرَّبْنَـٰهُ نَجِيًّا

suras.text: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
suras.translation: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
suras.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِسْمَـٰعِيلَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صَادِقَ ٱلْوَعْدِ وَكَانَ رَسُولًا نَّبِيًّا

suras.text: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakah and was to his Lord pleasing.
suras.translation: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakah and was to his Lord pleasing.
suras.arabic: وَكَانَ يَأْمُرُ أَهْلَهُۥ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱلزَّكَوٰةِ وَكَانَ عِندَ رَبِّهِۦ مَرْضِيًّا

suras.text: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
suras.translation: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
suras.arabic: وَٱذْكُرْ فِى ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ إِدْرِيسَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ صِدِّيقًا نَّبِيًّا

suras.text: And We raised him to a high station.
suras.translation: And We raised him to a high station.
suras.arabic: وَرَفَعْنَـٰهُ مَكَانًا عَلِيًّا

suras.text: But there came after them successors who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -
suras.translation: But there came after them successors who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -
suras.arabic: ۞ فَخَلَفَ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ خَلْفٌ أَضَاعُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَٱتَّبَعُوا۟ ٱلشَّهَوَٰتِ ۖ فَسَوْفَ يَلْقَوْنَ غَيًّا

suras.text: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.
suras.translation: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ وَلَا يُظْلَمُونَ شَيْـًٔا

suras.text: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been coming.
suras.translation: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been coming.
suras.arabic: جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ٱلَّتِى وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عِبَادَهُۥ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَأْتِيًّا

suras.text: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.
suras.translation: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.
suras.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا إِلَّا سَلَـٰمًا ۖ وَلَهُمْ رِزْقُهُمْ فِيهَا بُكْرَةً وَعَشِيًّا

suras.text: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allah.
suras.translation: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allah.
suras.arabic: تِلْكَ ٱلْجَنَّةُ ٱلَّتِى نُورِثُ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا مَن كَانَ تَقِيًّا

suras.text: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -
suras.translation: [Gabriel said], "And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -
suras.arabic: وَمَا نَتَنَزَّلُ إِلَّا بِأَمْرِ رَبِّكَ ۖ لَهُۥ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِينَا وَمَا خَلْفَنَا وَمَا بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ ۚ وَمَا كَانَ رَبُّكَ نَسِيًّا

suras.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"
suras.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?"
suras.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فَٱعْبُدْهُ وَٱصْطَبِرْ لِعِبَـٰدَتِهِۦ ۚ هَلْ تَعْلَمُ لَهُۥ سَمِيًّا

suras.text: And the disbeliever says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"
suras.translation: And the disbeliever says, "When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَءِذَا مَا مِتُّ لَسَوْفَ أُخْرَجُ حَيًّا

suras.text: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.
suras.translation: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.
suras.arabic: فَوَرَبِّكَ لَنَحْشُرَنَّهُمْ وَٱلشَّيَـٰطِينَ ثُمَّ لَنُحْضِرَنَّهُمْ حَوْلَ جَهَنَّمَ جِثِيًّا

suras.text: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.
suras.translation: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَنزِعَنَّ مِن كُلِّ شِيعَةٍ أَيُّهُمْ أَشَدُّ عَلَى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عِتِيًّا

suras.text: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.
suras.translation: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَنَحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ أَوْلَىٰ بِهَا صِلِيًّا

suras.text: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.
suras.translation: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.
suras.arabic: وَإِن مِّنكُمْ إِلَّا وَارِدُهَا ۚ كَانَ عَلَىٰ رَبِّكَ حَتْمًا مَّقْضِيًّا

suras.text: Then We will save those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.
suras.translation: Then We will save those who feared Allah and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ نُنَجِّى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّقَوا۟ وَّنَذَرُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ فِيهَا جِثِيًّا

suras.text: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse.
suras.translation: And Allah increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse.
suras.arabic: وَيَزِيدُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱهْتَدَوْا۟ هُدًى ۗ وَٱلْبَـٰقِيَـٰتُ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتُ خَيْرٌ عِندَ رَبِّكَ ثَوَابًا وَخَيْرٌ مَّرَدًّا

suras.text: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]?"
suras.translation: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, "I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]?"
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى كَفَرَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا وَقَالَ لَأُوتَيَنَّ مَالًا وَوَلَدًا

suras.text: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?
suras.translation: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?
suras.arabic: أَطَّلَعَ ٱلْغَيْبَ أَمِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا

suras.text: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.
suras.translation: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.
suras.arabic: وَنَرِثُهُۥ مَا يَقُولُ وَيَأْتِينَا فَرْدًا

suras.text: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.
suras.translation: And they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.
suras.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لِّيَكُونُوا۟ لَهُمْ عِزًّا

suras.text: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number.
suras.translation: So be not impatient over them. We only count out to them a [limited] number.
suras.arabic: فَلَا تَعْجَلْ عَلَيْهِمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا نَعُدُّ لَهُمْ عَدًّا

suras.text: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
suras.translation: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
suras.arabic: وَنَسُوقُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ وِرْدًا

suras.text: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.
suras.translation: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.
suras.arabic: لَّا يَمْلِكُونَ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةَ إِلَّا مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ عِندَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَهْدًا

suras.text: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son."
suras.translation: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son."
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا

suras.text: You have done an atrocious thing.
suras.translation: You have done an atrocious thing.
suras.arabic: لَّقَدْ جِئْتُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِدًّا

suras.text: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
suras.translation: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
suras.arabic: تَكَادُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتُ يَتَفَطَّرْنَ مِنْهُ وَتَنشَقُّ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَتَخِرُّ ٱلْجِبَالُ هَدًّا

suras.text: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.
suras.translation: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.
suras.arabic: أَن دَعَوْا۟ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ وَلَدًا

suras.text: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.
suras.translation: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ أَن يَتَّخِذَ وَلَدًا

suras.text: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.
suras.translation: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.
suras.arabic: إِن كُلُّ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّآ ءَاتِى ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ عَبْدًا

suras.text: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.
suras.translation: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.
suras.arabic: لَّقَدْ أَحْصَىٰهُمْ وَعَدَّهُمْ عَدًّا

suras.text: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
suras.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ سَيَجْعَلُ لَهُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وُدًّا

suras.text: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur\'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.
suras.translation: So, [O Muhammad], We have only made Qur\'an easy in the Arabic language that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لِتُبَشِّرَ بِهِ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ وَتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ قَوْمًا لُّدًّا

suras.text: We have not sent down to you the Qur\'an that you be distressed
suras.translation: We have not sent down to you the Qur\'an that you be distressed
suras.arabic: مَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِتَشْقَىٰٓ

suras.text: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allah] -
suras.translation: But only as a reminder for those who fear [Allah] -
suras.arabic: إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰ

suras.text: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens,
suras.translation: A revelation from He who created the earth and highest heavens,
suras.arabic: تَنزِيلًا مِّمَّنْ خَلَقَ ٱلْأَرْضَ وَٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ ٱلْعُلَى

suras.text: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established.
suras.translation: The Most Merciful [who is] above the Throne established.
suras.arabic: ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱسْتَوَىٰ

suras.text: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.
suras.translation: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth and what is between them and what is under the soil.
suras.arabic: لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ ٱلثَّرَىٰ

suras.text: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden.
suras.translation: And if you speak aloud - then indeed, He knows the secret and what is [even] more hidden.
suras.arabic: وَإِن تَجْهَرْ بِٱلْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلسِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى

suras.text: Allah - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.
suras.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him. To Him belong the best names.
suras.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ

suras.text: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."
suras.translation: When he saw a fire and said to his family, "Stay here; indeed, I have perceived a fire; perhaps I can bring you a torch or find at the fire some guidance."
suras.arabic: إِذْ رَءَا نَارًا فَقَالَ لِأَهْلِهِ ٱمْكُثُوٓا۟ إِنِّىٓ ءَانَسْتُ نَارًا لَّعَلِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم مِّنْهَا بِقَبَسٍ أَوْ أَجِدُ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ هُدًى

suras.text: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the sacred valley of Tuwa.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am your Lord, so remove your sandals. Indeed, you are in the sacred valley of Tuwa.
suras.arabic: إِنِّىٓ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكَ فَٱخْلَعْ نَعْلَيْكَ ۖ إِنَّكَ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى

suras.text: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you].
suras.translation: And I have chosen you, so listen to what is revealed [to you].
suras.arabic: وَأَنَا ٱخْتَرْتُكَ فَٱسْتَمِعْ لِمَا يُوحَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am Allah. There is no deity except Me, so worship Me and establish prayer for My remembrance.
suras.arabic: إِنَّنِىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنَا۠ فَٱعْبُدْنِى وَأَقِمِ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ لِذِكْرِىٓ

suras.text: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.
suras.translation: Indeed, the Hour is coming - I almost conceal it - so that every soul may be recompensed according to that for which it strives.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ ءَاتِيَةٌ أَكَادُ أُخْفِيهَا لِتُجْزَىٰ كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا تَسْعَىٰ

suras.text: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.
suras.translation: So do not let one avert you from it who does not believe in it and follows his desire, for you [then] would perish.
suras.arabic: فَلَا يَصُدَّنَّكَ عَنْهَا مَن لَّا يُؤْمِنُ بِهَا وَٱتَّبَعَ هَوَىٰهُ فَتَرْدَىٰ

suras.text: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses?"
suras.translation: And what is that in your right hand, O Moses?"
suras.arabic: وَمَا تِلْكَ بِيَمِينِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."
suras.translation: He said, "It is my staff; I lean upon it, and I bring down leaves for my sheep and I have therein other uses."
suras.arabic: قَالَ هِىَ عَصَاىَ أَتَوَكَّؤُا۟ عَلَيْهَا وَأَهُشُّ بِهَا عَلَىٰ غَنَمِى وَلِىَ فِيهَا مَـَٔارِبُ أُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "Throw it down, O Moses."
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "Throw it down, O Moses."
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَلْقِهَا يَـٰمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.
suras.translation: So he threw it down, and thereupon it was a snake, moving swiftly.
suras.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰهَا فَإِذَا هِىَ حَيَّةٌ تَسْعَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "Seize it and fear not; We will return it to its former condition.
suras.arabic: قَالَ خُذْهَا وَلَا تَخَفْ ۖ سَنُعِيدُهَا سِيرَتَهَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign,
suras.translation: And draw in your hand to your side; it will come out white without disease - another sign,
suras.arabic: وَٱضْمُمْ يَدَكَ إِلَىٰ جَنَاحِكَ تَخْرُجْ بَيْضَآءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ سُوٓءٍ ءَايَةً أُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs.
suras.translation: That We may show you [some] of Our greater signs.
suras.arabic: لِنُرِيَكَ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا ٱلْكُبْرَى

suras.text: And untie the knot from my tongue
suras.translation: And untie the knot from my tongue
suras.arabic: وَٱحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِى

suras.text: That they may understand my speech.
suras.translation: That they may understand my speech.
suras.arabic: يَفْقَهُوا۟ قَوْلِى

suras.text: And appoint for me a minister from my family -
suras.translation: And appoint for me a minister from my family -
suras.arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى وَزِيرًا مِّنْ أَهْلِى

suras.text: Increase through him my strength
suras.translation: Increase through him my strength
suras.arabic: ٱشْدُدْ بِهِۦٓ أَزْرِى

suras.text: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing."
suras.translation: Indeed, You are of us ever Seeing."
suras.arabic: إِنَّكَ كُنتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا

suras.text: [Allah] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "You have been granted your request, O Moses.
suras.arabic: قَالَ قَدْ أُوتِيتَ سُؤْلَكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,
suras.translation: And We had already conferred favor upon you another time,
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ مَنَنَّا عَلَيْكَ مَرَّةً أُخْرَىٰٓ

suras.text: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,
suras.translation: When We inspired to your mother what We inspired,
suras.arabic: إِذْ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّكَ مَا يُوحَىٰٓ

suras.text: [Saying], \'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.\' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye.
suras.translation: [Saying], \'Cast him into the chest and cast it into the river, and the river will throw it onto the bank; there will take him an enemy to Me and an enemy to him.\' And I bestowed upon you love from Me that you would be brought up under My eye.
suras.arabic: أَنِ ٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلتَّابُوتِ فَٱقْذِفِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ فَلْيُلْقِهِ ٱلْيَمُّ بِٱلسَّاحِلِ يَأْخُذْهُ عَدُوٌّ لِّى وَعَدُوٌّ لَّهُۥ ۚ وَأَلْقَيْتُ عَلَيْكَ مَحَبَّةً مِّنِّى وَلِتُصْنَعَ عَلَىٰ عَيْنِىٓ

suras.text: And I produced you for Myself.
suras.translation: And I produced you for Myself.
suras.arabic: وَٱصْطَنَعْتُكَ لِنَفْسِى

suras.text: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.
suras.translation: Go, you and your brother, with My signs and do not slacken in My remembrance.
suras.arabic: ٱذْهَبْ أَنتَ وَأَخُوكَ بِـَٔايَـٰتِى وَلَا تَنِيَا فِى ذِكْرِى

suras.text: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allah]."
suras.translation: And speak to him with gentle speech that perhaps he may be reminded or fear [Allah]."
suras.arabic: فَقُولَا لَهُۥ قَوْلًا لَّيِّنًا لَّعَلَّهُۥ يَتَذَكَّرُ أَوْ يَخْشَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "Fear not. Indeed, I am with you both; I hear and I see.
suras.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخَافَآ ۖ إِنَّنِى مَعَكُمَآ أَسْمَعُ وَأَرَىٰ

suras.text: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."
suras.translation: He said, "Our Lord is He who gave each thing its form and then guided [it]."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّنَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلْقَهُۥ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets."
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "The knowledge thereof is with my Lord in a record. My Lord neither errs nor forgets."
suras.arabic: قَالَ عِلْمُهَا عِندَ رَبِّى فِى كِتَـٰبٍ ۖ لَّا يَضِلُّ رَبِّى وَلَا يَنسَى

suras.text: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.
suras.translation: [It is He] who has made for you the earth as a bed [spread out] and inserted therein for you roadways and sent down from the sky, rain and produced thereby categories of various plants.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ مَهْدًا وَسَلَكَ لَكُمْ فِيهَا سُبُلًا وَأَنزَلَ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّن نَّبَاتٍ شَتَّىٰ

suras.text: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed, in that are signs for those of intelligence.
suras.translation: Eat [therefrom] and pasture your livestock. Indeed, in that are signs for those of intelligence.
suras.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱرْعَوْا۟ أَنْعَـٰمَكُمْ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّأُو۟لِى ٱلنُّهَىٰ

suras.text: From the earth We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.
suras.translation: From the earth We created you, and into it We will return you, and from it We will extract you another time.
suras.arabic: ۞ مِنْهَا خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ وَفِيهَا نُعِيدُكُمْ وَمِنْهَا نُخْرِجُكُمْ تَارَةً أُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?
suras.translation: He said, "Have you come to us to drive us out of our land with your magic, O Moses?
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَجِئْتَنَا لِتُخْرِجَنَا مِنْ أَرْضِنَا بِسِحْرِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."
suras.translation: Then we will surely bring you magic like it, so make between us and you an appointment, which we will not fail to keep and neither will you, in a place assigned."
suras.arabic: فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّكَ بِسِحْرٍ مِّثْلِهِۦ فَٱجْعَلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكَ مَوْعِدًا لَّا نُخْلِفُهُۥ نَحْنُ وَلَآ أَنتَ مَكَانًا سُوًى

suras.text: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way.
suras.translation: They said, "Indeed, these are two magicians who want to drive you out of your land with their magic and do away with your most exemplary way.
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَٰنِ لَسَـٰحِرَٰنِ يُرِيدَانِ أَن يُخْرِجَاكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِمَا وَيَذْهَبَا بِطَرِيقَتِكُمُ ٱلْمُثْلَىٰ

suras.text: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."
suras.translation: So resolve upon your plan and then come [forward] in line. And he has succeeded today who overcomes."
suras.arabic: فَأَجْمِعُوا۟ كَيْدَكُمْ ثُمَّ ٱئْتُوا۟ صَفًّا ۚ وَقَدْ أَفْلَحَ ٱلْيَوْمَ مَنِ ٱسْتَعْلَىٰ

suras.text: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."
suras.translation: They said, "O Moses, either you throw or we will be the first to throw."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِمَّآ أَن تُلْقِىَ وَإِمَّآ أَن نَّكُونَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ أَلْقَىٰ

suras.text: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].
suras.translation: He said, "Rather, you throw." And suddenly their ropes and staffs seemed to him from their magic that they were moving [like snakes].
suras.arabic: قَالَ بَلْ أَلْقُوا۟ ۖ فَإِذَا حِبَالُهُمْ وَعِصِيُّهُمْ يُخَيَّلُ إِلَيْهِ مِن سِحْرِهِمْ أَنَّهَا تَسْعَىٰ

suras.text: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.
suras.translation: And he sensed within himself apprehension, did Moses.
suras.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ فِى نَفْسِهِۦ خِيفَةً مُّوسَىٰ

suras.text: Allah said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.
suras.translation: Allah said, "Fear not. Indeed, it is you who are superior.
suras.arabic: قُلْنَا لَا تَخَفْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ

suras.text: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."
suras.translation: And throw what is in your right hand; it will swallow up what they have crafted. What they have crafted is but the trick of a magician, and the magician will not succeed wherever he is."
suras.arabic: وَأَلْقِ مَا فِى يَمِينِكَ تَلْقَفْ مَا صَنَعُوٓا۟ ۖ إِنَّمَا صَنَعُوا۟ كَيْدُ سَـٰحِرٍ ۖ وَلَا يُفْلِحُ ٱلسَّاحِرُ حَيْثُ أَتَىٰ

suras.text: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."
suras.translation: So the magicians fell down in prostration. They said, "We have believed in the Lord of Aaron and Moses."
suras.arabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سُجَّدًا قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ هَـٰرُونَ وَمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life.
suras.translation: They said, "Never will we prefer you over what has come to us of clear proofs and [over] He who created us. So decree whatever you are to decree. You can only decree for this worldly life.
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نُّؤْثِرَكَ عَلَىٰ مَا جَآءَنَا مِنَ ٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنَا ۖ فَٱقْضِ مَآ أَنتَ قَاضٍ ۖ إِنَّمَا تَقْضِى هَـٰذِهِ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَآ

suras.text: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allah is better and more enduring."
suras.translation: Indeed, we have believed in our Lord that He may forgive us our sins and what you compelled us [to do] of magic. And Allah is better and more enduring."
suras.arabic: إِنَّآ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّنَا لِيَغْفِرَ لَنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَا وَمَآ أَكْرَهْتَنَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلسِّحْرِ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.
suras.translation: Indeed, whoever comes to his Lord as a criminal - indeed, for him is Hell; he will neither die therein nor live.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مَن يَأْتِ رَبَّهُۥ مُجْرِمًا فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ جَهَنَّمَ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ

suras.text: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:
suras.translation: But whoever comes to Him as a believer having done righteous deeds - for those will be the highest degrees [in position]:
suras.arabic: وَمَن يَأْتِهِۦ مُؤْمِنًا قَدْ عَمِلَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمُ ٱلدَّرَجَـٰتُ ٱلْعُلَىٰ

suras.text: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.
suras.translation: Gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they abide eternally. And that is the reward of one who purifies himself.
suras.arabic: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَآءُ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ

suras.text: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen."
suras.translation: [Saying], "Eat from the good things with which We have provided you and do not transgress [or oppress others] therein, lest My anger should descend upon you. And he upon whom My anger descends has certainly fallen."
suras.arabic: كُلُوا۟ مِن طَيِّبَـٰتِ مَا رَزَقْنَـٰكُمْ وَلَا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِيهِ فَيَحِلَّ عَلَيْكُمْ غَضَبِى ۖ وَمَن يَحْلِلْ عَلَيْهِ غَضَبِى فَقَدْ هَوَىٰ

suras.text: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.
suras.translation: But indeed, I am the Perpetual Forgiver of whoever repents and believes and does righteousness and then continues in guidance.
suras.arabic: وَإِنِّى لَغَفَّارٌ لِّمَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا ثُمَّ ٱهْتَدَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses?"
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "And what made you hasten from your people, O Moses?"
suras.arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَعْجَلَكَ عَن قَوْمِكَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."
suras.translation: He said, "They are close upon my tracks, and I hastened to You, my Lord, that You be pleased."
suras.arabic: قَالَ هُمْ أُو۟لَآءِ عَلَىٰٓ أَثَرِى وَعَجِلْتُ إِلَيْكَ رَبِّ لِتَرْضَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Samiri has led them astray."
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "But indeed, We have tried your people after you [departed], and the Samiri has led them astray."
suras.arabic: قَالَ فَإِنَّا قَدْ فَتَنَّا قَوْمَكَ مِنۢ بَعْدِكَ وَأَضَلَّهُمُ ٱلسَّامِرِىُّ

suras.text: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot."
suras.translation: And he extracted for them [the statue of] a calf which had a lowing sound, and they said, "This is your god and the god of Moses, but he forgot."
suras.arabic: فَأَخْرَجَ لَهُمْ عِجْلًا جَسَدًا لَّهُۥ خُوَارٌ فَقَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمْ وَإِلَـٰهُ مُوسَىٰ فَنَسِىَ

suras.text: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?
suras.translation: Did they not see that it could not return to them any speech and that it did not possess for them any harm or benefit?
suras.arabic: أَفَلَا يَرَوْنَ أَلَّا يَرْجِعُ إِلَيْهِمْ قَوْلًا وَلَا يَمْلِكُ لَهُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا نَفْعًا

suras.text: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order."
suras.translation: And Aaron had already told them before [the return of Moses], "O my people, you are only being tested by it, and indeed, your Lord is the Most Merciful, so follow me and obey my order."
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ قَالَ لَهُمْ هَـٰرُونُ مِن قَبْلُ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنَّمَا فُتِنتُم بِهِۦ ۖ وَإِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ فَٱتَّبِعُونِى وَأَطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرِى

suras.text: They said, "We will never cease being devoted to the calf until Moses returns to us."
suras.translation: They said, "We will never cease being devoted to the calf until Moses returns to us."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَن نَّبْرَحَ عَلَيْهِ عَـٰكِفِينَ حَتَّىٰ يَرْجِعَ إِلَيْنَا مُوسَىٰ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "O Aaron, what prevented you, when you saw them going astray,
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "O Aaron, what prevented you, when you saw them going astray,
suras.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰهَـٰرُونُ مَا مَنَعَكَ إِذْ رَأَيْتَهُمْ ضَلُّوٓا۟

suras.text: From following me? Then have you disobeyed my order?"
suras.translation: From following me? Then have you disobeyed my order?"
suras.arabic: أَلَّا تَتَّبِعَنِ ۖ أَفَعَصَيْتَ أَمْرِى

suras.text: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Samiri?"
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "And what is your case, O Samiri?"
suras.arabic: قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكَ يَـٰسَـٰمِرِىُّ

suras.text: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me."
suras.translation: He said, "I saw what they did not see, so I took a handful [of dust] from the track of the messenger and threw it, and thus did my soul entice me."
suras.arabic: قَالَ بَصُرْتُ بِمَا لَمْ يَبْصُرُوا۟ بِهِۦ فَقَبَضْتُ قَبْضَةً مِّنْ أَثَرِ ٱلرَّسُولِ فَنَبَذْتُهَا وَكَذَٰلِكَ سَوَّلَتْ لِى نَفْسِى

suras.text: Your god is only Allah, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge."
suras.translation: Your god is only Allah, except for whom there is no deity. He has encompassed all things in knowledge."
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَآ إِلَـٰهُكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًا

suras.text: Thus, [O Muhammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us the Qur\'an.
suras.translation: Thus, [O Muhammad], We relate to you from the news of what has preceded. And We have certainly given you from Us the Qur\'an.
suras.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَقُصُّ عَلَيْكَ مِنْ أَنۢبَآءِ مَا قَدْ سَبَقَ ۚ وَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَـٰكَ مِن لَّدُنَّا ذِكْرًا

suras.text: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.
suras.translation: The Day the Horn will be blown. And We will gather the criminals, that Day, blue-eyed.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ ۚ وَنَحْشُرُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ يَوْمَئِذٍ زُرْقًا

suras.text: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."
suras.translation: They will murmur among themselves, "You remained not but ten [days in the world]."
suras.arabic: يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ بَيْنَهُمْ إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا عَشْرًا

suras.text: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner will say, "You remained not but one day."
suras.translation: We are most knowing of what they say when the best of them in manner will say, "You remained not but one day."
suras.arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ إِذْ يَقُولُ أَمْثَلُهُمْ طَرِيقَةً إِن لَّبِثْتُمْ إِلَّا يَوْمًا

suras.text: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.
suras.translation: And they ask you about the mountains, so say, "My Lord will blow them away with a blast.
suras.arabic: وَيَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلْجِبَالِ فَقُلْ يَنسِفُهَا رَبِّى نَسْفًا

suras.text: And He will leave the earth a level plain;
suras.translation: And He will leave the earth a level plain;
suras.arabic: فَيَذَرُهَا قَاعًا صَفْصَفًا

suras.text: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."
suras.translation: You will not see therein a depression or an elevation."
suras.arabic: لَّا تَرَىٰ فِيهَا عِوَجًا وَلَآ أَمْتًا

suras.text: That Day, everyone will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].
suras.translation: That Day, everyone will follow [the call of] the Caller [with] no deviation therefrom, and [all] voices will be stilled before the Most Merciful, so you will not hear except a whisper [of footsteps].
suras.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَّبِعُونَ ٱلدَّاعِىَ لَا عِوَجَ لَهُۥ ۖ وَخَشَعَتِ ٱلْأَصْوَاتُ لِلرَّحْمَـٰنِ فَلَا تَسْمَعُ إِلَّا هَمْسًا

suras.text: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.
suras.translation: That Day, no intercession will benefit except [that of] one to whom the Most Merciful has given permission and has accepted his word.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةُ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَرَضِىَ لَهُۥ قَوْلًا

suras.text: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge.
suras.translation: Allah knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, but they do not encompass it in knowledge.
suras.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِهِۦ عِلْمًا

suras.text: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur\'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."
suras.translation: So high [above all] is Allah, the Sovereign, the Truth. And, [O Muhammad], do not hasten with [recitation of] the Qur\'an before its revelation is completed to you, and say, "My Lord, increase me in knowledge."
suras.arabic: فَتَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۗ وَلَا تَعْجَلْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مِن قَبْلِ أَن يُقْضَىٰٓ إِلَيْكَ وَحْيُهُۥ ۖ وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِى عِلْمًا

suras.text: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.
suras.translation: And We had already taken a promise from Adam before, but he forgot; and We found not in him determination.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَهِدْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ ءَادَمَ مِن قَبْلُ فَنَسِىَ وَلَمْ نَجِدْ لَهُۥ عَزْمًا

suras.text: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.
suras.translation: And [mention] when We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam," and they prostrated, except Iblees; he refused.
suras.arabic: وَإِذْ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِـَٔادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ أَبَىٰ

suras.text: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is [promised] for you not to be hungry therein or be unclothed.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لَكَ أَلَّا تَجُوعَ فِيهَا وَلَا تَعْرَىٰ

suras.text: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun."
suras.translation: And indeed, you will not be thirsty therein or be hot from the sun."
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّكَ لَا تَظْمَؤُا۟ فِيهَا وَلَا تَضْحَىٰ

suras.text: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"
suras.translation: Then Satan whispered to him; he said, "O Adam, shall I direct you to the tree of eternity and possession that will not deteriorate?"
suras.arabic: فَوَسْوَسَ إِلَيْهِ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ قَالَ يَـٰٓـَٔادَمُ هَلْ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَىٰ شَجَرَةِ ٱلْخُلْدِ وَمُلْكٍ لَّا يَبْلَىٰ

suras.text: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him].
suras.translation: Then his Lord chose him and turned to him in forgiveness and guided [him].
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَتَابَ عَلَيْهِ وَهَدَىٰ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "Descend from Paradise - all, [your descendants] being enemies to one another. And if there should come to you guidance from Me - then whoever follows My guidance will neither go astray [in the world] nor suffer [in the Hereafter].
suras.arabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطَا مِنْهَا جَمِيعًۢا ۖ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ ۖ فَإِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُم مِّنِّى هُدًى فَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ هُدَاىَ فَلَا يَضِلُّ وَلَا يَشْقَىٰ

suras.text: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"
suras.translation: He will say, "My Lord, why have you raised me blind while I was [once] seeing?"
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ لِمَ حَشَرْتَنِىٓ أَعْمَىٰ وَقَدْ كُنتُ بَصِيرًا

suras.text: [Allah] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."
suras.translation: [Allah] will say, "Thus did Our signs come to you, and you forgot them; and thus will you this Day be forgotten."
suras.arabic: قَالَ كَذَٰلِكَ أَتَتْكَ ءَايَـٰتُنَا فَنَسِيتَهَا ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ تُنسَىٰ

suras.text: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.
suras.translation: So be patient over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting; and during periods of the night [exalt Him] and at the ends of the day, that you may be satisfied.
suras.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ غُرُوبِهَا ۖ وَمِنْ ءَانَآئِ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْ وَأَطْرَافَ ٱلنَّهَارِ لَعَلَّكَ تَرْضَىٰ

suras.text: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring.
suras.translation: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَمُدَّنَّ عَيْنَيْكَ إِلَىٰ مَا مَتَّعْنَا بِهِۦٓ أَزْوَٰجًا مِّنْهُمْ زَهْرَةَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا لِنَفْتِنَهُمْ فِيهِ ۚ وَرِزْقُ رَبِّكَ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰ

suras.text: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.
suras.translation: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.
suras.arabic: وَأْمُرْ أَهْلَكَ بِٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَٱصْطَبِرْ عَلَيْهَا ۖ لَا نَسْـَٔلُكَ رِزْقًا ۖ نَّحْنُ نَرْزُقُكَ ۗ وَٱلْعَـٰقِبَةُ لِلتَّقْوَىٰ

suras.text: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?
suras.translation: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَوْلَا يَأْتِينَا بِـَٔايَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦٓ ۚ أَوَلَمْ تَأْتِهِم بَيِّنَةُ مَا فِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: No mention comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play
suras.translation: No mention comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play
suras.arabic: مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّن رَّبِّهِم مُّحْدَثٍ إِلَّا ٱسْتَمَعُوهُ وَهُمْ يَلْعَبُونَ

suras.text: The Prophet said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing."
suras.translation: The Prophet said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّى يَعْلَمُ ٱلْقَوْلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

suras.text: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]."
suras.translation: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]."
suras.arabic: بَلْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَضْغَـٰثُ أَحْلَـٰمٍۭ بَلِ ٱفْتَرَىٰهُ بَلْ هُوَ شَاعِرٌ فَلْيَأْتِنَا بِـَٔايَةٍ كَمَآ أُرْسِلَ ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ

suras.text: And We did not make the prophets forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].
suras.translation: And We did not make the prophets forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].
suras.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ جَسَدًا لَّا يَأْكُلُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ خَـٰلِدِينَ

suras.text: We have certainly sent down to you a Book in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?
suras.translation: We have certainly sent down to you a Book in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ أَنزَلْنَآ إِلَيْكُمْ كِتَـٰبًا فِيهِ ذِكْرُكُمْ ۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.
suras.translation: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.
suras.arabic: وَكَمْ قَصَمْنَا مِن قَرْيَةٍ كَانَتْ ظَالِمَةً وَأَنشَأْنَا بَعْدَهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ

suras.text: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
suras.translation: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].
suras.translation: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].
suras.arabic: فَمَا زَالَت تِّلْكَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ حَتَّىٰ جَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ حَصِيدًا خَـٰمِدِينَ

suras.text: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.
suras.translation: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.
suras.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ

suras.text: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.
suras.translation: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.
suras.arabic: لَوْ أَرَدْنَآ أَن نَّتَّخِذَ لَهْوًا لَّٱتَّخَذْنَـٰهُ مِن لَّدُنَّآ إِن كُنَّا فَـٰعِلِينَ

suras.text: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.
suras.translation: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.
suras.arabic: وَلَهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَمَنْ عِندَهُۥ لَا يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ عَنْ عِبَادَتِهِۦ وَلَا يَسْتَحْسِرُونَ

suras.text: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken.
suras.translation: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken.
suras.arabic: يُسَبِّحُونَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ لَا يَفْتُرُونَ

suras.text: Or have men taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]?
suras.translation: Or have men taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]?
suras.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَةً مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ هُمْ يُنشِرُونَ

suras.text: Had there been within the heavens and earth gods besides Allah, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allah, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
suras.translation: Had there been within the heavens and earth gods besides Allah, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allah, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.
suras.arabic: لَوْ كَانَ فِيهِمَآ ءَالِهَةٌ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ لَفَسَدَتَا ۚ فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَرْشِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ

suras.text: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.
suras.translation: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.
suras.arabic: لَا يُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا يَفْعَلُ وَهُمْ يُسْـَٔلُونَ

suras.text: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muhammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur\'an] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.
suras.translation: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muhammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur\'an] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.
suras.arabic: أَمِ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً ۖ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَـٰنَكُمْ ۖ هَـٰذَا ذِكْرُ مَن مَّعِىَ وَذِكْرُ مَن قَبْلِى ۗ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ ٱلْحَقَّ ۖ فَهُم مُّعْرِضُونَ

suras.text: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.
suras.translation: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَلَدًا ۗ سُبْحَـٰنَهُۥ ۚ بَلْ عِبَادٌ مُّكْرَمُونَ

suras.text: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.
suras.translation: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.
suras.arabic: لَا يَسْبِقُونَهُۥ بِٱلْقَوْلِ وَهُم بِأَمْرِهِۦ يَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.
suras.translation: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.
suras.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يَشْفَعُونَ إِلَّا لِمَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ وَهُم مِّنْ خَشْيَتِهِۦ مُشْفِقُونَ

suras.text: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him"- that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.
suras.translation: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him"- that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَمَن يَقُلْ مِنْهُمْ إِنِّىٓ إِلَـٰهٌ مِّن دُونِهِۦ فَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِيهِ جَهَنَّمَ ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.
suras.translation: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ رَوَٰسِىَ أَن تَمِيدَ بِهِمْ وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا فِجَاجًا سُبُلًا لَّعَلَّهُمْ يَهْتَدُونَ

suras.text: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away.
suras.translation: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away.
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ سَقْفًا مَّحْفُوظًا ۖ وَهُمْ عَنْ ءَايَـٰتِهَا مُعْرِضُونَ

suras.text: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming.
suras.translation: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming.
suras.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ ۖ كُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ

suras.text: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?
suras.translation: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?
suras.arabic: وَمَا جَعَلْنَا لِبَشَرٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ ٱلْخُلْدَ ۖ أَفَإِي۟ن مِّتَّ فَهُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِدُونَ

suras.text: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.
suras.translation: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.
suras.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَآئِقَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ ۗ وَنَبْلُوكُم بِٱلشَّرِّ وَٱلْخَيْرِ فِتْنَةً ۖ وَإِلَيْنَا تُرْجَعُونَ

suras.text: Man was created of haste. I will show you My signs, so do not impatiently urge Me.
suras.translation: Man was created of haste. I will show you My signs, so do not impatiently urge Me.
suras.arabic: خُلِقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِنْ عَجَلٍ ۚ سَأُو۟رِيكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِى فَلَا تَسْتَعْجِلُونِ

suras.text: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.
suras.translation: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.
suras.arabic: بَلْ تَأْتِيهِم بَغْتَةً فَتَبْهَتُهُمْ فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ رَدَّهَا وَلَا هُمْ يُنظَرُونَ

suras.text: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
suras.translation: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱسْتُهْزِئَ بِرُسُلٍ مِّن قَبْلِكَ فَحَاقَ بِٱلَّذِينَ سَخِرُوا۟ مِنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ

suras.text: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.
suras.translation: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.
suras.arabic: قُلْ مَن يَكْلَؤُكُم بِٱلَّيْلِ وَٱلنَّهَارِ مِنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۗ بَلْ هُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ رَبِّهِم مُّعْرِضُونَ

suras.text: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.
suras.translation: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ ءَالِهَةٌ تَمْنَعُهُم مِّن دُونِنَا ۚ لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَلَا هُم مِّنَّا يُصْحَبُونَ

suras.text: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.
suras.translation: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أُنذِرُكُم بِٱلْوَحْىِ ۚ وَلَا يَسْمَعُ ٱلصُّمُّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا مَا يُنذَرُونَ

suras.text: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive.
suras.translation: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَهُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّاعَةِ مُشْفِقُونَ

suras.text: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them."
suras.translation: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا لَهَا عَـٰبِدِينَ

suras.text: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error."
suras.translation: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error."
suras.arabic: قَالَ لَقَدْ كُنتُمْ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمْ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest?"
suras.translation: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest?"
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَجِئْتَنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ أَمْ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱللَّـٰعِبِينَ

suras.text: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify.
suras.translation: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify.
suras.arabic: قَالَ بَل رَّبُّكُمْ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَهُنَّ وَأَنَا۠ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّـٰهِدِينَ

suras.text: And [I swear] by Allah, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away."
suras.translation: And [I swear] by Allah, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away."
suras.arabic: وَتَٱللَّهِ لَأَكِيدَنَّ أَصْنَـٰمَكُم بَعْدَ أَن تُوَلُّوا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ

suras.text: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].
suras.translation: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].
suras.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمْ جُذَٰذًا إِلَّا كَبِيرًا لَّهُمْ لَعَلَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِ يَرْجِعُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers."
suras.translation: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَن فَعَلَ هَـٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَآ إِنَّهُۥ لَمِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham."
suras.translation: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَمِعْنَا فَتًى يَذْكُرُهُمْ يُقَالُ لَهُۥٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمُ

suras.text: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify."
suras.translation: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ فَأْتُوا۟ بِهِۦ عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِ ٱلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَشْهَدُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?"
suras.translation: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?"
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَأَنتَ فَعَلْتَ هَـٰذَا بِـَٔالِهَتِنَا يَـٰٓإِبْرَٰهِيمُ

suras.text: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak."
suras.translation: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak."
suras.arabic: قَالَ بَلْ فَعَلَهُۥ كَبِيرُهُمْ هَـٰذَا فَسْـَٔلُوهُمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ يَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."
suras.translation: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."
suras.arabic: فَرَجَعُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ أَنتُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ

suras.text: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"
suras.translation: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ نُكِسُوا۟ عَلَىٰ رُءُوسِهِمْ لَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ يَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?
suras.translation: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allah that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَفَتَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُكُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يَضُرُّكُمْ

suras.text: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason?"
suras.translation: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allah. Then will you not use reason?"
suras.arabic: أُفٍّ لَّكُمْ وَلِمَا تَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act."
suras.translation: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ حَرِّقُوهُ وَٱنصُرُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ فَـٰعِلِينَ

suras.text: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."
suras.translation: Allah said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."
suras.arabic: قُلْنَا يَـٰنَارُ كُونِى بَرْدًا وَسَلَـٰمًا عَلَىٰٓ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ

suras.text: And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers.
suras.translation: And they intended for him harm, but We made them the greatest losers.
suras.arabic: وَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَخْسَرِينَ

suras.text: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds.
suras.translation: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَنَجَّيْنَـٰهُ وَلُوطًا إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا لِلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakah; and they were worshippers of Us.
suras.translation: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakah; and they were worshippers of Us.
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَئِمَّةً يَهْدُونَ بِأَمْرِنَا وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْهِمْ فِعْلَ ٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ وَإِقَامَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةِ وَإِيتَآءَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةِ ۖ وَكَانُوا۟ لَنَا عَـٰبِدِينَ

suras.text: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.
suras.translation: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.
suras.arabic: وَأَدْخَلْنَـٰهُ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.
suras.translation: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.
suras.arabic: وَلِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ ٱلرِّيحَ عَاصِفَةً تَجْرِى بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا ۚ وَكُنَّا بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: And of the devils were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.
suras.translation: And of the devils were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.
suras.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ مَن يَغُوصُونَ لَهُۥ وَيَعْمَلُونَ عَمَلًا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَكُنَّا لَهُمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ

suras.text: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful."
suras.translation: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and you are the Most Merciful of the merciful."
suras.arabic: ۞ وَأَيُّوبَ إِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَسَّنِىَ ٱلضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ ٱلرَّٰحِمِينَ

suras.text: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.
suras.translation: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.
suras.arabic: وَإِسْمَـٰعِيلَ وَإِدْرِيسَ وَذَا ٱلْكِفْلِ ۖ كُلٌّ مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰبِرِينَ

suras.text: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.
suras.translation: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.
suras.arabic: وَأَدْخَلْنَـٰهُمْ فِى رَحْمَتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّهُم مِّنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: And [mention] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers."
suras.translation: And [mention] the man of the fish, when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers."
suras.arabic: وَذَا ٱلنُّونِ إِذ ذَّهَبَ مُغَـٰضِبًا فَظَنَّ أَن لَّن نَّقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ فَنَادَىٰ فِى ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ أَن لَّآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّآ أَنتَ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ إِنِّى كُنتُ مِنَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ
