suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُحْشَرُونَ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ إِلَىٰ جَهَنَّمَ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ شَرٌّ مَّكَانًا وَأَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا

suras.text: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant.
suras.translation: And We had certainly given Moses the Scripture and appointed with him his brother Aaron as an assistant.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا مُوسَى ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَجَعَلْنَا مَعَهُۥٓ أَخَاهُ هَـٰرُونَ وَزِيرًا

suras.text: And they have already come upon the town which was showered with a rain of evil. So have they not seen it? But they are not expecting resurrection.
suras.translation: And they have already come upon the town which was showered with a rain of evil. So have they not seen it? But they are not expecting resurrection.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَتَوْا۟ عَلَى ٱلْقَرْيَةِ ٱلَّتِىٓ أُمْطِرَتْ مَطَرَ ٱلسَّوْءِ ۚ أَفَلَمْ يَكُونُوا۟ يَرَوْنَهَا ۚ بَلْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ نُشُورًا

suras.text: Have you seen the one who takes as his god his own desire? Then would you be responsible for him?
suras.translation: Have you seen the one who takes as his god his own desire? Then would you be responsible for him?
suras.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ مَنِ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَـٰهَهُۥ هَوَىٰهُ أَفَأَنتَ تَكُونُ عَلَيْهِ وَكِيلًا

suras.text: Or do you think that most of them hear or reason? They are not except like livestock. Rather, they are [even] more astray in [their] way.
suras.translation: Or do you think that most of them hear or reason? They are not except like livestock. Rather, they are [even] more astray in [their] way.
suras.arabic: أَمْ تَحْسَبُ أَنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ يَسْمَعُونَ أَوْ يَعْقِلُونَ ۚ إِنْ هُمْ إِلَّا كَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ ۖ بَلْ هُمْ أَضَلُّ سَبِيلًا

suras.text: Then We hold it in hand for a brief grasp.
suras.translation: Then We hold it in hand for a brief grasp.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ قَبَضْنَـٰهُ إِلَيْنَا قَبْضًا يَسِيرًا

suras.text: And it is He who has made the night for you as clothing and sleep [a means for] rest and has made the day a resurrection.
suras.translation: And it is He who has made the night for you as clothing and sleep [a means for] rest and has made the day a resurrection.
suras.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا وَٱلنَّوْمَ سُبَاتًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ نُشُورًا

suras.text: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy, and We send down from the sky pure water
suras.translation: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy, and We send down from the sky pure water
suras.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦ ۚ وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ مَآءً طَهُورًا

suras.text: That We may bring to life thereby a dead land and give it as drink to those We created of numerous livestock and men.
suras.translation: That We may bring to life thereby a dead land and give it as drink to those We created of numerous livestock and men.
suras.arabic: لِّنُحْـِۧىَ بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا وَنُسْقِيَهُۥ مِمَّا خَلَقْنَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا وَأَنَاسِىَّ كَثِيرًا

suras.text: And if We had willed, We could have sent into every city a warner.
suras.translation: And if We had willed, We could have sent into every city a warner.
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ شِئْنَا لَبَعَثْنَا فِى كُلِّ قَرْيَةٍ نَّذِيرًا

suras.text: And it is He who has released [simultaneously] the two seas, one fresh and sweet and one salty and bitter, and He placed between them a barrier and prohibiting partition.
suras.translation: And it is He who has released [simultaneously] the two seas, one fresh and sweet and one salty and bitter, and He placed between them a barrier and prohibiting partition.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ هَـٰذَا عَذْبٌ فُرَاتٌ وَهَـٰذَا مِلْحٌ أُجَاجٌ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخًا وَحِجْرًا مَّحْجُورًا

suras.text: But they worship rather than Allah that which does not benefit them or harm them, and the disbeliever is ever, against his Lord, an assistant [to Satan].
suras.translation: But they worship rather than Allah that which does not benefit them or harm them, and the disbeliever is ever, against his Lord, an assistant [to Satan].
suras.arabic: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا يَنفَعُهُمْ وَلَا يَضُرُّهُمْ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱلْكَافِرُ عَلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ ظَهِيرًا

suras.text: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
suras.translation: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad], except as a bringer of good tidings and a warner.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا مُبَشِّرًا وَنَذِيرًا

suras.text: Say, "I do not ask of you for it any payment - only that whoever wills might take to his Lord a way."
suras.translation: Say, "I do not ask of you for it any payment - only that whoever wills might take to his Lord a way."
suras.arabic: قُلْ مَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ أَن يَتَّخِذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا

suras.text: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allah] with His praise. And sufficient is He to be, with the sins of His servants, Acquainted -
suras.translation: And rely upon the Ever-Living who does not die, and exalt [Allah] with His praise. And sufficient is He to be, with the sins of His servants, Acquainted -
suras.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْحَىِّ ٱلَّذِى لَا يَمُوتُ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِهِۦ ۚ وَكَفَىٰ بِهِۦ بِذُنُوبِ عِبَادِهِۦ خَبِيرًا

suras.text: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed.
suras.translation: He who created the heavens and the earth and what is between them in six days and then established Himself above the Throne - the Most Merciful, so ask about Him one well informed.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ ۚ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ فَسْـَٔلْ بِهِۦ خَبِيرًا

suras.text: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon.
suras.translation: Blessed is He who has placed in the sky great stars and placed therein a [burning] lamp and luminous moon.
suras.arabic: تَبَارَكَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ بُرُوجًا وَجَعَلَ فِيهَا سِرَٰجًا وَقَمَرًا مُّنِيرًا

suras.text: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude.
suras.translation: And it is He who has made the night and the day in succession for whoever desires to remember or desires gratitude.
suras.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ ٱلَّيْلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَ خِلْفَةً لِّمَنْ أَرَادَ أَن يَذَّكَّرَ أَوْ أَرَادَ شُكُورًا

suras.text: And those who spend [part of] the night to their Lord prostrating and standing [in prayer]
suras.translation: And those who spend [part of] the night to their Lord prostrating and standing [in prayer]
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَبِيتُونَ لِرَبِّهِمْ سُجَّدًا وَقِيَـٰمًا

suras.text: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence."
suras.translation: Indeed, it is evil as a settlement and residence."
suras.arabic: إِنَّهَا سَآءَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا

suras.text: And [they are] those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, [justly] moderate
suras.translation: And [they are] those who, when they spend, do so not excessively or sparingly but are ever, between that, [justly] moderate
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَآ أَنفَقُوا۟ لَمْ يُسْرِفُوا۟ وَلَمْ يَقْتُرُوا۟ وَكَانَ بَيْنَ ذَٰلِكَ قَوَامًا

suras.text: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: Except for those who repent, believe and do righteous work. For them Allah will replace their evil deeds with good. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَابَ وَءَامَنَ وَعَمِلَ عَمَلًا صَـٰلِحًا فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُبَدِّلُ ٱللَّهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِمْ حَسَنَـٰتٍ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًا

suras.text: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allah with [accepted] repentance.
suras.translation: And he who repents and does righteousness does indeed turn to Allah with [accepted] repentance.
suras.arabic: وَمَن تَابَ وَعَمِلَ صَـٰلِحًا فَإِنَّهُۥ يَتُوبُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ مَتَابًا

suras.text: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind.
suras.translation: And those who, when reminded of the verses of their Lord, do not fall upon them deaf and blind.
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ذُكِّرُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ لَمْ يَخِرُّوا۟ عَلَيْهَا صُمًّا وَعُمْيَانًا

suras.text: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous."
suras.translation: And those who say, "Our Lord, grant us from among our wives and offspring comfort to our eyes and make us an example for the righteous."
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِنَا وَذُرِّيَّـٰتِنَا قُرَّةَ أَعْيُنٍ وَٱجْعَلْنَا لِلْمُتَّقِينَ إِمَامًا

suras.text: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and [words of] peace.
suras.translation: Those will be awarded the Chamber for what they patiently endured, and they will be received therein with greetings and [words of] peace.
suras.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ يُجْزَوْنَ ٱلْغُرْفَةَ بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ وَيُلَقَّوْنَ فِيهَا تَحِيَّةً وَسَلَـٰمًا

suras.text: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence.
suras.translation: Abiding eternally therein. Good is the settlement and residence.
suras.arabic: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَا ۚ حَسُنَتْ مُسْتَقَرًّا وَمُقَامًا

suras.text: These are the verses of the clear Book.
suras.translation: These are the verses of the clear Book.
suras.arabic: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ

suras.text: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.
suras.translation: Perhaps, [O Muhammad], you would kill yourself with grief that they will not be believers.
suras.arabic: لَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌ نَّفْسَكَ أَلَّا يَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.
suras.translation: If We willed, We could send down to them from the sky a sign for which their necks would remain humbled.
suras.arabic: إِن نَّشَأْ نُنَزِّلْ عَلَيْهِم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ءَايَةً فَظَلَّتْ أَعْنَـٰقُهُمْ لَهَا خَـٰضِعِينَ

suras.text: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.
suras.translation: And no revelation comes to them anew from the Most Merciful except that they turn away from it.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن ذِكْرٍ مِّنَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مُحْدَثٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهُ مُعْرِضِينَ

suras.text: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.
suras.translation: For they have already denied, but there will come to them the news of that which they used to ridicule.
suras.arabic: فَقَدْ كَذَّبُوا۟ فَسَيَأْتِيهِمْ أَنۢبَـٰٓؤُا۟ مَا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ

suras.text: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?
suras.translation: Did they not look at the earth - how much We have produced therein from every noble kind?
suras.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَمْ أَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍ كَرِيمٍ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
suras.translation: And [mention] when your Lord called Moses, [saying], "Go to the wrongdoing people -
suras.arabic: وَإِذْ نَادَىٰ رَبُّكَ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنِ ٱئْتِ ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I fear that they will deny me
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ

suras.text: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."
suras.translation: And they have upon me a [claim due to] sin, so I fear that they will kill me."
suras.arabic: وَلَهُمْ عَلَىَّ ذَنۢبٌ فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "No. Go both of you with Our signs; indeed, We are with you, listening.
suras.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّا ۖ فَٱذْهَبَا بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ ۖ إِنَّا مَعَكُم مُّسْتَمِعُونَ

suras.text: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
suras.translation: And [then] you did your deed which you did, and you were of the ungrateful."
suras.arabic: وَفَعَلْتَ فَعْلَتَكَ ٱلَّتِى فَعَلْتَ وَأَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray.
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "I did it, then, while I was of those astray.
suras.arabic: قَالَ فَعَلْتُهَآ إِذًا وَأَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

suras.text: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.
suras.translation: So I fled from you when I feared you. Then my Lord granted me wisdom and prophethood and appointed me [as one] of the messengers.
suras.arabic: فَفَرَرْتُ مِنكُمْ لَمَّا خِفْتُكُمْ فَوَهَبَ لِى رَبِّى حُكْمًا وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "The Lord of the heavens and earth and that between them, if you should be convinced."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "Your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "Lord of the east and the west and that between them, if you were to reason."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest?"
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "Even if I brought you proof manifest?"
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَوَلَوْ جِئْتُكَ بِشَىْءٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.
suras.translation: So [Moses] threw his staff, and suddenly it was a serpent manifest.
suras.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ ثُعْبَانٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.
suras.translation: And he drew out his hand; thereupon it was white for the observers.
suras.arabic: وَنَزَعَ يَدَهُۥ فَإِذَا هِىَ بَيْضَآءُ لِلنَّـٰظِرِينَ

suras.text: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"
suras.translation: He wants to drive you out of your land by his magic, so what do you advise?"
suras.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَن يُخْرِجَكُم مِّنْ أَرْضِكُم بِسِحْرِهِۦ فَمَاذَا تَأْمُرُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
suras.translation: They said, "Postpone [the matter of] him and his brother and send among the cities gatherers
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ أَرْجِهْ وَأَخَاهُ وَٱبْعَثْ فِى ٱلْمَدَآئِنِ حَـٰشِرِينَ

suras.text: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."
suras.translation: Who will bring you every learned, skilled magician."
suras.arabic: يَأْتُوكَ بِكُلِّ سَحَّارٍ عَلِيمٍ

suras.text: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.
suras.translation: So the magicians were assembled for the appointment of a well-known day.
suras.arabic: فَجُمِعَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ لِمِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ

suras.text: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate
suras.translation: And it was said to the people, "Will you congregate
suras.arabic: وَقِيلَ لِلنَّاسِ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّجْتَمِعُونَ

suras.text: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant?"
suras.translation: That we might follow the magicians if they are the predominant?"
suras.arabic: لَعَلَّنَا نَتَّبِعُ ٱلسَّحَرَةَ إِن كَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ

suras.text: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]."
suras.translation: He said, "Yes, and indeed, you will then be of those near [to me]."
suras.arabic: قَالَ نَعَمْ وَإِنَّكُمْ إِذًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ

suras.text: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified.
suras.translation: Then Moses threw his staff, and at once it devoured what they falsified.
suras.arabic: فَأَلْقَىٰ مُوسَىٰ عَصَاهُ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَلْقَفُ مَا يَأْفِكُونَ

suras.text: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah].
suras.translation: So the magicians fell down in prostration [to Allah].
suras.arabic: فَأُلْقِىَ ٱلسَّحَرَةُ سَـٰجِدِينَ

suras.text: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,
suras.translation: They said, "We have believed in the Lord of the worlds,
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
suras.translation: They said, "No harm. Indeed, to our Lord we will return.
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَا ضَيْرَ ۖ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا مُنقَلِبُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers."
suras.translation: Indeed, we aspire that our Lord will forgive us our sins because we were the first of the believers."
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَطْمَعُ أَن يَغْفِرَ لَنَا رَبُّنَا خَطَـٰيَـٰنَآ أَن كُنَّآ أَوَّلَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued."
suras.translation: And We inspired to Moses, "Travel by night with My servants; indeed, you will be pursued."
suras.arabic: ۞ وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَسْرِ بِعِبَادِىٓ إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ

suras.text: [And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band,
suras.translation: [And said], "Indeed, those are but a small band,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَشِرْذِمَةٌ قَلِيلُونَ

suras.text: And indeed, they are enraging us,
suras.translation: And indeed, they are enraging us,
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُمْ لَنَا لَغَآئِظُونَ

suras.text: And indeed, we are a cautious society... "
suras.translation: And indeed, we are a cautious society... "
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَجَمِيعٌ حَـٰذِرُونَ

suras.text: So We removed them from gardens and springs
suras.translation: So We removed them from gardens and springs
suras.arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَـٰهُم مِّن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ

suras.text: And treasures and honorable station -
suras.translation: And treasures and honorable station -
suras.arabic: وَكُنُوزٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ

suras.text: So they pursued them at sunrise.
suras.translation: So they pursued them at sunrise.
suras.arabic: فَأَتْبَعُوهُم مُّشْرِقِينَ

suras.text: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me."
suras.translation: [Moses] said, "No! Indeed, with me is my Lord; He will guide me."
suras.arabic: قَالَ كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّ مَعِىَ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ

suras.text: And We advanced thereto the pursuers.
suras.translation: And We advanced thereto the pursuers.
suras.arabic: وَأَزْلَفْنَا ثَمَّ ٱلْـَٔاخَرِينَ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: And recite to them the news of Abraham,
suras.translation: And recite to them the news of Abraham,
suras.arabic: وَٱتْلُ عَلَيْهِمْ نَبَأَ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ

suras.text: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted."
suras.translation: They said, "We worship idols and remain to them devoted."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَعْبُدُ أَصْنَامًا فَنَظَلُّ لَهَا عَـٰكِفِينَ

suras.text: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate?
suras.translation: He said, "Do they hear you when you supplicate?
suras.arabic: قَالَ هَلْ يَسْمَعُونَكُمْ إِذْ تَدْعُونَ

suras.text: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm?"
suras.translation: Or do they benefit you, or do they harm?"
suras.arabic: أَوْ يَنفَعُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَضُرُّونَ

suras.text: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus."
suras.translation: They said, "But we found our fathers doing thus."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلْ وَجَدْنَآ ءَابَآءَنَا كَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping,
suras.translation: He said, "Then do you see what you have been worshipping,
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ

suras.text: You and your ancient forefathers?
suras.translation: You and your ancient forefathers?
suras.arabic: أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُمُ ٱلْأَقْدَمُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds,
suras.translation: Indeed, they are enemies to me, except the Lord of the worlds,
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ عَدُوٌّ لِّىٓ إِلَّا رَبَّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me.
suras.translation: Who created me, and He [it is who] guides me.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَنِى فَهُوَ يَهْدِينِ

suras.text: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink.
suras.translation: And it is He who feeds me and gives me drink.
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِى هُوَ يُطْعِمُنِى وَيَسْقِينِ

suras.text: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life
suras.translation: And who will cause me to die and then bring me to life
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِى يُمِيتُنِى ثُمَّ يُحْيِينِ

suras.text: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous.
suras.translation: [And he said], "My Lord, grant me authority and join me with the righteous.
suras.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى حُكْمًا وَأَلْحِقْنِى بِٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations.
suras.translation: And grant me a reputation of honor among later generations.
suras.arabic: وَٱجْعَل لِّى لِسَانَ صِدْقٍ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure.
suras.translation: And place me among the inheritors of the Garden of Pleasure.
suras.arabic: وَٱجْعَلْنِى مِن وَرَثَةِ جَنَّةِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

suras.text: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray.
suras.translation: And forgive my father. Indeed, he has been of those astray.
suras.arabic: وَٱغْفِرْ لِأَبِىٓ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

suras.text: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart."
suras.translation: But only one who comes to Allah with a sound heart."
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ أَتَى ٱللَّهَ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ

suras.text: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous.
suras.translation: And Paradise will be brought near [that Day] to the righteous.
suras.arabic: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ

suras.text: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators,
suras.translation: And Hellfire will be brought forth for the deviators,
suras.arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِلْغَاوِينَ

suras.text: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
suras.translation: And it will be said to them, "Where are those you used to worship
suras.arabic: وَقِيلَ لَهُمْ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْبُدُونَ

suras.text: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?"
suras.translation: Other than Allah? Can they help you or help themselves?"
suras.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ هَلْ يَنصُرُونَكُمْ أَوْ يَنتَصِرُونَ

suras.text: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
suras.translation: So they will be overturned into Hellfire, they and the deviators
suras.arabic: فَكُبْكِبُوا۟ فِيهَا هُمْ وَٱلْغَاوُۥنَ

suras.text: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together.
suras.translation: And the soldiers of Iblees, all together.
suras.arabic: وَجُنُودُ إِبْلِيسَ أَجْمَعُونَ

suras.text: They will say while they dispute therein,
suras.translation: They will say while they dispute therein,
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ وَهُمْ فِيهَا يَخْتَصِمُونَ

suras.text: "By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
suras.translation: "By Allah, we were indeed in manifest error
suras.arabic: تَٱللَّهِ إِن كُنَّا لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: When we equated you with the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: إِذْ نُسَوِّيكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: And no one misguided us except the criminals.
suras.translation: And no one misguided us except the criminals.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَضَلَّنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

suras.text: So now we have no intercessors
suras.translation: So now we have no intercessors
suras.arabic: فَمَا لَنَا مِن شَـٰفِعِينَ

suras.text: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers... "
suras.translation: Then if we only had a return [to the world] and could be of the believers... "
suras.arabic: فَلَوْ أَنَّ لَنَا كَرَّةً فَنَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]?"
suras.translation: They said, "Should we believe you while you are followed by the lowest [class of people]?"
suras.arabic: ۞ قَالُوٓا۟ أَنُؤْمِنُ لَكَ وَٱتَّبَعَكَ ٱلْأَرْذَلُونَ

suras.text: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do?
suras.translation: He said, "And what is my knowledge of what they used to do?
suras.arabic: قَالَ وَمَا عِلْمِى بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive.
suras.translation: Their account is only upon my Lord, if you [could] perceive.
suras.arabic: إِنْ حِسَابُهُمْ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّى ۖ لَوْ تَشْعُرُونَ

suras.text: And I am not one to drive away the believers.
suras.translation: And I am not one to drive away the believers.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِطَارِدِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned."
suras.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Noah, you will surely be of those who are stoned."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰنُوحُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمَرْجُومِينَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed my people have denied me.
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنَّ قَوْمِى كَذَّبُونِ

suras.text: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones.
suras.translation: Then We drowned thereafter the remaining ones.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَغْرَقْنَا بَعْدُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves,
suras.translation: Do you construct on every elevation a sign, amusing yourselves,
suras.arabic: أَتَبْنُونَ بِكُلِّ رِيعٍ ءَايَةً تَعْبَثُونَ

suras.text: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally?
suras.translation: And take for yourselves palaces and fortresses that you might abide eternally?
suras.arabic: وَتَتَّخِذُونَ مَصَانِعَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَخْلُدُونَ

suras.text: And fear He who provided you with that which you know,
suras.translation: And fear He who provided you with that which you know,
suras.arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَمَدَّكُم بِمَا تَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: Provided you with grazing livestock and children
suras.translation: Provided you with grazing livestock and children
suras.arabic: أَمَدَّكُم بِأَنْعَـٰمٍ وَبَنِينَ

suras.text: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors.
suras.translation: They said, "It is all the same to us whether you advise or are not of the advisors.
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْنَآ أَوَعَظْتَ أَمْ لَمْ تَكُن مِّنَ ٱلْوَٰعِظِينَ

suras.text: This is not but the custom of the former peoples,
suras.translation: This is not but the custom of the former peoples,
suras.arabic: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا خُلُقُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: And we are not to be punished."
suras.translation: And we are not to be punished."
suras.arabic: وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
suras.translation: When their brother Salih said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
suras.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ أَخُوهُمْ صَـٰلِحٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death],
suras.translation: Will you be left in what is here, secure [from death],
suras.arabic: أَتُتْرَكُونَ فِى مَا هَـٰهُنَآ ءَامِنِينَ

suras.text: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit?
suras.translation: And fields of crops and palm trees with softened fruit?
suras.arabic: وَزُرُوعٍ وَنَخْلٍ طَلْعُهَا هَضِيمٌ

suras.text: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill.
suras.translation: And you carve out of the mountains, homes, with skill.
suras.arabic: وَتَنْحِتُونَ مِنَ ٱلْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا فَـٰرِهِينَ

suras.text: And do not obey the order of the transgressors,
suras.translation: And do not obey the order of the transgressors,
suras.arabic: وَلَا تُطِيعُوٓا۟ أَمْرَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ

suras.text: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend."
suras.translation: Who cause corruption in the land and do not amend."
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُفْسِدُونَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَا يُصْلِحُونَ

suras.text: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
suras.translation: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ

suras.text: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful."
suras.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, so bring a sign, if you should be of the truthful."
suras.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا فَأْتِ بِـَٔايَةٍ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day.
suras.translation: He said, "This is a she-camel. For her is a [time of] drink, and for you is a [time of] drink, [each] on a known day.
suras.arabic: قَالَ هَـٰذِهِۦ نَاقَةٌ لَّهَا شِرْبٌ وَلَكُمْ شِرْبُ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ

suras.text: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful.
suras.translation: But they hamstrung her and so became regretful.
suras.arabic: فَعَقَرُوهَا فَأَصْبَحُوا۟ نَـٰدِمِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing."
suras.translation: And leave what your Lord has created for you as mates? But you are a people transgressing."
suras.arabic: وَتَذَرُونَ مَا خَلَقَ لَكُمْ رَبُّكُم مِّنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ عَادُونَ

suras.text: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted."
suras.translation: They said, "If you do not desist, O Lot, you will surely be of those evicted."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَئِن لَّمْ تَنتَهِ يَـٰلُوطُ لَتَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْرَجِينَ

suras.text: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it].
suras.translation: He said, "Indeed, I am, toward your deed, of those who detest [it].
suras.arabic: قَالَ إِنِّى لِعَمَلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلْقَالِينَ

suras.text: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do."
suras.translation: My Lord, save me and my family from [the consequence of] what they do."
suras.arabic: رَبِّ نَجِّنِى وَأَهْلِى مِمَّا يَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Except an old woman among those who remained behind.
suras.translation: Except an old woman among those who remained behind.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا عَجُوزًا فِى ٱلْغَـٰبِرِينَ

suras.text: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.
suras.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.
suras.arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: When Shu\'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
suras.translation: When Shu\'ayb said to them, "Will you not fear Allah?
suras.arabic: إِذْ قَالَ لَهُمْ شُعَيْبٌ أَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.translation: Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And I do not ask you for it any payment. My payment is only from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ أَجْرٍ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَىٰ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss.
suras.translation: Give full measure and do not be of those who cause loss.
suras.arabic: ۞ أَوْفُوا۟ ٱلْكَيْلَ وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلْمُخْسِرِينَ

suras.text: And weigh with an even balance.
suras.translation: And weigh with an even balance.
suras.arabic: وَزِنُوا۟ بِٱلْقِسْطَاسِ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمِ

suras.text: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption.
suras.translation: And do not deprive people of their due and do not commit abuse on earth, spreading corruption.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَبْخَسُوا۟ ٱلنَّاسَ أَشْيَآءَهُمْ وَلَا تَعْثَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُفْسِدِينَ

suras.text: And fear He who created you and the former creation."
suras.translation: And fear He who created you and the former creation."
suras.arabic: وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ وَٱلْجِبِلَّةَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
suras.translation: They said, "You are only of those affected by magic.
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَحَّرِينَ

suras.text: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars.
suras.translation: You are but a man like ourselves, and indeed, we think you are among the liars.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَإِن نَّظُنُّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ

suras.text: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful."
suras.translation: So cause to fall upon us fragments of the sky, if you should be of the truthful."
suras.arabic: فَأَسْقِطْ عَلَيْنَا كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ إِن كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do."
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord is most knowing of what you do."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّىٓ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a sign, but most of them were not to be believers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً ۖ وَمَا كَانَ أَكْثَرُهُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord - He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: And indeed, the Qur\'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And indeed, the Qur\'an is the revelation of the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَنزِيلُ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down
suras.translation: The Trustworthy Spirit has brought it down
suras.arabic: نَزَلَ بِهِ ٱلرُّوحُ ٱلْأَمِينُ

suras.text: Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners -
suras.translation: Upon your heart, [O Muhammad] - that you may be of the warners -
suras.arabic: عَلَىٰ قَلْبِكَ لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples.
suras.translation: And indeed, it is [mentioned] in the scriptures of former peoples.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَفِى زُبُرِ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners
suras.translation: And even if We had revealed it to one among the foreigners
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ نَزَّلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ بَعْضِ ٱلْأَعْجَمِينَ

suras.text: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it.
suras.translation: And he had recited it to them [perfectly], they would [still] not have been believers in it.
suras.arabic: فَقَرَأَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ مُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not.
suras.translation: And it will come to them suddenly while they perceive [it] not.
suras.arabic: فَيَأْتِيَهُم بَغْتَةً وَهُمْ لَا يَشْعُرُونَ

suras.text: And they will say, "May we be reprieved?"
suras.translation: And they will say, "May we be reprieved?"
suras.arabic: فَيَقُولُوا۟ هَلْ نَحْنُ مُنظَرُونَ

suras.text: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
suras.translation: Then have you considered if We gave them enjoyment for years
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ إِن مَّتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ سِنِينَ

suras.text: And then there came to them that which they were promised?
suras.translation: And then there came to them that which they were promised?
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ جَآءَهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided.
suras.translation: They would not be availed by the enjoyment with which they were provided.
suras.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يُمَتَّعُونَ

suras.text: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust.
suras.translation: As a reminder; and never have We been unjust.
suras.arabic: ذِكْرَىٰ وَمَا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: And the devils have not brought the revelation down.
suras.translation: And the devils have not brought the revelation down.
suras.arabic: وَمَا تَنَزَّلَتْ بِهِ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ

suras.text: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able.
suras.translation: It is not allowable for them, nor would they be able.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُمْ وَمَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ

suras.text: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed.
suras.translation: Indeed they, from [its] hearing, are removed.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّمْعِ لَمَعْزُولُونَ

suras.text: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished.
suras.translation: So do not invoke with Allah another deity and [thus] be among the punished.
suras.arabic: فَلَا تَدْعُ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ فَتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُعَذَّبِينَ

suras.text: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred.
suras.translation: And warn, [O Muhammad], your closest kindred.
suras.arabic: وَأَنذِرْ عَشِيرَتَكَ ٱلْأَقْرَبِينَ

suras.text: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers.
suras.translation: And lower your wing to those who follow you of the believers.
suras.arabic: وَٱخْفِضْ جَنَاحَكَ لِمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing."
suras.translation: And if they disobey you, then say, "Indeed, I am disassociated from what you are doing."
suras.arabic: فَإِنْ عَصَوْكَ فَقُلْ إِنِّى بَرِىٓءٌ مِّمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
suras.translation: And rely upon the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
suras.arabic: وَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ

suras.text: And your movement among those who prostrate.
suras.translation: And your movement among those who prostrate.
suras.arabic: وَتَقَلُّبَكَ فِى ٱلسَّـٰجِدِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
suras.translation: Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

suras.text: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
suras.translation: Shall I inform you upon whom the devils descend?
suras.arabic: هَلْ أُنَبِّئُكُمْ عَلَىٰ مَن تَنَزَّلُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينُ

suras.text: They descend upon every sinful liar.
suras.translation: They descend upon every sinful liar.
suras.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ أَفَّاكٍ أَثِيمٍ

suras.text: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars.
suras.translation: They pass on what is heard, and most of them are liars.
suras.arabic: يُلْقُونَ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَأَكْثَرُهُمْ كَـٰذِبُونَ

suras.text: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them;
suras.translation: And the poets - [only] the deviators follow them;
suras.arabic: وَٱلشُّعَرَآءُ يَتَّبِعُهُمُ ٱلْغَاوُۥنَ

suras.text: And that they say what they do not do? -
suras.translation: And that they say what they do not do? -
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ مَا لَا يَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned.
suras.translation: Except those [poets] who believe and do righteous deeds and remember Allah often and defend [the Muslims] after they were wronged. And those who have wronged are going to know to what [kind of] return they will be returned.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَذَكَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ كَثِيرًا وَٱنتَصَرُوا۟ مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا ظُلِمُوا۟ ۗ وَسَيَعْلَمُ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَىَّ مُنقَلَبٍ يَنقَلِبُونَ

suras.text: Ta, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur\'an and a clear Book
suras.translation: Ta, Seen. These are the verses of the Qur\'an and a clear Book
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ طسٓ ۚ تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْقُرْءَانِ وَكِتَابٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: As guidance and good tidings for the believers
suras.translation: As guidance and good tidings for the believers
suras.arabic: هُدًى وَبُشْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].
suras.translation: Who establish prayer and give zakah, and of the Hereafter they are certain [in faith].
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يُقِيمُونَ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُونَ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَهُم بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ هُمْ يُوقِنُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.
suras.translation: Indeed, for those who do not believe in the Hereafter, We have made pleasing to them their deeds, so they wander blindly.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ زَيَّنَّا لَهُمْ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَهُمْ يَعْمَهُونَ

suras.text: And indeed, [O Muhammad], you receive the Qur\'an from one Wise and Knowing.
suras.translation: And indeed, [O Muhammad], you receive the Qur\'an from one Wise and Knowing.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَتُلَقَّى ٱلْقُرْءَانَ مِن لَّدُنْ حَكِيمٍ عَلِيمٍ

suras.text: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allah, Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: But when he came to it, he was called, "Blessed is whoever is at the fire and whoever is around it. And exalted is Allah, Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَهَا نُودِىَ أَنۢ بُورِكَ مَن فِى ٱلنَّارِ وَمَنْ حَوْلَهَا وَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ رَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
suras.translation: O Moses, indeed it is I - Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
suras.arabic: يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّهُۥٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allah said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.
suras.translation: And [he was told], "Throw down your staff." But when he saw it writhing as if it were a snake, he turned in flight and did not return. [Allah said], "O Moses, fear not. Indeed, in My presence the messengers do not fear.
suras.arabic: وَأَلْقِ عَصَاكَ ۚ فَلَمَّا رَءَاهَا تَهْتَزُّ كَأَنَّهَا جَآنٌّ وَلَّىٰ مُدْبِرًا وَلَمْ يُعَقِّبْ ۚ يَـٰمُوسَىٰ لَا تَخَفْ إِنِّى لَا يَخَافُ لَدَىَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: Otherwise, he who wrongs, then substitutes good after evil - indeed, I am Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَن ظَلَمَ ثُمَّ بَدَّلَ حُسْنًۢا بَعْدَ سُوٓءٍ فَإِنِّى غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."
suras.translation: But when there came to them Our visible signs, they said, "This is obvious magic."
suras.arabic: فَلَمَّا جَآءَتْهُمْ ءَايَـٰتُنَا مُبْصِرَةً قَالُوا۟ هَـٰذَا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allah, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."
suras.translation: And We had certainly given to David and Solomon knowledge, and they said, "Praise [is due] to Allah, who has favored us over many of His believing servants."
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ وَسُلَيْمَـٰنَ عِلْمًا ۖ وَقَالَا ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى فَضَّلَنَا عَلَىٰ كَثِيرٍ مِّنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty."
suras.translation: And Solomon inherited David. He said, "O people, we have been taught the language of birds, and we have been given from all things. Indeed, this is evident bounty."
suras.arabic: وَوَرِثَ سُلَيْمَـٰنُ دَاوُۥدَ ۖ وَقَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ عُلِّمْنَا مَنطِقَ ٱلطَّيْرِ وَأُوتِينَا مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ ۖ إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْمُبِينُ

suras.text: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows.
suras.translation: And gathered for Solomon were his soldiers of the jinn and men and birds, and they were [marching] in rows.
suras.arabic: وَحُشِرَ لِسُلَيْمَـٰنَ جُنُودُهُۥ مِنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ وَٱلطَّيْرِ فَهُمْ يُوزَعُونَ

suras.text: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."
suras.translation: So [Solomon] smiled, amused at her speech, and said, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to do righteousness of which You approve. And admit me by Your mercy into [the ranks of] Your righteous servants."
suras.arabic: فَتَبَسَّمَ ضَاحِكًا مِّن قَوْلِهَا وَقَالَ رَبِّ أَوْزِعْنِىٓ أَنْ أَشْكُرَ نِعْمَتَكَ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ وَعَلَىٰ وَٰلِدَىَّ وَأَنْ أَعْمَلَ صَـٰلِحًا تَرْضَىٰهُ وَأَدْخِلْنِى بِرَحْمَتِكَ فِى عِبَادِكَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent?
suras.translation: And he took attendance of the birds and said, "Why do I not see the hoopoe - or is he among the absent?
suras.arabic: وَتَفَقَّدَ ٱلطَّيْرَ فَقَالَ مَا لِىَ لَآ أَرَى ٱلْهُدْهُدَ أَمْ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْغَآئِبِينَ

suras.text: But the hoopoe stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.
suras.translation: But the hoopoe stayed not long and said, "I have encompassed [in knowledge] that which you have not encompassed, and I have come to you from Sheba with certain news.
suras.arabic: فَمَكَثَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ فَقَالَ أَحَطتُ بِمَا لَمْ تُحِطْ بِهِۦ وَجِئْتُكَ مِن سَبَإٍۭ بِنَبَإٍ يَقِينٍ

suras.text: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.
suras.translation: Indeed, I found [there] a woman ruling them, and she has been given of all things, and she has a great throne.
suras.arabic: إِنِّى وَجَدتُّ ٱمْرَأَةً تَمْلِكُهُمْ وَأُوتِيَتْ مِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَلَهَا عَرْشٌ عَظِيمٌ

suras.text: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allah, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,
suras.translation: I found her and her people prostrating to the sun instead of Allah, and Satan has made their deeds pleasing to them and averted them from [His] way, so they are not guided,
suras.arabic: وَجَدتُّهَا وَقَوْمَهَا يَسْجُدُونَ لِلشَّمْسِ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَزَيَّنَ لَهُمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ فَصَدَّهُمْ عَنِ ٱلسَّبِيلِ فَهُمْ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ

suras.text: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allah, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -
suras.translation: [And] so they do not prostrate to Allah, who brings forth what is hidden within the heavens and the earth and knows what you conceal and what you declare -
suras.arabic: أَلَّا يَسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى يُخْرِجُ ٱلْخَبْءَ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَيَعْلَمُ مَا تُخْفُونَ وَمَا تُعْلِنُونَ

suras.text: Allah - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."
suras.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Great Throne."
suras.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ ۩

suras.text: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars.
suras.translation: [Solomon] said, "We will see whether you were truthful or were of the liars.
suras.arabic: ۞ قَالَ سَنَنظُرُ أَصَدَقْتَ أَمْ كُنتَ مِنَ ٱلْكَـٰذِبِينَ

suras.text: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."
suras.translation: Take this letter of mine and deliver it to them. Then leave them and see what [answer] they will return."
suras.arabic: ٱذْهَب بِّكِتَـٰبِى هَـٰذَا فَأَلْقِهْ إِلَيْهِمْ ثُمَّ تَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَٱنظُرْ مَاذَا يَرْجِعُونَ

suras.text: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter.
suras.translation: She said, "O eminent ones, indeed, to me has been delivered a noble letter.
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ إِنِّىٓ أُلْقِىَ إِلَىَّ كِتَـٰبٌ كَرِيمٌ

suras.text: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it reads: \'In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
suras.translation: Indeed, it is from Solomon, and indeed, it reads: \'In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِن سُلَيْمَـٰنَ وَإِنَّهُۥ بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ

suras.text: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims].\' "
suras.translation: Be not haughty with me but come to me in submission [as Muslims].\' "
suras.arabic: أَلَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَىَّ وَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ

suras.text: She said, "O eminent ones, advise me in my affair. I would not decide a matter until you witness [for] me."
suras.translation: She said, "O eminent ones, advise me in my affair. I would not decide a matter until you witness [for] me."
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَفْتُونِى فِىٓ أَمْرِى مَا كُنتُ قَاطِعَةً أَمْرًا حَتَّىٰ تَشْهَدُونِ

suras.text: They said, "We are men of strength and of great military might, but the command is yours, so see what you will command."
suras.translation: They said, "We are men of strength and of great military might, but the command is yours, so see what you will command."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أُو۟لُوا۟ قُوَّةٍ وَأُو۟لُوا۟ بَأْسٍ شَدِيدٍ وَٱلْأَمْرُ إِلَيْكِ فَٱنظُرِى مَاذَا تَأْمُرِينَ

suras.text: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.
suras.translation: She said, "Indeed kings - when they enter a city, they ruin it and render the honored of its people humbled. And thus do they do.
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ إِنَّ ٱلْمُلُوكَ إِذَا دَخَلُوا۟ قَرْيَةً أَفْسَدُوهَا وَجَعَلُوٓا۟ أَعِزَّةَ أَهْلِهَآ أَذِلَّةً ۖ وَكَذَٰلِكَ يَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return."
suras.translation: But indeed, I will send to them a gift and see with what [reply] the messengers will return."
suras.arabic: وَإِنِّى مُرْسِلَةٌ إِلَيْهِم بِهَدِيَّةٍ فَنَاظِرَةٌۢ بِمَ يَرْجِعُ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: Return to them, for we will surely come to them with soldiers that they will be powerless to encounter, and we will surely expel them therefrom in humiliation, and they will be debased."
suras.translation: Return to them, for we will surely come to them with soldiers that they will be powerless to encounter, and we will surely expel them therefrom in humiliation, and they will be debased."
suras.arabic: ٱرْجِعْ إِلَيْهِمْ فَلَنَأْتِيَنَّهُم بِجُنُودٍ لَّا قِبَلَ لَهُم بِهَا وَلَنُخْرِجَنَّهُم مِّنْهَآ أَذِلَّةً وَهُمْ صَـٰغِرُونَ

suras.text: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?"
suras.translation: [Solomon] said, "O assembly [of jinn], which of you will bring me her throne before they come to me in submission?"
suras.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمَلَؤُا۟ أَيُّكُمْ يَأْتِينِى بِعَرْشِهَا قَبْلَ أَن يَأْتُونِى مُسْلِمِينَ

suras.text: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy."
suras.translation: A powerful one from among the jinn said, "I will bring it to you before you rise from your place, and indeed, I am for this [task] strong and trustworthy."
suras.arabic: قَالَ عِفْرِيتٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ أَنَا۠ ءَاتِيكَ بِهِۦ قَبْلَ أَن تَقُومَ مِن مَّقَامِكَ ۖ وَإِنِّى عَلَيْهِ لَقَوِىٌّ أَمِينٌ

suras.text: He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided."
suras.translation: He said, "Disguise for her her throne; we will see whether she will be guided [to truth] or will be of those who is not guided."
suras.arabic: قَالَ نَكِّرُوا۟ لَهَا عَرْشَهَا نَنظُرْ أَتَهْتَدِىٓ أَمْ تَكُونُ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يَهْتَدُونَ

suras.text: And that which she was worshipping other than Allah had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people."
suras.translation: And that which she was worshipping other than Allah had averted her [from submission to Him]. Indeed, she was from a disbelieving people."
suras.arabic: وَصَدَّهَا مَا كَانَت تَّعْبُدُ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّهَا كَانَتْ مِن قَوْمٍ كَـٰفِرِينَ

suras.text: And We had certainly sent to Thamud their brother Salih, [saying], "Worship Allah," and at once they were two parties conflicting.
suras.translation: And We had certainly sent to Thamud their brother Salih, [saying], "Worship Allah," and at once they were two parties conflicting.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَىٰ ثَمُودَ أَخَاهُمْ صَـٰلِحًا أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَإِذَا هُمْ فَرِيقَانِ يَخْتَصِمُونَ

suras.text: They said, "We consider you a bad omen, you and those with you." He said, "Your omen is with Allah. Rather, you are a people being tested."
suras.translation: They said, "We consider you a bad omen, you and those with you." He said, "Your omen is with Allah. Rather, you are a people being tested."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱطَّيَّرْنَا بِكَ وَبِمَن مَّعَكَ ۚ قَالَ طَـٰٓئِرُكُمْ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ تُفْتَنُونَ

suras.text: So those are their houses, desolate because of the wrong they had done. Indeed in that is a sign for people who know.
suras.translation: So those are their houses, desolate because of the wrong they had done. Indeed in that is a sign for people who know.
suras.arabic: فَتِلْكَ بُيُوتُهُمْ خَاوِيَةًۢ بِمَا ظَلَمُوٓا۟ ۗ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.
suras.translation: And We rained upon them a rain [of stones], and evil was the rain of those who were warned.
suras.arabic: وَأَمْطَرْنَا عَلَيْهِم مَّطَرًا ۖ فَسَآءَ مَطَرُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "Praise be to Allah, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allah better or what they associate with Him?"
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "Praise be to Allah, and peace upon His servants whom He has chosen. Is Allah better or what they associate with Him?"
suras.arabic: قُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ وَسَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ عِبَادِهِ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَىٰٓ ۗ ءَآللَّهُ خَيْرٌ أَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

suras.text: Is He [not best] who made the earth a stable ground and placed within it rivers and made for it firmly set mountains and placed between the two seas a barrier? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but most of them do not know.
suras.translation: Is He [not best] who made the earth a stable ground and placed within it rivers and made for it firmly set mountains and placed between the two seas a barrier? Is there a deity with Allah? [No], but most of them do not know.
suras.arabic: أَمَّن جَعَلَ ٱلْأَرْضَ قَرَارًا وَجَعَلَ خِلَـٰلَهَآ أَنْهَـٰرًا وَجَعَلَ لَهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَجَعَلَ بَيْنَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ حَاجِزًا ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ بَلْ أَكْثَرُهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Little do you remember.
suras.translation: Is He [not best] who responds to the desperate one when he calls upon Him and removes evil and makes you inheritors of the earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Little do you remember.
suras.arabic: أَمَّن يُجِيبُ ٱلْمُضْطَرَّ إِذَا دَعَاهُ وَيَكْشِفُ ٱلسُّوٓءَ وَيَجْعَلُكُمْ خُلَفَآءَ ٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.translation: Is He [not best] who guides you through the darknesses of the land and sea and who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy? Is there a deity with Allah? High is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.arabic: أَمَّن يَهْدِيكُمْ فِى ظُلُمَـٰتِ ٱلْبَرِّ وَٱلْبَحْرِ وَمَن يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦٓ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ تَعَـٰلَى ٱللَّهُ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

suras.text: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful."
suras.translation: Is He [not best] who begins creation and then repeats it and who provides for you from the heaven and earth? Is there a deity with Allah? Say, "Produce your proof, if you should be truthful."
suras.arabic: أَمَّن يَبْدَؤُا۟ ٱلْخَلْقَ ثُمَّ يُعِيدُهُۥ وَمَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۗ أَءِلَـٰهٌ مَّعَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ قُلْ هَاتُوا۟ بُرْهَـٰنَكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."
suras.translation: Say, "None in the heavens and earth knows the unseen except Allah, and they do not perceive when they will be resurrected."
suras.arabic: قُل لَّا يَعْلَمُ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْغَيْبَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَمَا يَشْعُرُونَ أَيَّانَ يُبْعَثُونَ

suras.text: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.
suras.translation: Rather, their knowledge is arrested concerning the Hereafter. Rather, they are in doubt about it. Rather, they are, concerning it, blind.
suras.arabic: بَلِ ٱدَّٰرَكَ عِلْمُهُمْ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ مِّنْهَا ۖ بَلْ هُم مِّنْهَا عَمُونَ

suras.text: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."
suras.translation: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before. This is not but legends of the former peoples."
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ وُعِدْنَا هَـٰذَا نَحْنُ وَءَابَآؤُنَا مِن قَبْلُ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّآ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "Travel through the land and observe how was the end of the criminals."
suras.arabic: قُلْ سِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.
suras.translation: And grieve not over them or be in distress from what they conspire.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَحْزَنْ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا تَكُن فِى ضَيْقٍ مِّمَّا يَمْكُرُونَ

suras.text: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.translation: And they say, "When is [the fulfillment of] this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient.
suras.translation: Say, "Perhaps it is close behind you - some of that for which you are impatient.
suras.arabic: قُلْ عَسَىٰٓ أَن يَكُونَ رَدِفَ لَكُم بَعْضُ ٱلَّذِى تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ

suras.text: And indeed, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude."
suras.translation: And indeed, your Lord is full of bounty for the people, but most of them do not show gratitude."
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَذُو فَضْلٍ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَشْكُرُونَ

suras.text: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register.
suras.translation: And there is nothing concealed within the heaven and the earth except that it is in a clear Register.
suras.arabic: وَمَا مِنْ غَآئِبَةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا فِى كِتَـٰبٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: And indeed, it is guidance and mercy for the believers.
suras.translation: And indeed, it is guidance and mercy for the believers.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَهُدًى وَرَحْمَةٌ لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: So rely upon Allah; indeed, you are upon the clear truth.
suras.translation: So rely upon Allah; indeed, you are upon the clear truth.
suras.arabic: فَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنَّكَ عَلَى ٱلْحَقِّ ٱلْمُبِينِ

suras.text: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.
suras.translation: Indeed, you will not make the dead hear, nor will you make the deaf hear the call when they have turned their backs retreating.
suras.arabic: إِنَّكَ لَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَلَا تُسْمِعُ ٱلصُّمَّ ٱلدُّعَآءَ إِذَا وَلَّوْا۟ مُدْبِرِينَ

suras.text: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [submitting to Allah].
suras.translation: And you cannot guide the blind away from their error. You will only make hear those who believe in Our verses so they are Muslims [submitting to Allah].
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَنتَ بِهَـٰدِى ٱلْعُمْىِ عَن ضَلَـٰلَتِهِمْ ۖ إِن تُسْمِعُ إِلَّا مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا فَهُم مُّسْلِمُونَ

suras.text: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak.
suras.translation: And the decree will befall them for the wrong they did, and they will not [be able to] speak.
suras.arabic: وَوَقَعَ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَيْهِم بِمَا ظَلَمُوا۟ فَهُمْ لَا يَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
suras.translation: Do they not see that We made the night that they may rest therein and the day giving sight? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِيَسْكُنُوا۟ فِيهِ وَٱلنَّهَارَ مُبْصِرًا ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allah wills. And all will come to Him humbled.
suras.translation: And [warn of] the Day the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will be terrified except whom Allah wills. And all will come to Him humbled.
suras.arabic: وَيَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَفَزِعَ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ إِلَّا مَن شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَكُلٌّ أَتَوْهُ دَٰخِرِينَ

suras.text: And you see the mountains, thinking them rigid, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allah, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Acquainted with that which you do.
suras.translation: And you see the mountains, thinking them rigid, while they will pass as the passing of clouds. [It is] the work of Allah, who perfected all things. Indeed, He is Acquainted with that which you do.
suras.arabic: وَتَرَى ٱلْجِبَالَ تَحْسَبُهَا جَامِدَةً وَهِىَ تَمُرُّ مَرَّ ٱلسَّحَابِ ۚ صُنْعَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَتْقَنَ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"
suras.translation: And whoever comes with an evil deed - their faces will be overturned into the Fire, [and it will be said], "Are you recompensed except for what you used to do?"
suras.arabic: وَمَن جَآءَ بِٱلسَّيِّئَةِ فَكُبَّتْ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ هَلْ تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: [Say, O Muhammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [those who submit to Allah]
suras.translation: [Say, O Muhammad], "I have only been commanded to worship the Lord of this city, who made it sacred and to whom [belongs] all things. And I am commanded to be of the Muslims [those who submit to Allah]
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَعْبُدَ رَبَّ هَـٰذِهِ ٱلْبَلْدَةِ ٱلَّذِى حَرَّمَهَا وَلَهُۥ كُلُّ شَىْءٍ ۖ وَأُمِرْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ

suras.text: And to recite the Qur\'an." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."
suras.translation: And to recite the Qur\'an." And whoever is guided is only guided for [the benefit of] himself; and whoever strays - say, "I am only [one] of the warners."
suras.arabic: وَأَنْ أَتْلُوَا۟ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ ۖ فَمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ فَإِنَّمَا يَهْتَدِى لِنَفْسِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن ضَلَّ فَقُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ مِنَ ٱلْمُنذِرِينَ

suras.text: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do."
suras.translation: And say, "[All] praise is [due] to Allah. He will show you His signs, and you will recognize them. And your Lord is not unaware of what you do."
suras.arabic: وَقُلِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ سَيُرِيكُمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ فَتَعْرِفُونَهَا ۚ وَمَا رَبُّكَ بِغَـٰفِلٍ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: These are the verses of the clear Book.
suras.translation: These are the verses of the clear Book.
suras.arabic: تِلْكَ ءَايَـٰتُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ

suras.text: And We wanted to confer favor upon those who were oppressed in the land and make them leaders and make them inheritors
suras.translation: And We wanted to confer favor upon those who were oppressed in the land and make them leaders and make them inheritors
suras.arabic: وَنُرِيدُ أَن نَّمُنَّ عَلَى ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَنَجْعَلَهُمْ أَئِمَّةً وَنَجْعَلَهُمُ ٱلْوَٰرِثِينَ

suras.text: And We inspired to the mother of Moses, "Suckle him; but when you fear for him, cast him into the river and do not fear and do not grieve. Indeed, We will return him to you and will make him [one] of the messengers."
suras.translation: And We inspired to the mother of Moses, "Suckle him; but when you fear for him, cast him into the river and do not fear and do not grieve. Indeed, We will return him to you and will make him [one] of the messengers."
suras.arabic: وَأَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰٓ أَنْ أَرْضِعِيهِ ۖ فَإِذَا خِفْتِ عَلَيْهِ فَأَلْقِيهِ فِى ٱلْيَمِّ وَلَا تَخَافِى وَلَا تَحْزَنِىٓ ۖ إِنَّا رَآدُّوهُ إِلَيْكِ وَجَاعِلُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: And the heart of Moses\' mother became empty [of all else]. She was about to disclose [the matter concerning] him had We not bound fast her heart that she would be of the believers.
suras.translation: And the heart of Moses\' mother became empty [of all else]. She was about to disclose [the matter concerning] him had We not bound fast her heart that she would be of the believers.
suras.arabic: وَأَصْبَحَ فُؤَادُ أُمِّ مُوسَىٰ فَـٰرِغًا ۖ إِن كَادَتْ لَتُبْدِى بِهِۦ لَوْلَآ أَن رَّبَطْنَا عَلَىٰ قَلْبِهَا لِتَكُونَ مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And We had prevented from him [all] wet nurses before, so she said, "Shall I direct you to a household that will be responsible for him for you while they are to him [for his upbringing] sincere?"
suras.translation: And We had prevented from him [all] wet nurses before, so she said, "Shall I direct you to a household that will be responsible for him for you while they are to him [for his upbringing] sincere?"
suras.arabic: ۞ وَحَرَّمْنَا عَلَيْهِ ٱلْمَرَاضِعَ مِن قَبْلُ فَقَالَتْ هَلْ أَدُلُّكُمْ عَلَىٰٓ أَهْلِ بَيْتٍ يَكْفُلُونَهُۥ لَكُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُۥ نَـٰصِحُونَ

suras.text: So We restored him to his mother that she might be content and not grieve and that she would know that the promise of Allah is true. But most of the people do not know.
suras.translation: So We restored him to his mother that she might be content and not grieve and that she would know that the promise of Allah is true. But most of the people do not know.
suras.arabic: فَرَدَدْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰٓ أُمِّهِۦ كَىْ تَقَرَّ عَيْنُهَا وَلَا تَحْزَنَ وَلِتَعْلَمَ أَنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful.
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I have wronged myself, so forgive me," and He forgave him. Indeed, He is the Forgiving, the Merciful.
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى ظَلَمْتُ نَفْسِى فَٱغْفِرْ لِى فَغَفَرَ لَهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, for the favor You bestowed upon me, I will never be an assistant to the criminals."
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, for the favor You bestowed upon me, I will never be an assistant to the criminals."
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ بِمَآ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَىَّ فَلَنْ أَكُونَ ظَهِيرًا لِّلْمُجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: And a man came from the farthest end of the city, running. He said, "O Moses, indeed the eminent ones are conferring over you [intending] to kill you, so leave [the city]; indeed, I am to you of the sincere advisors."
suras.translation: And a man came from the farthest end of the city, running. He said, "O Moses, indeed the eminent ones are conferring over you [intending] to kill you, so leave [the city]; indeed, I am to you of the sincere advisors."
suras.arabic: وَجَآءَ رَجُلٌ مِّنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنَّ ٱلْمَلَأَ يَأْتَمِرُونَ بِكَ لِيَقْتُلُوكَ فَٱخْرُجْ إِنِّى لَكَ مِنَ ٱلنَّـٰصِحِينَ

suras.text: So he left it, fearful and anticipating [apprehension]. He said, "My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people."
suras.translation: So he left it, fearful and anticipating [apprehension]. He said, "My Lord, save me from the wrongdoing people."
suras.arabic: فَخَرَجَ مِنْهَا خَآئِفًا يَتَرَقَّبُ ۖ قَالَ رَبِّ نَجِّنِى مِنَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: So he watered [their flocks] for them; then he went back to the shade and said, "My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in need."
suras.translation: So he watered [their flocks] for them; then he went back to the shade and said, "My Lord, indeed I am, for whatever good You would send down to me, in need."
suras.arabic: فَسَقَىٰ لَهُمَا ثُمَّ تَوَلَّىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلظِّلِّ فَقَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى لِمَآ أَنزَلْتَ إِلَىَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍ فَقِيرٌ

suras.text: One of the women said, "O my father, hire him. Indeed, the best one you can hire is the strong and the trustworthy."
suras.translation: One of the women said, "O my father, hire him. Indeed, the best one you can hire is the strong and the trustworthy."
suras.arabic: قَالَتْ إِحْدَىٰهُمَا يَـٰٓأَبَتِ ٱسْتَـْٔجِرْهُ ۖ إِنَّ خَيْرَ مَنِ ٱسْتَـْٔجَرْتَ ٱلْقَوِىُّ ٱلْأَمِينُ

suras.text: But when he came to it, he was called from the right side of the valley in a blessed spot - from the tree, "O Moses, indeed I am Allah, Lord of the worlds."
suras.translation: But when he came to it, he was called from the right side of the valley in a blessed spot - from the tree, "O Moses, indeed I am Allah, Lord of the worlds."
suras.arabic: فَلَمَّآ أَتَىٰهَا نُودِىَ مِن شَـٰطِئِ ٱلْوَادِ ٱلْأَيْمَنِ فِى ٱلْبُقْعَةِ ٱلْمُبَـٰرَكَةِ مِنَ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ أَن يَـٰمُوسَىٰٓ إِنِّىٓ أَنَا ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed, I killed from among them someone, and I fear they will kill me.
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed, I killed from among them someone, and I fear they will kill me.
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى قَتَلْتُ مِنْهُمْ نَفْسًا فَأَخَافُ أَن يَقْتُلُونِ

suras.text: And my brother Aaron is more fluent than me in tongue, so send him with me as support, verifying me. Indeed, I fear that they will deny me."
suras.translation: And my brother Aaron is more fluent than me in tongue, so send him with me as support, verifying me. Indeed, I fear that they will deny me."
suras.arabic: وَأَخِى هَـٰرُونُ هُوَ أَفْصَحُ مِنِّى لِسَانًا فَأَرْسِلْهُ مَعِىَ رِدْءًا يُصَدِّقُنِىٓ ۖ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ أَن يُكَذِّبُونِ

suras.text: [Allah] said, "We will strengthen your arm through your brother and grant you both supremacy so they will not reach you. [It will be] through Our signs; you and those who follow you will be the predominant."
suras.translation: [Allah] said, "We will strengthen your arm through your brother and grant you both supremacy so they will not reach you. [It will be] through Our signs; you and those who follow you will be the predominant."
suras.arabic: قَالَ سَنَشُدُّ عَضُدَكَ بِأَخِيكَ وَنَجْعَلُ لَكُمَا سُلْطَـٰنًا فَلَا يَصِلُونَ إِلَيْكُمَا ۚ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَآ أَنتُمَا وَمَنِ ٱتَّبَعَكُمَا ٱلْغَـٰلِبُونَ

suras.text: And he was arrogant, he and his soldiers, in the land, without right, and they thought that they would not be returned to Us.
suras.translation: And he was arrogant, he and his soldiers, in the land, without right, and they thought that they would not be returned to Us.
suras.arabic: وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ هُوَ وَجُنُودُهُۥ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَظَنُّوٓا۟ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا يُرْجَعُونَ

suras.text: And you were not at the side of the mount when We called [Moses] but [were sent] as a mercy from your Lord to warn a people to whom no warner had come before you that they might be reminded.
