suras.arabic: سُنَّةَ ٱللَّهِ فِى ٱلَّذِينَ خَلَوْا۟ مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَلَن تَجِدَ لِسُنَّةِ ٱللَّهِ تَبْدِيلًا

suras.text: People ask you concerning the Hour. Say," Knowledge of it is only with Allah. And what may make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near."
suras.translation: People ask you concerning the Hour. Say," Knowledge of it is only with Allah. And what may make you perceive? Perhaps the Hour is near."
suras.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُكَ ٱلنَّاسُ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ ۖ قُلْ إِنَّمَا عِلْمُهَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّ ٱلسَّاعَةَ تَكُونُ قَرِيبًا

suras.text: Abiding therein forever, they will not find a protector or a helper.
suras.translation: Abiding therein forever, they will not find a protector or a helper.
suras.arabic: خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ لَّا يَجِدُونَ وَلِيًّا وَلَا نَصِيرًا

suras.text: The Day their faces will be turned about in the Fire, they will say, "How we wish we had obeyed Allah and obeyed the Messenger."
suras.translation: The Day their faces will be turned about in the Fire, they will say, "How we wish we had obeyed Allah and obeyed the Messenger."
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ تُقَلَّبُ وُجُوهُهُمْ فِى ٱلنَّارِ يَقُولُونَ يَـٰلَيْتَنَآ أَطَعْنَا ٱللَّهَ وَأَطَعْنَا ٱلرَّسُولَا۠

suras.text: And they will say, "Our Lord, indeed we obeyed our masters and our dignitaries, and they led us astray from the [right] way.
suras.translation: And they will say, "Our Lord, indeed we obeyed our masters and our dignitaries, and they led us astray from the [right] way.
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّآ أَطَعْنَا سَادَتَنَا وَكُبَرَآءَنَا فَأَضَلُّونَا ٱلسَّبِيلَا۠

suras.text: O you who have believed, be not like those who abused Moses; then Allah cleared him of what they said. And he, in the sight of Allah, was distinguished.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, be not like those who abused Moses; then Allah cleared him of what they said. And he, in the sight of Allah, was distinguished.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ ءَاذَوْا۟ مُوسَىٰ فَبَرَّأَهُ ٱللَّهُ مِمَّا قَالُوا۟ ۚ وَكَانَ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَجِيهًا

suras.text: He will [then] amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly attained a great attainment.
suras.translation: He will [then] amend for you your deeds and forgive you your sins. And whoever obeys Allah and His Messenger has certainly attained a great attainment.
suras.arabic: يُصْلِحْ لَكُمْ أَعْمَـٰلَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ ۗ وَمَن يُطِعِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَقَدْ فَازَ فَوْزًا عَظِيمًا

suras.text: Indeed, we offered the Trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains, and they declined to bear it and feared it; but man [undertook to] bear it. Indeed, he was unjust and ignorant.
suras.translation: Indeed, we offered the Trust to the heavens and the earth and the mountains, and they declined to bear it and feared it; but man [undertook to] bear it. Indeed, he was unjust and ignorant.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا عَرَضْنَا ٱلْأَمَانَةَ عَلَى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَٱلْجِبَالِ فَأَبَيْنَ أَن يَحْمِلْنَهَا وَأَشْفَقْنَ مِنْهَا وَحَمَلَهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ ظَلُومًا جَهُولًا

suras.text: [It was] so that Allah may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the men and women who associate others with Him and that Allah may accept repentance from the believing men and believing women. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: [It was] so that Allah may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women and the men and women who associate others with Him and that Allah may accept repentance from the believing men and believing women. And ever is Allah Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: لِّيُعَذِّبَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْمُنَـٰفِقِينَ وَٱلْمُنَـٰفِقَـٰتِ وَٱلْمُشْرِكِينَ وَٱلْمُشْرِكَـٰتِ وَيَتُوبَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَى ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ ۗ وَكَانَ ٱللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَّحِيمًۢا

suras.text: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and to Him belongs [all] praise in the Hereafter. And He is the Wise, the Acquainted.
suras.translation: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, to whom belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, and to Him belongs [all] praise in the Hereafter. And He is the Wise, the Acquainted.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ

suras.text: He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein. And He is the Merciful, the Forgiving.
suras.translation: He knows what penetrates into the earth and what emerges from it and what descends from the heaven and what ascends therein. And He is the Merciful, the Forgiving.
suras.arabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا يَلِجُ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا يَخْرُجُ مِنْهَا وَمَا يَنزِلُ مِنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا يَعْرُجُ فِيهَا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلرَّحِيمُ ٱلْغَفُورُ

suras.text: That He may reward those who believe and do righteous deeds. Those will have forgiveness and noble provision.
suras.translation: That He may reward those who believe and do righteous deeds. Those will have forgiveness and noble provision.
suras.arabic: لِّيَجْزِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَرِزْقٌ كَرِيمٌ

suras.text: And those who have been given knowledge see that what is revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, and it guides to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy.
suras.translation: And those who have been given knowledge see that what is revealed to you from your Lord is the truth, and it guides to the path of the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy.
suras.arabic: وَيَرَى ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْعِلْمَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ مِن رَّبِّكَ هُوَ ٱلْحَقَّ وَيَهْدِىٓ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ

suras.text: Then, do they not look at what is before them and what is behind them of the heaven and earth? If We should will, We could cause the earth to swallow them or [could] let fall upon them fragments from the sky. Indeed in that is a sign for every servant turning back [to Allah].
suras.translation: Then, do they not look at what is before them and what is behind them of the heaven and earth? If We should will, We could cause the earth to swallow them or [could] let fall upon them fragments from the sky. Indeed in that is a sign for every servant turning back [to Allah].
suras.arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِن نَّشَأْ نَخْسِفْ بِهِمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ أَوْ نُسْقِطْ عَلَيْهِمْ كِسَفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَةً لِّكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ

suras.text: And We certainly gave David from Us bounty. [We said], "O mountains, repeat [Our] praises with him, and the birds [as well]." And We made pliable for him iron,
suras.translation: And We certainly gave David from Us bounty. [We said], "O mountains, repeat [Our] praises with him, and the birds [as well]." And We made pliable for him iron,
suras.arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ ءَاتَيْنَا دَاوُۥدَ مِنَّا فَضْلًا ۖ يَـٰجِبَالُ أَوِّبِى مَعَهُۥ وَٱلطَّيْرَ ۖ وَأَلَنَّا لَهُ ٱلْحَدِيدَ

suras.text: [Commanding him], "Make full coats of mail and calculate [precisely] the links, and work [all of you] righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Seeing."
suras.translation: [Commanding him], "Make full coats of mail and calculate [precisely] the links, and work [all of you] righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Seeing."
suras.arabic: أَنِ ٱعْمَلْ سَـٰبِغَـٰتٍ وَقَدِّرْ فِى ٱلسَّرْدِ ۖ وَٱعْمَلُوا۟ صَـٰلِحًا ۖ إِنِّى بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ

suras.text: But they turned away [refusing], so We sent upon them the flood of the dam, and We replaced their two [fields of] gardens with gardens of bitter fruit, tamarisks and something of sparse lote trees.
suras.translation: But they turned away [refusing], so We sent upon them the flood of the dam, and We replaced their two [fields of] gardens with gardens of bitter fruit, tamarisks and something of sparse lote trees.
suras.arabic: فَأَعْرَضُوا۟ فَأَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَيْلَ ٱلْعَرِمِ وَبَدَّلْنَـٰهُم بِجَنَّتَيْهِمْ جَنَّتَيْنِ ذَوَاتَىْ أُكُلٍ خَمْطٍ وَأَثْلٍ وَشَىْءٍ مِّن سِدْرٍ قَلِيلٍ

suras.text: [By] that We repaid them because they disbelieved. And do We [thus] repay except the ungrateful?
suras.translation: [By] that We repaid them because they disbelieved. And do We [thus] repay except the ungrateful?
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ جَزَيْنَـٰهُم بِمَا كَفَرُوا۟ ۖ وَهَلْ نُجَـٰزِىٓ إِلَّا ٱلْكَفُورَ

suras.text: And We placed between them and the cities which We had blessed [many] visible cities. And We determined between them the [distances of] journey, [saying], "Travel between them by night or day in safety."
suras.translation: And We placed between them and the cities which We had blessed [many] visible cities. And We determined between them the [distances of] journey, [saying], "Travel between them by night or day in safety."
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا بَيْنَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلْقُرَى ٱلَّتِى بَـٰرَكْنَا فِيهَا قُرًى ظَـٰهِرَةً وَقَدَّرْنَا فِيهَا ٱلسَّيْرَ ۖ سِيرُوا۟ فِيهَا لَيَالِىَ وَأَيَّامًا ءَامِنِينَ

suras.text: But [insolently] they said, "Our Lord, lengthen the distance between our journeys," and wronged themselves, so We made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
suras.translation: But [insolently] they said, "Our Lord, lengthen the distance between our journeys," and wronged themselves, so We made them narrations and dispersed them in total dispersion. Indeed in that are signs for everyone patient and grateful.
suras.arabic: فَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا بَـٰعِدْ بَيْنَ أَسْفَارِنَا وَظَلَمُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمْ أَحَادِيثَ وَمَزَّقْنَـٰهُمْ كُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍ ۚ إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَـَٔايَـٰتٍ لِّكُلِّ صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ

suras.text: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers.
suras.translation: And Iblees had already confirmed through them his assumption, so they followed him, except for a party of believers.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ صَدَّقَ عَلَيْهِمْ إِبْلِيسُ ظَنَّهُۥ فَٱتَّبَعُوهُ إِلَّا فَرِيقًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian.
suras.translation: And he had over them no authority except [it was decreed] that We might make evident who believes in the Hereafter from who is thereof in doubt. And your Lord, over all things, is Guardian.
suras.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَهُۥ عَلَيْهِم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍ إِلَّا لِنَعْلَمَ مَن يُؤْمِنُ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ مِمَّنْ هُوَ مِنْهَا فِى شَكٍّ ۗ وَرَبُّكَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ حَفِيظٌ

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom\'s weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant.
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "Invoke those you claim [as deities] besides Allah." They do not possess an atom\'s weight [of ability] in the heavens or on the earth, and they do not have therein any partnership [with Him], nor is there for Him from among them any assistant.
suras.arabic: قُلِ ٱدْعُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ زَعَمْتُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا لَهُمْ فِيهِمَا مِن شِرْكٍ وَمَا لَهُۥ مِنْهُم مِّن ظَهِيرٍ

suras.text: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand.
suras.translation: And intercession does not benefit with Him except for one whom He permits. [And those wait] until, when terror is removed from their hearts, they will say [to one another], "What has your Lord said?" They will say, "The truth." And He is the Most High, the Grand.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَنفَعُ ٱلشَّفَـٰعَةُ عِندَهُۥٓ إِلَّا لِمَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُۥ ۚ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا فُزِّعَ عَن قُلُوبِهِمْ قَالُوا۟ مَاذَا قَالَ رَبُّكُمْ ۖ قَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَقَّ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَلِىُّ ٱلْكَبِيرُ

suras.text: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error."
suras.translation: Say, "Who provides for you from the heavens and the earth?" Say, "Allah. And indeed, we or you are either upon guidance or in clear error."
suras.arabic: ۞ قُلْ مَن يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ قُلِ ٱللَّهُ ۖ وَإِنَّآ أَوْ إِيَّاكُمْ لَعَلَىٰ هُدًى أَوْ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do."
suras.translation: Say, "You will not be asked about what we committed, and we will not be asked about what you do."
suras.arabic: قُل لَّا تُسْـَٔلُونَ عَمَّآ أَجْرَمْنَا وَلَا نُسْـَٔلُ عَمَّا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
suras.translation: Say, "Show me those whom you have attached to Him as partners. No! Rather, He [alone] is Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Wise."
suras.arabic: قُلْ أَرُونِىَ ٱلَّذِينَ أَلْحَقْتُم بِهِۦ شُرَكَآءَ ۖ كَلَّا ۚ بَلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know.
suras.translation: And We have not sent you except comprehensively to mankind as a bringer of good tidings and a warner. But most of the people do not know.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَـٰكَ إِلَّا كَآفَّةً لِّلنَّاسِ بَشِيرًا وَنَذِيرًا وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]."
suras.translation: Say, "For you is the appointment of a Day [when] you will not remain thereafter an hour, nor will you precede [it]."
suras.arabic: قُل لَّكُم مِّيعَادُ يَوْمٍ لَّا تَسْتَـْٔخِرُونَ عَنْهُ سَاعَةً وَلَا تَسْتَقْدِمُونَ

suras.text: Those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed, "Did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you? Rather, you were criminals."
suras.translation: Those who were arrogant will say to those who were oppressed, "Did we avert you from guidance after it had come to you? Rather, you were criminals."
suras.arabic: قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ٱسْتُضْعِفُوٓا۟ أَنَحْنُ صَدَدْنَـٰكُمْ عَنِ ٱلْهُدَىٰ بَعْدَ إِذْ جَآءَكُم ۖ بَلْ كُنتُم مُّجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: And they said, "We are more [than the believers] in wealth and children, and we are not to be punished."
suras.translation: And they said, "We are more [than the believers] in wealth and children, and we are not to be punished."
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ نَحْنُ أَكْثَرُ أَمْوَٰلًا وَأَوْلَـٰدًا وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it], but most of the people do not know."
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it], but most of the people do not know."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ رَبِّى يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَقْدِرُ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَ ٱلنَّاسِ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts [it] for him. But whatever thing you spend [in His cause] - He will compensate it; and He is the best of providers."
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, my Lord extends provision for whom He wills of His servants and restricts [it] for him. But whatever thing you spend [in His cause] - He will compensate it; and He is the best of providers."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ رَبِّى يَبْسُطُ ٱلرِّزْقَ لِمَن يَشَآءُ مِنْ عِبَادِهِۦ وَيَقْدِرُ لَهُۥ ۚ وَمَآ أَنفَقْتُم مِّن شَىْءٍ فَهُوَ يُخْلِفُهُۥ ۖ وَهُوَ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ

suras.text: They will say, "Exalted are You! You, [O Allah], are our benefactor not them. Rather, they used to worship the jinn; most of them were believers in them."
suras.translation: They will say, "Exalted are You! You, [O Allah], are our benefactor not them. Rather, they used to worship the jinn; most of them were believers in them."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَكَ أَنتَ وَلِيُّنَا مِن دُونِهِم ۖ بَلْ كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ ٱلْجِنَّ ۖ أَكْثَرُهُم بِهِم مُّؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: And We had not given them any scriptures which they could study, and We had not sent to them before you, [O Muhammad], any warner.
suras.translation: And We had not given them any scriptures which they could study, and We had not sent to them before you, [O Muhammad], any warner.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّن كُتُبٍ يَدْرُسُونَهَا ۖ وَمَآ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمْ قَبْلَكَ مِن نَّذِيرٍ

suras.text: And those before them denied, and the people of Makkah have not attained a tenth of what We had given them. But the former peoples denied My messengers, so how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.translation: And those before them denied, and the people of Makkah have not attained a tenth of what We had given them. But the former peoples denied My messengers, so how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.arabic: وَكَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَمَا بَلَغُوا۟ مِعْشَارَ مَآ ءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمْ فَكَذَّبُوا۟ رُسُلِى ۖ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ

suras.text: Say, "Whatever payment I might have asked of you - it is yours. My payment is only from Allah, and He is, over all things, Witness."
suras.translation: Say, "Whatever payment I might have asked of you - it is yours. My payment is only from Allah, and He is, over all things, Witness."
suras.arabic: قُلْ مَا سَأَلْتُكُم مِّنْ أَجْرٍ فَهُوَ لَكُمْ ۖ إِنْ أَجْرِىَ إِلَّا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, my Lord projects the truth. Knower of the unseen."
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, my Lord projects the truth. Knower of the unseen."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ رَبِّى يَقْذِفُ بِٱلْحَقِّ عَلَّـٰمُ ٱلْغُيُوبِ

suras.text: Say, "The truth has come, and falsehood can neither begin [anything] nor repeat [it]."
suras.translation: Say, "The truth has come, and falsehood can neither begin [anything] nor repeat [it]."
suras.arabic: قُلْ جَآءَ ٱلْحَقُّ وَمَا يُبْدِئُ ٱلْبَـٰطِلُ وَمَا يُعِيدُ

suras.text: Say, "If I should err, I would only err against myself. But if I am guided, it is by what my Lord reveals to me. Indeed, He is Hearing and near."
suras.translation: Say, "If I should err, I would only err against myself. But if I am guided, it is by what my Lord reveals to me. Indeed, He is Hearing and near."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِن ضَلَلْتُ فَإِنَّمَآ أَضِلُّ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِى ۖ وَإِنِ ٱهْتَدَيْتُ فَبِمَا يُوحِىٓ إِلَىَّ رَبِّىٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ سَمِيعٌ قَرِيبٌ

suras.text: And if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape, and they will be seized from a place nearby.
suras.translation: And if you could see when they are terrified but there is no escape, and they will be seized from a place nearby.
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ تَرَىٰٓ إِذْ فَزِعُوا۟ فَلَا فَوْتَ وَأُخِذُوا۟ مِن مَّكَانٍ قَرِيبٍ

suras.text: And they will [then] say, "We believe in it!" But how for them will be the taking [of faith] from a place far away?
suras.translation: And they will [then] say, "We believe in it!" But how for them will be the taking [of faith] from a place far away?
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلتَّنَاوُشُ مِن مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيدٍ

suras.text: And they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away.
suras.translation: And they had already disbelieved in it before and would assault the unseen from a place far away.
suras.arabic: وَقَدْ كَفَرُوا۟ بِهِۦ مِن قَبْلُ ۖ وَيَقْذِفُونَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ مِن مَّكَانٍۭ بَعِيدٍ

suras.text: And prevention will be placed between them and what they desire, as was done with their kind before. Indeed, they were in disquieting denial.
suras.translation: And prevention will be placed between them and what they desire, as was done with their kind before. Indeed, they were in disquieting denial.
suras.arabic: وَحِيلَ بَيْنَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ مَا يَشْتَهُونَ كَمَا فُعِلَ بِأَشْيَاعِهِم مِّن قَبْلُ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ فِى شَكٍّ مُّرِيبٍۭ

suras.text: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four. He increases in creation what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent.
suras.translation: [All] praise is [due] to Allah, Creator of the heavens and the earth, [who] made the angels messengers having wings, two or three or four. He increases in creation what He wills. Indeed, Allah is over all things competent.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ فَاطِرِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ جَاعِلِ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا أُو۟لِىٓ أَجْنِحَةٍ مَّثْنَىٰ وَثُلَـٰثَ وَرُبَـٰعَ ۚ يَزِيدُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ مَا يَشَآءُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

suras.text: Whatever Allah grants to people of mercy - none can withhold it; and whatever He withholds - none can release it thereafter. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Whatever Allah grants to people of mercy - none can withhold it; and whatever He withholds - none can release it thereafter. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: مَّا يَفْتَحِ ٱللَّهُ لِلنَّاسِ مِن رَّحْمَةٍ فَلَا مُمْسِكَ لَهَا ۖ وَمَا يُمْسِكْ فَلَا مُرْسِلَ لَهُۥ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: O mankind, remember the favor of Allah upon you. Is there any creator other than Allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth? There is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded?
suras.translation: O mankind, remember the favor of Allah upon you. Is there any creator other than Allah who provides for you from the heaven and earth? There is no deity except Him, so how are you deluded?
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ٱذْكُرُوا۟ نِعْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ عَلَيْكُمْ ۚ هَلْ مِنْ خَـٰلِقٍ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ يَرْزُقُكُم مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ فَأَنَّىٰ تُؤْفَكُونَ

suras.text: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - already were messengers denied before you. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
suras.translation: And if they deny you, [O Muhammad] - already were messengers denied before you. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
suras.arabic: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدْ كُذِّبَتْ رُسُلٌ مِّن قَبْلِكَ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ

suras.text: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver.
suras.translation: O mankind, indeed the promise of Allah is truth, so let not the worldly life delude you and be not deceived about Allah by the Deceiver.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ إِنَّ وَعْدَ ٱللَّهِ حَقٌّ ۖ فَلَا تَغُرَّنَّكُمُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا ۖ وَلَا يَغُرَّنَّكُم بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْغَرُورُ

suras.text: Then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good [like one rightly guided]? For indeed, Allah sends astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. So do not let yourself perish over them in regret. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do.
suras.translation: Then is one to whom the evil of his deed has been made attractive so he considers it good [like one rightly guided]? For indeed, Allah sends astray whom He wills and guides whom He wills. So do not let yourself perish over them in regret. Indeed, Allah is Knowing of what they do.
suras.arabic: أَفَمَن زُيِّنَ لَهُۥ سُوٓءُ عَمَلِهِۦ فَرَءَاهُ حَسَنًا ۖ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُضِلُّ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۖ فَلَا تَذْهَبْ نَفْسُكَ عَلَيْهِمْ حَسَرَٰتٍ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلِيمٌۢ بِمَا يَصْنَعُونَ

suras.text: And it is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds, and We drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Thus is the resurrection.
suras.translation: And it is Allah who sends the winds, and they stir the clouds, and We drive them to a dead land and give life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness. Thus is the resurrection.
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ ٱلرِّيَـٰحَ فَتُثِيرُ سَحَابًا فَسُقْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ بَلَدٍ مَّيِّتٍ فَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلنُّشُورُ

suras.text: O mankind, you are those in need of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.translation: O mankind, you are those in need of Allah, while Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.arabic: ۞ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ أَنتُمُ ٱلْفُقَرَآءُ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ وَٱللَّهُ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ

suras.text: If He wills, He can do away with you and bring forth a new creation.
suras.translation: If He wills, He can do away with you and bring forth a new creation.
suras.arabic: إِن يَشَأْ يُذْهِبْكُمْ وَيَأْتِ بِخَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ

suras.text: And that is for Allah not difficult.
suras.translation: And that is for Allah not difficult.
suras.arabic: وَمَا ذَٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ بِعَزِيزٍ

suras.text: Not equal are the blind and the seeing,
suras.translation: Not equal are the blind and the seeing,
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَسْتَوِى ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ وَٱلْبَصِيرُ

suras.text: Nor are the darknesses and the light,
suras.translation: Nor are the darknesses and the light,
suras.arabic: وَلَا ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتُ وَلَا ٱلنُّورُ

suras.text: Nor are the shade and the heat,
suras.translation: Nor are the shade and the heat,
suras.arabic: وَلَا ٱلظِّلُّ وَلَا ٱلْحَرُورُ

suras.text: And not equal are the living and the dead. Indeed, Allah causes to hear whom He wills, but you cannot make hear those in the graves.
suras.translation: And not equal are the living and the dead. Indeed, Allah causes to hear whom He wills, but you cannot make hear those in the graves.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَسْتَوِى ٱلْأَحْيَآءُ وَلَا ٱلْأَمْوَٰتُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسْمِعُ مَن يَشَآءُ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ بِمُسْمِعٍ مَّن فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ

suras.text: You, [O Muhammad], are not but a warner.
suras.translation: You, [O Muhammad], are not but a warner.
suras.arabic: إِنْ أَنتَ إِلَّا نَذِيرٌ

suras.text: And if they deny you - then already have those before them denied. Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening Scripture.
suras.translation: And if they deny you - then already have those before them denied. Their messengers came to them with clear proofs and written ordinances and with the enlightening Scripture.
suras.arabic: وَإِن يُكَذِّبُوكَ فَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ وَبِٱلزُّبُرِ وَبِٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُنِيرِ

suras.text: Then I seized the ones who disbelieved, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.translation: Then I seized the ones who disbelieved, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَخَذْتُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ۖ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ

suras.text: And among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly. Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Forgiving.
suras.translation: And among people and moving creatures and grazing livestock are various colors similarly. Only those fear Allah, from among His servants, who have knowledge. Indeed, Allah is Exalted in Might and Forgiving.
suras.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ وَٱلدَّوَآبِّ وَٱلْأَنْعَـٰمِ مُخْتَلِفٌ أَلْوَٰنُهُۥ كَذَٰلِكَ ۗ إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى ٱللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ ٱلْعُلَمَـٰٓؤُا۟ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ

suras.text: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend [in His cause] out of what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, [can] expect a profit that will never perish -
suras.translation: Indeed, those who recite the Book of Allah and establish prayer and spend [in His cause] out of what We have provided them, secretly and publicly, [can] expect a profit that will never perish -
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ كِتَـٰبَ ٱللَّهِ وَأَقَامُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقْنَـٰهُمْ سِرًّا وَعَلَانِيَةً يَرْجُونَ تِجَـٰرَةً لَّن تَبُورَ

suras.text: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative.
suras.translation: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative.
suras.arabic: لِيُوَفِّيَهُمْ أُجُورَهُمْ وَيَزِيدَهُم مِّن فَضْلِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ غَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ

suras.text: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed, Allah, of His servants, is Acquainted and Seeing.
suras.translation: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muhammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed, Allah, of His servants, is Acquainted and Seeing.
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَوْحَيْنَآ إِلَيْكَ مِنَ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ هُوَ ٱلْحَقُّ مُصَدِّقًا لِّمَا بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ ۗ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِعِبَادِهِۦ لَخَبِيرٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

suras.text: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty.
suras.translation: Then we caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself, and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allah. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَوْرَثْنَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلَّذِينَ ٱصْطَفَيْنَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ۖ فَمِنْهُمْ ظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ وَمِنْهُم مُّقْتَصِدٌ وَمِنْهُمْ سَابِقٌۢ بِٱلْخَيْرَٰتِ بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَضْلُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ

suras.text: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk.
suras.translation: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk.
suras.arabic: جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ يَدْخُلُونَهَا يُحَلَّوْنَ فِيهَا مِنْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن ذَهَبٍ وَلُؤْلُؤًا ۖ وَلِبَاسُهُمْ فِيهَا حَرِيرٌ

suras.text: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative -
suras.translation: And they will say, "Praise to Allah, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative -
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَذْهَبَ عَنَّا ٱلْحَزَنَ ۖ إِنَّ رَبَّنَا لَغَفُورٌ شَكُورٌ

suras.text: He who has settled us in the home of duration out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]."
suras.translation: He who has settled us in the home of duration out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]."
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَحَلَّنَا دَارَ ٱلْمُقَامَةِ مِن فَضْلِهِۦ لَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا نَصَبٌ وَلَا يَمَسُّنَا فِيهَا لُغُوبٌ

suras.text: Indeed, Allah holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving.
suras.translation: Indeed, Allah holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving.
suras.arabic: ۞ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُمْسِكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ أَن تَزُولَا ۚ وَلَئِن زَالَتَآ إِنْ أَمْسَكَهُمَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ مِّنۢ بَعْدِهِۦٓ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ حَلِيمًا غَفُورًا

suras.text: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent.
suras.translation: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allah is not to be caused failure by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent.
suras.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَسِيرُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ فَيَنظُرُوا۟ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ وَكَانُوٓا۟ أَشَدَّ مِنْهُمْ قُوَّةً ۚ وَمَا كَانَ ٱللَّهُ لِيُعْجِزَهُۥ مِن شَىْءٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَلَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَلِيمًا قَدِيرًا

suras.text: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers,
suras.translation: Indeed you, [O Muhammad], are from among the messengers,
suras.arabic: إِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
suras.translation: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,
suras.arabic: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ

suras.text: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.
suras.translation: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.
suras.arabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَـٰفِلُونَ

suras.text: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.
suras.translation: Already the word has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.
suras.translation: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنَـٰقِهِمْ أَغْلَـٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ

suras.text: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.
suras.translation: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَـٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ

suras.text: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.
suras.translation: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.
suras.arabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.
suras.translation: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ ۖ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ

suras.text: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثَـٰرَهُمْ ۚ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -
suras.translation: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -
suras.arabic: وَٱضْرِبْ لَهُم مَّثَلًا أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْقَرْيَةِ إِذْ جَآءَهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."
suras.translation: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you,
suras.translation: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you,
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ رَبُّنَا يَعْلَمُ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: And we are not responsible except for clear notification."
suras.translation: And we are not responsible except for clear notification."
suras.arabic: وَمَا عَلَيْنَآ إِلَّا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ

suras.text: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people."
suras.translation: They said, "Your omen is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ طَـٰٓئِرُكُم مَّعَكُمْ ۚ أَئِن ذُكِّرْتُم ۚ بَلْ أَنتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُونَ

suras.text: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers.
suras.translation: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers.
suras.arabic: وَجَآءَ مِنْ أَقْصَا ٱلْمَدِينَةِ رَجُلٌ يَسْعَىٰ قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided.
suras.translation: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided.
suras.arabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَن لَّا يَسْـَٔلُكُمْ أَجْرًا وَهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ

suras.text: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned?
suras.translation: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned?
suras.arabic: وَمَا لِىَ لَآ أَعْبُدُ ٱلَّذِى فَطَرَنِى وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

suras.text: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me?
suras.translation: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me?
suras.arabic: ءَأَتَّخِذُ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ ءَالِهَةً إِن يُرِدْنِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا يُنقِذُونِ

suras.text: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error.
suras.translation: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error.
suras.arabic: إِنِّىٓ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me."
suras.translation: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me."
suras.arabic: إِنِّىٓ ءَامَنتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَٱسْمَعُونِ

suras.text: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know
suras.translation: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know
suras.arabic: قِيلَ ٱدْخُلِ ٱلْجَنَّةَ ۖ قَالَ يَـٰلَيْتَ قَوْمِى يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored."
suras.translation: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored."
suras.arabic: بِمَا غَفَرَ لِى رَبِّى وَجَعَلَنِى مِنَ ٱلْمُكْرَمِينَ

suras.text: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.
suras.translation: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَمَآ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ مِنۢ بَعْدِهِۦ مِن جُندٍ مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا كُنَّا مُنزِلِينَ

suras.text: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.
suras.translation: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.
suras.arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خَـٰمِدُونَ

suras.text: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.
suras.translation: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.
suras.arabic: يَـٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ ۚ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ

suras.text: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.
suras.translation: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.
suras.arabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ

suras.text: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.
suras.translation: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.
suras.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنَـٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ

suras.text: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -
suras.translation: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّـٰتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنَـٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ

suras.text: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.
suras.translation: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.
suras.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوَٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.
suras.translation: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it [the light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.
suras.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ

suras.text: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.
suras.translation: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنَـٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ

suras.text: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.
suras.translation: It is not allowable for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.
suras.arabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ ۚ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ

suras.text: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.
suras.translation: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.
suras.arabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ

suras.text: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.
suras.translation: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.
suras.arabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ

suras.text: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved
suras.translation: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved
suras.arabic: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ

suras.text: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time.
suras.translation: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَمَتَـٰعًا إِلَىٰ حِينٍ

suras.text: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy... "
suras.translation: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy... "
suras.arabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱتَّقُوا۟ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيكُمْ وَمَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ

suras.text: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away.
suras.translation: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away.
suras.arabic: وَمَا تَأْتِيهِم مِّنْ ءَايَةٍ مِّنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِينَ

suras.text: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.
suras.translation: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.
suras.arabic: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ

suras.text: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.
suras.translation: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.
suras.arabic: فَلَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ تَوْصِيَةً وَلَآ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِمْ يَرْجِعُونَ

suras.text: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.
suras.translation: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.
suras.arabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ

suras.text: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."
suras.translation: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا ۜ ۗ هَـٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.
suras.translation: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.
suras.arabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وَٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ

suras.text: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.
suras.translation: So today no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.
suras.arabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]
suras.translation: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]
suras.arabic: لَهُمْ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَلَهُم مَّا يَدَّعُونَ

suras.text: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.
suras.translation: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.
suras.arabic: سَلَـٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّن رَّبٍّ رَّحِيمٍ

suras.text: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.
suras.translation: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.
suras.arabic: وَٱمْتَـٰزُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

suras.text: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -
suras.translation: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -
suras.arabic: ۞ أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يَـٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنَ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path.
suras.translation: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path.
suras.arabic: وَأَنِ ٱعْبُدُونِى ۚ هَـٰذَا صِرَٰطٌ مُّسْتَقِيمٌ

suras.text: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.
suras.translation: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.
suras.arabic: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."
suras.translation: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."
suras.arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ

suras.text: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.
suras.translation: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.
suras.arabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

suras.text: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?
suras.translation: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرَٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ

suras.text: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.
suras.translation: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ

suras.text: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?
suras.translation: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?
suras.arabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ ۖ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?
suras.translation: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?
suras.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعَـٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مَـٰلِكُونَ

suras.text: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.
suras.translation: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.
suras.arabic: وَذَلَّلْنَـٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ

suras.text: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?
suras.translation: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?
suras.arabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنَـٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ ۖ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ

suras.text: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.
suras.translation: But they have taken besides Allah [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.
suras.arabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ

suras.text: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.
suras.translation: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.
suras.arabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ

suras.text: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.
suras.translation: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.
suras.arabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ

suras.text: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?
suras.translation: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?
suras.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُ مِن نُّطْفَةٍ فَإِذَا هُوَ خَصِيمٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"
suras.translation: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"
suras.arabic: وَضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَنَسِىَ خَلْقَهُۥ ۖ قَالَ مَن يُحْىِ ٱلْعِظَـٰمَ وَهِىَ رَمِيمٌ

suras.text: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."
suras.translation: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."
suras.arabic: قُلْ يُحْيِيهَا ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَهَآ أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِيمٌ

suras.text: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.
suras.translation: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُم مِّنَ ٱلشَّجَرِ ٱلْأَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَإِذَآ أَنتُم مِّنْهُ تُوقِدُونَ

suras.text: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.
suras.translation: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.
suras.arabic: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم ۚ بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّـٰقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

suras.text: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.
suras.translation: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْرُهُۥٓ إِذَآ أَرَادَ شَيْـًٔا أَن يَقُولَ لَهُۥ كُن فَيَكُونُ

suras.text: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.
suras.translation: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.
suras.arabic: فَسُبْحَـٰنَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِۦ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

suras.text: By those [angels] lined up in rows
suras.translation: By those [angels] lined up in rows
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلصَّـٰٓفَّـٰتِ صَفًّا

suras.text: And those who drive [the clouds]
suras.translation: And those who drive [the clouds]
suras.arabic: فَٱلزَّٰجِرَٰتِ زَجْرًا

suras.text: And those who recite the message,
suras.translation: And those who recite the message,
suras.arabic: فَٱلتَّـٰلِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا

suras.text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
suras.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.
suras.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ

suras.text: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
suras.translation: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars
suras.arabic: إِنَّا زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنْيَا بِزِينَةٍ ٱلْكَوَاكِبِ

suras.text: And as protection against every rebellious devil
suras.translation: And as protection against every rebellious devil
suras.arabic: وَحِفْظًا مِّن كُلِّ شَيْطَـٰنٍ مَّارِدٍ

suras.text: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
suras.translation: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,
suras.arabic: لَّا يَسَّمَّعُونَ إِلَى ٱلْمَلَإِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ وَيُقْذَفُونَ مِن كُلِّ جَانِبٍ

suras.text: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
suras.translation: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَنْ خَطِفَ ٱلْخَطْفَةَ فَأَتْبَعَهُۥ شِهَابٌ ثَاقِبٌ

suras.text: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay.
suras.translation: Then inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created men from sticky clay.
suras.arabic: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَهُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَم مَّنْ خَلَقْنَآ ۚ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّن طِينٍ لَّازِبٍۭ

suras.text: But you wonder, while they mock,
suras.translation: But you wonder, while they mock,
suras.arabic: بَلْ عَجِبْتَ وَيَسْخَرُونَ

suras.text: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
suras.translation: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
suras.translation: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
suras.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

suras.text: And our forefathers [as well]?"
suras.translation: And our forefathers [as well]?"
suras.arabic: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ

suras.text: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."
suras.translation: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."
suras.arabic: قُلْ نَعَمْ وَأَنتُمْ دَٰخِرُونَ

suras.text: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
suras.translation: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ فَإِذَا هُمْ يَنظُرُونَ

suras.text: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
suras.translation: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship
suras.arabic: ۞ ٱحْشُرُوا۟ ٱلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ وَأَزْوَٰجَهُمْ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْبُدُونَ

suras.text: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
suras.translation: Other than Allah, and guide them to the path of Hellfire
suras.arabic: مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ فَٱهْدُوهُمْ إِلَىٰ صِرَٰطِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."
suras.translation: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."
suras.arabic: وَقِفُوهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُم مَّسْـُٔولُونَ

suras.text: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"
suras.translation: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"
suras.arabic: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنَاصَرُونَ

suras.text: But they, that Day, are in surrender.
suras.translation: But they, that Day, are in surrender.
suras.arabic: بَلْ هُمُ ٱلْيَوْمَ مُسْتَسْلِمُونَ

suras.text: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."
suras.translation: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّكُمْ كُنتُمْ تَأْتُونَنَا عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ

suras.text: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,
suras.translation: The oppressors will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَل لَّمْ تَكُونُوا۟ مُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.
suras.translation: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.
suras.arabic: وَمَا كَانَ لَنَا عَلَيْكُم مِّن سُلْطَـٰنٍۭ ۖ بَلْ كُنتُمْ قَوْمًا طَـٰغِينَ

suras.text: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."
suras.translation: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."
suras.arabic: فَأَغْوَيْنَـٰكُمْ إِنَّا كُنَّا غَـٰوِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.
suras.translation: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
suras.translation: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allah," were arrogant
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوٓا۟ إِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا ٱللَّهُ يَسْتَكْبِرُونَ

suras.text: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"
suras.translation: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ أَئِنَّا لَتَارِكُوٓا۟ ءَالِهَتِنَا لِشَاعِرٍ مَّجْنُونٍۭ

suras.text: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.
suras.translation: Rather, the Prophet has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.
suras.arabic: بَلْ جَآءَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَدَّقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -
suras.translation: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -
suras.arabic: وَمَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

suras.text: Those will have a provision determined -
suras.translation: Those will have a provision determined -
suras.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ لَهُمْ رِزْقٌ مَّعْلُومٌ

suras.text: Fruits; and they will be honored
suras.translation: Fruits; and they will be honored
suras.arabic: فَوَٰكِهُ ۖ وَهُم مُّكْرَمُونَ

suras.text: On thrones facing one another.
suras.translation: On thrones facing one another.
suras.arabic: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ

suras.text: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,
suras.translation: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,
suras.arabic: يُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍۭ

suras.text: White and delicious to the drinkers;
suras.translation: White and delicious to the drinkers;
suras.arabic: بَيْضَآءَ لَذَّةٍ لِّلشَّـٰرِبِينَ

suras.text: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.
suras.translation: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.
suras.arabic: لَا فِيهَا غَوْلٌ وَلَا هُمْ عَنْهَا يُنزَفُونَ

suras.text: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,
suras.translation: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,
suras.arabic: وَعِندَهُمْ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ عِينٌ

suras.text: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.
suras.translation: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.
suras.arabic: كَأَنَّهُنَّ بَيْضٌ مَّكْنُونٌ

suras.text: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
suras.translation: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth]
suras.arabic: قَالَ قَآئِلٌ مِّنْهُمْ إِنِّى كَانَ لِى قَرِينٌ

suras.text: Who would say, \'Are you indeed of those who believe
suras.translation: Who would say, \'Are you indeed of those who believe
suras.arabic: يَقُولُ أَءِنَّكَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُصَدِّقِينَ

suras.text: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?\'"
suras.translation: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?\'"
suras.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَدِينُونَ

suras.text: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"
suras.translation: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"
suras.arabic: قَالَ هَلْ أَنتُم مُّطَّلِعُونَ

suras.text: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.
suras.translation: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.
suras.arabic: فَٱطَّلَعَ فَرَءَاهُ فِى سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me.
suras.translation: He will say, "By Allah, you almost ruined me.
suras.arabic: قَالَ تَٱللَّهِ إِن كِدتَّ لَتُرْدِينِ

suras.text: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].
suras.translation: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].
suras.arabic: وَلَوْلَا نِعْمَةُ رَبِّى لَكُنتُ مِنَ ٱلْمُحْضَرِينَ

suras.text: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"
suras.translation: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَوْتَتَنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُعَذَّبِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, this is the great attainment.
suras.translation: Indeed, this is the great attainment.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

suras.text: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.
suras.translation: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.
suras.arabic: لِمِثْلِ هَـٰذَا فَلْيَعْمَلِ ٱلْعَـٰمِلُونَ

suras.text: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum?
suras.translation: Is Paradise a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqum?
suras.arabic: أَذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ نُّزُلًا أَمْ شَجَرَةُ ٱلزَّقُّومِ

suras.text: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.
suras.translation: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَـٰهَا فِتْنَةً لِّلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,
suras.translation: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهَا شَجَرَةٌ تَخْرُجُ فِىٓ أَصْلِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.
suras.translation: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.
suras.arabic: طَلْعُهَا كَأَنَّهُۥ رُءُوسُ ٱلشَّيَـٰطِينِ

suras.text: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.
suras.translation: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّهُمْ لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِنْهَا فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ

suras.text: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.
suras.translation: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ لَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا لَشَوْبًا مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ

suras.text: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.
suras.translation: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ مَرْجِعَهُمْ لَإِلَى ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: Indeed they found their fathers astray.
suras.translation: Indeed they found their fathers astray.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ أَلْفَوْا۟ ءَابَآءَهُمْ ضَآلِّينَ

suras.text: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.
suras.translation: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.
suras.arabic: فَهُمْ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ يُهْرَعُونَ

suras.text: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,
suras.translation: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ ضَلَّ قَبْلَهُمْ أَكْثَرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: And We had already sent among them warners.
suras.translation: And We had already sent among them warners.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا فِيهِم مُّنذِرِينَ

suras.text: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -
suras.translation: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -
suras.arabic: فَٱنظُرْ كَيْفَ كَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ ٱلْمُنذَرِينَ

suras.text: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

suras.text: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.
suras.translation: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَادَىٰنَا نُوحٌ فَلَنِعْمَ ٱلْمُجِيبُونَ

suras.text: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
suras.translation: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُۥ هُمُ ٱلْبَاقِينَ

suras.text: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.translation: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: "Peace upon Noah among the worlds."
suras.translation: "Peace upon Noah among the worlds."
suras.arabic: سَلَـٰمٌ عَلَىٰ نُوحٍ فِى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,
suras.translation: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,
suras.arabic: ۞ وَإِنَّ مِن شِيعَتِهِۦ لَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ

suras.text: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
suras.translation: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart
suras.arabic: إِذْ جَآءَ رَبَّهُۥ بِقَلْبٍ سَلِيمٍ

suras.text: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire?
suras.translation: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allah you desire?
suras.arabic: أَئِفْكًا ءَالِهَةً دُونَ ٱللَّهِ تُرِيدُونَ

suras.text: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"
suras.translation: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"
suras.arabic: فَمَا ظَنُّكُم بِرَبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: And he cast a look at the stars
suras.translation: And he cast a look at the stars
suras.arabic: فَنَظَرَ نَظْرَةً فِى ٱلنُّجُومِ

suras.text: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."
suras.translation: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."
suras.arabic: فَقَالَ إِنِّى سَقِيمٌ

suras.text: So they turned away from him, departing.
suras.translation: So they turned away from him, departing.
suras.arabic: فَتَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ مُدْبِرِينَ

suras.text: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?
suras.translation: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?
suras.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ ءَالِهَتِهِمْ فَقَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ

suras.text: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?"
suras.translation: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?"
suras.arabic: مَا لَكُمْ لَا تَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.
suras.translation: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.
suras.arabic: فَرَاغَ عَلَيْهِمْ ضَرْبًۢا بِٱلْيَمِينِ

suras.text: Then the people came toward him, hastening.
suras.translation: Then the people came toward him, hastening.
suras.arabic: فَأَقْبَلُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِ يَزِفُّونَ

suras.text: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,
suras.translation: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَتَعْبُدُونَ مَا تَنْحِتُونَ

suras.text: While Allah created you and that which you do?"
suras.translation: While Allah created you and that which you do?"
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ خَلَقَكُمْ وَمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire."
suras.translation: They said, "Construct for him a furnace and throw him into the burning fire."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ ٱبْنُوا۟ لَهُۥ بُنْيَـٰنًا فَأَلْقُوهُ فِى ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased.
suras.translation: And they intended for him a plan, but We made them the most debased.
suras.arabic: فَأَرَادُوا۟ بِهِۦ كَيْدًا فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُمُ ٱلْأَسْفَلِينَ

suras.text: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.
suras.translation: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.
suras.arabic: وَقَالَ إِنِّى ذَاهِبٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّى سَيَهْدِينِ

suras.text: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."
suras.translation: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."
suras.arabic: رَبِّ هَبْ لِى مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: قَدْ صَدَّقْتَ ٱلرُّءْيَآ ۚ إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, this was the clear trial.
suras.translation: Indeed, this was the clear trial.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ ٱلْبَلَـٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلْمُبِينُ

suras.text: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,
suras.translation: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,
suras.arabic: وَفَدَيْنَـٰهُ بِذِبْحٍ عَظِيمٍ

suras.text: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself.
suras.translation: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself.
suras.arabic: وَبَـٰرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَىٰٓ إِسْحَـٰقَ ۚ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا مُحْسِنٌ وَظَالِمٌ لِّنَفْسِهِۦ مُبِينٌ

suras.text: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.
suras.translation: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.
suras.arabic: وَنَصَرْنَـٰهُمْ فَكَانُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْغَـٰلِبِينَ

suras.text: And We gave them the explicit Scripture,
suras.translation: And We gave them the explicit Scripture,
suras.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ٱلْمُسْتَبِينَ

suras.text: And We guided them on the straight path.
suras.translation: And We guided them on the straight path.
suras.arabic: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُمَا ٱلصِّرَٰطَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ

suras.text: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.translation: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِمَا فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.
suras.translation: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمَا مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,
suras.translation: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ إِلْيَاسَ لَمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: Do you call upon Ba\'l and leave the best of creators -
suras.translation: Do you call upon Ba\'l and leave the best of creators -
suras.arabic: أَتَدْعُونَ بَعْلًا وَتَذَرُونَ أَحْسَنَ ٱلْخَـٰلِقِينَ

suras.text: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"
suras.translation: Allah, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"
suras.arabic: ٱللَّهَ رَبَّكُمْ وَرَبَّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.translation: Except the chosen servants of Allah.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُخْلَصِينَ

suras.text: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:
suras.arabic: وَتَرَكْنَا عَلَيْهِ فِى ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ مِنْ عِبَادِنَا ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.
suras.translation: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ لُوطًا لَّمِنَ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
suras.translation: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّكُمْ لَتَمُرُّونَ عَلَيْهِم مُّصْبِحِينَ

suras.text: And at night. Then will you not use reason?
suras.translation: And at night. Then will you not use reason?
suras.arabic: وَبِٱلَّيْلِ ۗ أَفَلَا تَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.
suras.translation: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.
suras.arabic: إِذْ أَبَقَ إِلَى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ

suras.text: And he drew lots and was among the losers.
suras.translation: And he drew lots and was among the losers.
suras.arabic: فَسَاهَمَ فَكَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُدْحَضِينَ

suras.text: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah,
suras.translation: And had he not been of those who exalt Allah,
suras.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ أَنَّهُۥ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُسَبِّحِينَ

suras.text: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
suras.translation: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.
suras.arabic: لَلَبِثَ فِى بَطْنِهِۦٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ

suras.text: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.
suras.translation: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.
suras.arabic: وَأَنۢبَتْنَا عَلَيْهِ شَجَرَةً مِّن يَقْطِينٍ

suras.text: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
suras.translation: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.
suras.arabic: وَأَرْسَلْنَـٰهُ إِلَىٰ مِا۟ئَةِ أَلْفٍ أَوْ يَزِيدُونَ

suras.text: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.
suras.translation: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.
suras.arabic: فَـَٔامَنُوا۟ فَمَتَّعْنَـٰهُمْ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ

suras.text: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?
suras.translation: So inquire of them, [O Muhammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?
suras.arabic: فَٱسْتَفْتِهِمْ أَلِرَبِّكَ ٱلْبَنَاتُ وَلَهُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ

suras.text: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,
suras.translation: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,
suras.arabic: أَلَآ إِنَّهُم مِّنْ إِفْكِهِمْ لَيَقُولُونَ

suras.text: " Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.
suras.translation: " Allah has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.
suras.arabic: وَلَدَ ٱللَّهُ وَإِنَّهُمْ لَكَـٰذِبُونَ

suras.text: Has He chosen daughters over sons?
suras.translation: Has He chosen daughters over sons?
suras.arabic: أَصْطَفَى ٱلْبَنَاتِ عَلَى ٱلْبَنِينَ

suras.text: Then will you not be reminded?
suras.translation: Then will you not be reminded?
suras.arabic: أَفَلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: Or do you have a clear authority?
suras.translation: Or do you have a clear authority?
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَكُمْ سُلْطَـٰنٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.
suras.translation: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.
suras.arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِكِتَـٰبِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Exalted is Allah above what they describe,
suras.translation: Exalted is Allah above what they describe,
suras.arabic: سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ
