suras.text: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return."
suras.translation: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant return."
suras.arabic: أَءِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا ۖ ذَٰلِكَ رَجْعٌۢ بَعِيدٌ

suras.text: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record.
suras.translation: We know what the earth diminishes of them, and with Us is a retaining record.
suras.arabic: قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا تَنقُصُ ٱلْأَرْضُ مِنْهُمْ ۖ وَعِندَنَا كِتَـٰبٌ حَفِيظٌۢ

suras.text: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?
suras.translation: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?
suras.arabic: أَفَلَمْ يَنظُرُوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ فَوْقَهُمْ كَيْفَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا وَزَيَّنَّـٰهَا وَمَا لَهَا مِن فُرُوجٍ

suras.text: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,
suras.translation: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ مَدَدْنَـٰهَا وَأَلْقَيْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ وَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا مِن كُلِّ زَوْجٍۭ بَهِيجٍ

suras.text: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah].
suras.translation: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allah].
suras.arabic: تَبْصِرَةً وَذِكْرَىٰ لِكُلِّ عَبْدٍ مُّنِيبٍ

suras.text: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -
suras.translation: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -
suras.arabic: وَٱلنَّخْلَ بَاسِقَـٰتٍ لَّهَا طَلْعٌ نَّضِيدٌ

suras.text: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection.
suras.translation: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the resurrection.
suras.arabic: رِّزْقًا لِّلْعِبَادِ ۖ وَأَحْيَيْنَا بِهِۦ بَلْدَةً مَّيْتًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلْخُرُوجُ

suras.text: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.
suras.translation: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.
suras.arabic: أَفَعَيِينَا بِٱلْخَلْقِ ٱلْأَوَّلِ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ فِى لَبْسٍ مِّنْ خَلْقٍ جَدِيدٍ

suras.text: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein
suras.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ وَنَعْلَمُ مَا تُوَسْوِسُ بِهِۦ نَفْسُهُۥ ۖ وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ ٱلْوَرِيدِ

suras.text: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left.
suras.translation: When the two receivers receive, seated on the right and on the left.
suras.arabic: إِذْ يَتَلَقَّى ٱلْمُتَلَقِّيَانِ عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ قَعِيدٌ

suras.text: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].
suras.translation: Man does not utter any word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].
suras.arabic: مَّا يَلْفِظُ مِن قَوْلٍ إِلَّا لَدَيْهِ رَقِيبٌ عَتِيدٌ

suras.text: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.
suras.translation: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.
suras.arabic: وَجَآءَتْ سَكْرَةُ ٱلْمَوْتِ بِٱلْحَقِّ ۖ ذَٰلِكَ مَا كُنتَ مِنْهُ تَحِيدُ

suras.text: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.
suras.translation: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.
suras.arabic: وَجَآءَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّعَهَا سَآئِقٌ وَشَهِيدٌ

suras.text: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."
suras.translation: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."
suras.arabic: لَّقَدْ كُنتَ فِى غَفْلَةٍ مِّنْ هَـٰذَا فَكَشَفْنَا عَنكَ غِطَآءَكَ فَبَصَرُكَ ٱلْيَوْمَ حَدِيدٌ

suras.text: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."
suras.translation: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."
suras.arabic: وَقَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ هَـٰذَا مَا لَدَىَّ عَتِيدٌ

suras.text: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
suras.translation: [Allah will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,
suras.arabic: أَلْقِيَا فِى جَهَنَّمَ كُلَّ كَفَّارٍ عَنِيدٍ

suras.text: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,
suras.translation: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,
suras.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ مُّرِيبٍ

suras.text: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."
suras.translation: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."
suras.arabic: ۞ قَالَ قَرِينُهُۥ رَبَّنَا مَآ أَطْغَيْتُهُۥ وَلَـٰكِن كَانَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍۭ بَعِيدٍ

suras.text: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning.
suras.translation: [Allah] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the warning.
suras.arabic: قَالَ لَا تَخْتَصِمُوا۟ لَدَىَّ وَقَدْ قَدَّمْتُ إِلَيْكُم بِٱلْوَعِيدِ

suras.text: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."
suras.translation: The word will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."
suras.arabic: مَا يُبَدَّلُ ٱلْقَوْلُ لَدَىَّ وَمَآ أَنَا۠ بِظَلَّـٰمٍ لِّلْعَبِيدِ

suras.text: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,
suras.translation: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,
suras.arabic: وَأُزْلِفَتِ ٱلْجَنَّةُ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ غَيْرَ بَعِيدٍ

suras.text: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]
suras.translation: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allah] and keeper [of His covenant]
suras.arabic: هَـٰذَا مَا تُوعَدُونَ لِكُلِّ أَوَّابٍ حَفِيظٍ

suras.text: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].
suras.translation: Who feared the Most Merciful unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].
suras.arabic: مَّنْ خَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ وَجَآءَ بِقَلْبٍ مُّنِيبٍ

suras.text: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
suras.translation: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.
suras.arabic: لَهُم مَّا يَشَآءُونَ فِيهَا وَلَدَيْنَا مَزِيدٌ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَذِكْرَىٰ لِمَن كَانَ لَهُۥ قَلْبٌ أَوْ أَلْقَى ٱلسَّمْعَ وَهُوَ شَهِيدٌ

suras.text: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.
suras.translation: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ وَمَا مَسَّنَا مِن لُّغُوبٍ

suras.text: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,
suras.translation: So be patient, [O Muhammad], over what they say and exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,
suras.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ قَبْلَ طُلُوعِ ٱلشَّمْسِ وَقَبْلَ ٱلْغُرُوبِ

suras.text: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration.
suras.translation: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration.
suras.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَأَدْبَـٰرَ ٱلسُّجُودِ

suras.text: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
suras.translation: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِۦ وَنُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْنَا ٱلْمَصِيرُ

suras.text: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur\'an whoever fears My threat.
suras.translation: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur\'an whoever fears My threat.
suras.arabic: نَّحْنُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يَقُولُونَ ۖ وَمَآ أَنتَ عَلَيْهِم بِجَبَّارٍ ۖ فَذَكِّرْ بِٱلْقُرْءَانِ مَن يَخَافُ وَعِيدِ

suras.text: By those [winds] scattering [dust] dispersing
suras.translation: By those [winds] scattering [dust] dispersing
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلذَّٰرِيَـٰتِ ذَرْوًا

suras.text: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
suras.translation: And those [clouds] carrying a load [of water]
suras.arabic: فَٱلْحَـٰمِلَـٰتِ وِقْرًا

suras.text: And those [ships] sailing with ease
suras.translation: And those [ships] sailing with ease
suras.arabic: فَٱلْجَـٰرِيَـٰتِ يُسْرًا

suras.text: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter,
suras.translation: And those [angels] apportioning [each] matter,
suras.arabic: فَٱلْمُقَسِّمَـٰتِ أَمْرًا

suras.text: Indeed, what you are promised is true.
suras.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is true.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَصَادِقٌ

suras.text: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.
suras.translation: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلدِّينَ لَوَٰقِعٌ

suras.text: By the heaven containing pathways,
suras.translation: By the heaven containing pathways,
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْحُبُكِ

suras.text: Indeed, you are in differing speech.
suras.translation: Indeed, you are in differing speech.
suras.arabic: إِنَّكُمْ لَفِى قَوْلٍ مُّخْتَلِفٍ

suras.text: Deluded away from the Qur\'an is he who is deluded.
suras.translation: Deluded away from the Qur\'an is he who is deluded.
suras.arabic: يُؤْفَكُ عَنْهُ مَنْ أُفِكَ

suras.text: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
suras.translation: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى غَمْرَةٍ سَاهُونَ

suras.text: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
suras.translation: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ هُمْ عَلَى ٱلنَّارِ يُفْتَنُونَ

suras.text: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."
suras.translation: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."
suras.arabic: ذُوقُوا۟ فِتْنَتَكُمْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَسْتَعْجِلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ

suras.text: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.
suras.translation: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.
suras.arabic: ءَاخِذِينَ مَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ ۚ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: They used to sleep but little of the night,
suras.translation: They used to sleep but little of the night,
suras.arabic: كَانُوا۟ قَلِيلًا مِّنَ ٱلَّيْلِ مَا يَهْجَعُونَ

suras.text: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
suras.translation: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,
suras.arabic: وَبِٱلْأَسْحَارِ هُمْ يَسْتَغْفِرُونَ

suras.text: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
suras.translation: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.
suras.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ

suras.text: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
suras.translation: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]
suras.arabic: وَفِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ءَايَـٰتٌ لِّلْمُوقِنِينَ

suras.text: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
suras.translation: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?
suras.arabic: وَفِىٓ أَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ أَفَلَا تُبْصِرُونَ

suras.text: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.
suras.translation: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.
suras.arabic: وَفِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ رِزْقُكُمْ وَمَا تُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.
suras.translation: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.
suras.arabic: فَوَرَبِّ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّهُۥ لَحَقٌّ مِّثْلَ مَآ أَنَّكُمْ تَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
suras.translation: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf
suras.arabic: فَرَاغَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ فَجَآءَ بِعِجْلٍ سَمِينٍ

suras.text: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"
suras.translation: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"
suras.arabic: فَقَرَّبَهُۥٓ إِلَيْهِمْ قَالَ أَلَا تَأْكُلُونَ

suras.text: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.
suras.translation: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.
suras.arabic: فَأَوْجَسَ مِنْهُمْ خِيفَةً ۖ قَالُوا۟ لَا تَخَفْ ۖ وَبَشَّرُوهُ بِغُلَـٰمٍ عَلِيمٍ

suras.text: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."
suras.translation: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ كَذَٰلِكِ قَالَ رَبُّكِ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْحَكِيمُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ

suras.text: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
suras.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"
suras.arabic: ۞ قَالَ فَمَا خَطْبُكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
suras.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ أُرْسِلْنَآ إِلَىٰ قَوْمٍ مُّجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: To send down upon them stones of clay,
suras.translation: To send down upon them stones of clay,
suras.arabic: لِنُرْسِلَ عَلَيْهِمْ حِجَارَةً مِّن طِينٍ

suras.text: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."
suras.translation: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."
suras.arabic: مُّسَوَّمَةً عِندَ رَبِّكَ لِلْمُسْرِفِينَ

suras.text: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers.
suras.translation: So We brought out whoever was in the cities of the believers.
suras.arabic: فَأَخْرَجْنَا مَن كَانَ فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman."
suras.translation: But he turned away with his supporters and said," A magician or a madman."
suras.arabic: فَتَوَلَّىٰ بِرُكْنِهِۦ وَقَالَ سَـٰحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ

suras.text: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.
suras.translation: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.
suras.arabic: مَا تَذَرُ مِن شَىْءٍ أَتَتْ عَلَيْهِ إِلَّا جَعَلَتْهُ كَٱلرَّمِيمِ

suras.text: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."
suras.translation: And in Thamud, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."
suras.arabic: وَفِى ثَمُودَ إِذْ قِيلَ لَهُمْ تَمَتَّعُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ حِينٍ

suras.text: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.
suras.translation: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.
suras.arabic: فَعَتَوْا۟ عَنْ أَمْرِ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَتْهُمُ ٱلصَّـٰعِقَةُ وَهُمْ يَنظُرُونَ

suras.text: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.
suras.translation: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.
suras.arabic: فَمَا ٱسْتَطَـٰعُوا۟ مِن قِيَامٍ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنتَصِرِينَ

suras.text: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.
suras.translation: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ بَنَيْنَـٰهَا بِأَيْي۟دٍ وَإِنَّا لَمُوسِعُونَ

suras.text: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.
suras.translation: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ فَرَشْنَـٰهَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَـٰهِدُونَ

suras.text: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember.
suras.translation: And of all things We created two mates; perhaps you will remember.
suras.arabic: وَمِن كُلِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَا زَوْجَيْنِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
suras.translation: So flee to Allah. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
suras.arabic: فَفِرُّوٓا۟ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
suras.translation: And do not make [as equal] with Allah another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَجْعَلُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ إِلَـٰهًا ءَاخَرَ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُم مِّنْهُ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."
suras.translation: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."
suras.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ مَآ أَتَى ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا قَالُوا۟ سَاحِرٌ أَوْ مَجْنُونٌ

suras.text: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.
suras.translation: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.
suras.arabic: أَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِهِۦ ۚ بَلْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ

suras.text: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed.
suras.translation: So leave them, [O Muhammad], for you are not to be blamed.
suras.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِمَلُومٍ

suras.text: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.
suras.translation: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.
suras.arabic: وَذَكِّرْ فَإِنَّ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ تَنفَعُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
suras.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.
suras.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ ٱلْجِنَّ وَٱلْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ

suras.text: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
suras.translation: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.
suras.arabic: مَآ أُرِيدُ مِنْهُم مِّن رِّزْقٍ وَمَآ أُرِيدُ أَن يُطْعِمُونِ

suras.text: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is Allah who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلرَّزَّاقُ ذُو ٱلْقُوَّةِ ٱلْمَتِينُ

suras.text: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
suras.translation: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.
suras.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ مِن يَوْمِهِمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: And [by] the heaven raised high
suras.translation: And [by] the heaven raised high
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ

suras.text: And [by] the sea filled [with fire],
suras.translation: And [by] the sea filled [with fire],
suras.arabic: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ

suras.text: And the mountains will pass on, departing -
suras.translation: And the mountains will pass on, departing -
suras.arabic: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًا

suras.text: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,
suras.translation: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,
suras.arabic: فَوَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
suras.translation: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍ يَلْعَبُونَ

suras.text: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],
suras.translation: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا

suras.text: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.
suras.translation: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.
suras.arabic: هَـٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."
suras.translation: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."
suras.arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَعِيمٍ

suras.text: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
suras.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
suras.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
suras.translation: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
suras.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّصْفُوفَةٍ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ

suras.text: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
suras.translation: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَـٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَـٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌ

suras.text: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.
suras.translation: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.
suras.arabic: وَأَمْدَدْنَـٰهُم بِفَـٰكِهَةٍ وَلَحْمٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ

suras.text: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
suras.translation: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.
suras.arabic: يَتَنَـٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا لَّا لَغْوٌ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌ

suras.text: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
suras.translation: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌ مَّكْنُونٌ

suras.text: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah].
suras.translation: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allah].
suras.arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."
suras.translation: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
suras.translation: So remind [O Muhammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.
suras.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ

suras.text: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time?"
suras.translation: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time?"
suras.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ

suras.text: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."
suras.translation: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."
suras.arabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ

suras.text: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
suras.translation: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?
suras.arabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَـٰمُهُم بِهَـٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌ طَاغُونَ

suras.text: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.
suras.translation: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.
suras.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.
suras.translation: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.
suras.arabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
suras.translation: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?
suras.arabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ

suras.text: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
suras.translation: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.
suras.arabic: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ

suras.text: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
suras.translation: Or have they the depositories [containing the provision] of your Lord? Or are they the controllers [of them]?
suras.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ

suras.text: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority.
suras.translation: Or have they a stairway [into the heaven] upon which they listen? Then let their listener produce a clear authority.
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: Or has He daughters while you have sons?
suras.translation: Or has He daughters while you have sons?
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَـٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ

suras.text: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
suras.translation: Or do you, [O Muhammad], ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
suras.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ

suras.text: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
suras.translation: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
suras.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ

suras.text: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.translation: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَـٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

suras.text: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."
suras.translation: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up."
suras.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌ مَّرْكُومٌ

suras.text: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
suras.translation: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible -
suras.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ

suras.text: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
suras.translation: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ

suras.text: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise.
suras.translation: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise.
suras.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ

suras.text: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
suras.translation: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars.
suras.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ

suras.text: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,
suras.translation: Your companion [Muhammad] has not strayed, nor has he erred,
suras.arabic: مَا ضَلَّ صَاحِبُكُمْ وَمَا غَوَىٰ

suras.text: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.
suras.translation: Nor does he speak from [his own] inclination.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَنطِقُ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰٓ

suras.text: It is not but a revelation revealed,
suras.translation: It is not but a revelation revealed,
suras.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا وَحْىٌ يُوحَىٰ

suras.text: Taught to him by one intense in strength -
suras.translation: Taught to him by one intense in strength -
suras.arabic: عَلَّمَهُۥ شَدِيدُ ٱلْقُوَىٰ

suras.text: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
suras.translation: One of soundness. And he rose to [his] true form
suras.arabic: ذُو مِرَّةٍ فَٱسْتَوَىٰ

suras.text: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.
suras.translation: And was at a distance of two bow lengths or nearer.
suras.arabic: فَكَانَ قَابَ قَوْسَيْنِ أَوْ أَدْنَىٰ

suras.text: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed.
suras.translation: And he revealed to His Servant what he revealed.
suras.arabic: فَأَوْحَىٰٓ إِلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦ مَآ أَوْحَىٰ

suras.text: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.
suras.translation: The heart did not lie [about] what it saw.
suras.arabic: مَا كَذَبَ ٱلْفُؤَادُ مَا رَأَىٰٓ

suras.text: So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
suras.translation: So will you dispute with him over what he saw?
suras.arabic: أَفَتُمَـٰرُونَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَا يَرَىٰ

suras.text: And he certainly saw him in another descent
suras.translation: And he certainly saw him in another descent
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ نَزْلَةً أُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -
suras.translation: At the Lote Tree of the Utmost Boundary -
suras.arabic: عِندَ سِدْرَةِ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ

suras.text: Near it is the Garden of Refuge -
suras.translation: Near it is the Garden of Refuge -
suras.arabic: عِندَهَا جَنَّةُ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰٓ

suras.text: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
suras.translation: When there covered the Lote Tree that which covered [it].
suras.arabic: إِذْ يَغْشَى ٱلسِّدْرَةَ مَا يَغْشَىٰ

suras.text: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].
suras.translation: The sight [of the Prophet] did not swerve, nor did it transgress [its limit].
suras.arabic: مَا زَاغَ ٱلْبَصَرُ وَمَا طَغَىٰ

suras.text: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.
suras.translation: He certainly saw of the greatest signs of his Lord.
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ

suras.text: So have you considered al-Lat and al-\'Uzza?
suras.translation: So have you considered al-Lat and al-\'Uzza?
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱللَّـٰتَ وَٱلْعُزَّىٰ

suras.text: And Manat, the third - the other one?
suras.translation: And Manat, the third - the other one?
suras.arabic: وَمَنَوٰةَ ٱلثَّالِثَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰٓ

suras.text: Is the male for you and for Him the female?
suras.translation: Is the male for you and for Him the female?
suras.arabic: أَلَكُمُ ٱلذَّكَرُ وَلَهُ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ

suras.text: That, then, is an unjust division.
suras.translation: That, then, is an unjust division.
suras.arabic: تِلْكَ إِذًا قِسْمَةٌ ضِيزَىٰٓ

suras.text: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allah has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.
suras.translation: They are not but [mere] names you have named them - you and your forefathers - for which Allah has sent down no authority. They follow not except assumption and what [their] souls desire, and there has already come to them from their Lord guidance.
suras.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّآ أَسْمَآءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَآ أَنتُمْ وَءَابَآؤُكُم مَّآ أَنزَلَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَـٰنٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى ٱلْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ

suras.text: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?
suras.translation: Or is there for man whatever he wishes?
suras.arabic: أَمْ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ مَا تَمَنَّىٰ

suras.text: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
suras.translation: Rather, to Allah belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
suras.arabic: فَلِلَّهِ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.
suras.translation: And how many angels there are in the heavens whose intercession will not avail at all except [only] after Allah has permitted [it] to whom He wills and approves.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ لَا تُغْنِى شَفَـٰعَتُهُمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ ٱللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَآءُ وَيَرْضَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,
suras.translation: Indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter name the angels female names,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱلْـَٔاخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ ٱلْأُنثَىٰ

suras.text: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.
suras.translation: And they have thereof no knowledge. They follow not except assumption, and indeed, assumption avails not against the truth at all.
suras.arabic: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا ٱلظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ ٱلظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱلْحَقِّ شَيْـًٔا

suras.text: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.
suras.translation: So turn away from whoever turns his back on Our message and desires not except the worldly life.
suras.arabic: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا

suras.text: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.
suras.translation: That is their sum of knowledge. Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who strays from His way, and He is most knowing of who is guided.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ ٱهْتَدَىٰ

suras.text: Have you seen the one who turned away
suras.translation: Have you seen the one who turned away
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَوَلَّىٰ

suras.text: And gave a little and [then] refrained?
suras.translation: And gave a little and [then] refrained?
suras.arabic: وَأَعْطَىٰ قَلِيلًا وَأَكْدَىٰٓ

suras.text: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?
suras.translation: Does he have knowledge of the unseen, so he sees?
suras.arabic: أَعِندَهُۥ عِلْمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَهُوَ يَرَىٰٓ

suras.text: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses
suras.translation: Or has he not been informed of what was in the scriptures of Moses
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِى صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ

suras.text: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -
suras.translation: And [of] Abraham, who fulfilled [his obligations] -
suras.arabic: وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ ٱلَّذِى وَفَّىٰٓ

suras.text: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another
suras.translation: That no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another
suras.arabic: أَلَّا تَزِرُ وَازِرَةٌ وِزْرَ أُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives
suras.translation: And that there is not for man except that [good] for which he strives
suras.arabic: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَـٰنِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ

suras.text: And that his effort is going to be seen -
suras.translation: And that his effort is going to be seen -
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّ سَعْيَهُۥ سَوْفَ يُرَىٰ

suras.text: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense
suras.translation: Then he will be recompensed for it with the fullest recompense
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ يُجْزَىٰهُ ٱلْجَزَآءَ ٱلْأَوْفَىٰ

suras.text: And that to your Lord is the finality
suras.translation: And that to your Lord is the finality
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلْمُنتَهَىٰ

suras.text: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
suras.translation: And that it is He who makes [one] laugh and weep
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَضْحَكَ وَأَبْكَىٰ

suras.text: And that it is He who causes death and gives life
suras.translation: And that it is He who causes death and gives life
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَمَاتَ وَأَحْيَا

suras.text: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -
suras.translation: And that He creates the two mates - the male and female -
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ خَلَقَ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰ

suras.text: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
suras.translation: From a sperm-drop when it is emitted
suras.arabic: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ إِذَا تُمْنَىٰ

suras.text: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation
suras.translation: And that [incumbent] upon Him is the next creation
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّ عَلَيْهِ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُخْرَىٰ

suras.text: And that it is He who enriches and suffices
suras.translation: And that it is He who enriches and suffices
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ أَغْنَىٰ وَأَقْنَىٰ

suras.text: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius
suras.translation: And that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ هُوَ رَبُّ ٱلشِّعْرَىٰ

suras.text: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -
suras.translation: And Thamud - and He did not spare [them] -
suras.arabic: وَثَمُودَا۟ فَمَآ أَبْقَىٰ

suras.text: And the overturned towns He hurled down
suras.translation: And the overturned towns He hurled down
suras.arabic: وَٱلْمُؤْتَفِكَةَ أَهْوَىٰ

suras.text: And covered them by that which He covered.
suras.translation: And covered them by that which He covered.
suras.arabic: فَغَشَّىٰهَا مَا غَشَّىٰ

suras.text: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
suras.translation: Then which of the favors of your Lord do you doubt?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكَ تَتَمَارَىٰ

suras.text: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.
suras.translation: This [Prophet] is a warner like the former warners.
suras.arabic: هَـٰذَا نَذِيرٌ مِّنَ ٱلنُّذُرِ ٱلْأُولَىٰٓ

suras.text: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.
suras.translation: Of it, [from those] besides Allah, there is no remover.
suras.arabic: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ

suras.text: Then at this statement do you wonder?
suras.translation: Then at this statement do you wonder?
suras.arabic: أَفَمِنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ تَعْجَبُونَ

suras.text: While you are proudly sporting?
suras.translation: While you are proudly sporting?
suras.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ سَـٰمِدُونَ

suras.text: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].
suras.translation: So prostrate to Allah and worship [Him].
suras.arabic: فَٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِلَّهِ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ ۩

suras.text: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
suras.translation: The Hour has come near, and the moon has split [in two].
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْتَرَبَتِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ وَٱنشَقَّ ٱلْقَمَرُ

suras.text: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
suras.translation: And if they see a miracle, they turn away and say, "Passing magic."
suras.arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ ءَايَةً يُعْرِضُوا۟ وَيَقُولُوا۟ سِحْرٌ مُّسْتَمِرٌّ

suras.text: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -
suras.translation: And there has already come to them of information that in which there is deterrence -
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَنۢبَآءِ مَا فِيهِ مُزْدَجَرٌ

suras.text: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
suras.translation: Extensive wisdom - but warning does not avail [them].
suras.arabic: حِكْمَةٌۢ بَـٰلِغَةٌ ۖ فَمَا تُغْنِ ٱلنُّذُرُ

suras.text: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
suras.translation: So leave them, [O Muhammad]. The Day the Caller calls to something forbidding,
suras.arabic: فَتَوَلَّ عَنْهُمْ ۘ يَوْمَ يَدْعُ ٱلدَّاعِ إِلَىٰ شَىْءٍ نُّكُرٍ

suras.text: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
suras.translation: Their eyes humbled, they will emerge from the graves as if they were locusts spreading,
suras.arabic: خُشَّعًا أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ كَأَنَّهُمْ جَرَادٌ مُّنتَشِرٌ

suras.text: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
suras.translation: So he invoked his Lord, "Indeed, I am overpowered, so help."
suras.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنِّى مَغْلُوبٌ فَٱنتَصِرْ

suras.text: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
suras.translation: Then We opened the gates of the heaven with rain pouring down
suras.arabic: فَفَتَحْنَآ أَبْوَٰبَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ بِمَآءٍ مُّنْهَمِرٍ

suras.text: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
suras.translation: And caused the earth to burst with springs, and the waters met for a matter already predestined.
suras.arabic: وَفَجَّرْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ عُيُونًا فَٱلْتَقَى ٱلْمَآءُ عَلَىٰٓ أَمْرٍ قَدْ قُدِرَ

suras.text: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
suras.translation: And We carried him on a [construction of] planks and nails,
suras.arabic: وَحَمَلْنَـٰهُ عَلَىٰ ذَاتِ أَلْوَٰحٍ وَدُسُرٍ

suras.text: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
suras.translation: Sailing under Our observation as reward for he who had been denied.
suras.arabic: تَجْرِى بِأَعْيُنِنَا جَزَآءً لِّمَن كَانَ كُفِرَ

suras.text: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
suras.translation: And We left it as a sign, so is there any who will remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَد تَّرَكْنَـٰهَآ ءَايَةً فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

suras.text: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

suras.text: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
suras.translation: Extracting the people as if they were trunks of palm trees uprooted.
suras.arabic: تَنزِعُ ٱلنَّاسَ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ مُّنقَعِرٍ

suras.text: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

suras.text: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
suras.translation: And said, "Is it one human being among us that we should follow? Indeed, we would then be in error and madness.
suras.arabic: فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرًا مِّنَّا وَٰحِدًا نَّتَّبِعُهُۥٓ إِنَّآ إِذًا لَّفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ

suras.text: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
suras.translation: Has the message been sent down upon him from among us? Rather, he is an insolent liar."
suras.arabic: أَءُلْقِىَ ٱلذِّكْرُ عَلَيْهِ مِنۢ بَيْنِنَا بَلْ هُوَ كَذَّابٌ أَشِرٌ

suras.text: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
suras.translation: They will know tomorrow who is the insolent liar.
suras.arabic: سَيَعْلَمُونَ غَدًا مَّنِ ٱلْكَذَّابُ ٱلْأَشِرُ

suras.text: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
suras.translation: Indeed, We are sending the she-camel as trial for them, so watch them and be patient.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا مُرْسِلُوا۟ ٱلنَّاقَةِ فِتْنَةً لَّهُمْ فَٱرْتَقِبْهُمْ وَٱصْطَبِرْ

suras.text: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
suras.translation: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].
suras.arabic: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍ مُّحْتَضَرٌ

suras.text: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
suras.translation: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].
suras.arabic: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ

suras.text: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

suras.text: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
suras.translation: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.
suras.arabic: نِّعْمَةً مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ

suras.text: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.translation: And We have certainly made the Qur\'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍ

suras.text: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
suras.translation: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?
suras.arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌ مُّنتَصِرٌ

suras.text: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
suras.translation: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].
suras.arabic: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ

suras.text: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.
suras.translation: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ وَسُعُرٍ

suras.text: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
suras.translation: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ

suras.text: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
suras.translation: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَـٰهُ بِقَدَرٍ

suras.text: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
suras.translation: And Our command is but one, like a glance of the eye.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَمْرُنَآ إِلَّا وَٰحِدَةٌ كَلَمْحٍۭ بِٱلْبَصَرِ

suras.text: And everything they did is in written records.
suras.translation: And everything they did is in written records.
suras.arabic: وَكُلُّ شَىْءٍ فَعَلُوهُ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ

suras.text: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
suras.translation: And every small and great [thing] is inscribed.
suras.arabic: وَكُلُّ صَغِيرٍ وَكَبِيرٍ مُّسْتَطَرٌ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and rivers,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَنَهَرٍ

suras.text: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
suras.translation: In a seat of honor near a Sovereign, Perfect in Ability.
suras.arabic: فِى مَقْعَدِ صِدْقٍ عِندَ مَلِيكٍ مُّقْتَدِرٍۭ

suras.text: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,
suras.translation: The sun and the moon [move] by precise calculation,
suras.arabic: ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ بِحُسْبَانٍ

suras.text: And the stars and trees prostrate.
suras.translation: And the stars and trees prostrate.
suras.arabic: وَٱلنَّجْمُ وَٱلشَّجَرُ يَسْجُدَانِ

suras.text: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
suras.translation: And the heaven He raised and imposed the balance
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءَ رَفَعَهَا وَوَضَعَ ٱلْمِيزَانَ

suras.text: That you not transgress within the balance.
suras.translation: That you not transgress within the balance.
suras.arabic: أَلَّا تَطْغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْمِيزَانِ

suras.text: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
suras.translation: And the earth He laid [out] for the creatures.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ

suras.text: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
suras.translation: Therein is fruit and palm trees having sheaths [of dates]
suras.arabic: فِيهَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَٱلنَّخْلُ ذَاتُ ٱلْأَكْمَامِ

suras.text: And grain having husks and scented plants.
suras.translation: And grain having husks and scented plants.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْحَبُّ ذُو ٱلْعَصْفِ وَٱلرَّيْحَانُ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.
suras.translation: He created man from clay like [that of] pottery.
suras.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِن صَلْصَـٰلٍ كَٱلْفَخَّارِ

suras.text: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
suras.translation: And He created the jinn from a smokeless flame of fire.
suras.arabic: وَخَلَقَ ٱلْجَآنَّ مِن مَّارِجٍ مِّن نَّارٍ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.
suras.translation: [He is] Lord of the two sunrises and Lord of the two sunsets.
suras.arabic: رَبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقَيْنِ وَرَبُّ ٱلْمَغْرِبَيْنِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];
suras.translation: He released the two seas, meeting [side by side];
suras.arabic: مَرَجَ ٱلْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ

suras.text: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.
suras.translation: Between them is a barrier [so] neither of them transgresses.
suras.arabic: بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَّا يَبْغِيَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.
suras.translation: From both of them emerge pearl and coral.
suras.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنْهُمَا ٱللُّؤْلُؤُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
suras.translation: And to Him belong the ships [with sails] elevated in the sea like mountains.
suras.arabic: وَلَهُ ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْمُنشَـَٔاتُ فِى ٱلْبَحْرِ كَٱلْأَعْلَـٰمِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Everyone upon the earth will perish,
suras.translation: Everyone upon the earth will perish,
suras.arabic: كُلُّ مَنْ عَلَيْهَا فَانٍ

suras.text: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
suras.translation: And there will remain the Face of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
suras.arabic: وَيَبْقَىٰ وَجْهُ رَبِّكَ ذُو ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
suras.translation: Whoever is within the heavens and earth asks Him; every day He is bringing about a matter.
suras.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُهُۥ مَن فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ هُوَ فِى شَأْنٍ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.
suras.translation: We will attend to you, O prominent beings.
suras.arabic: سَنَفْرُغُ لَكُمْ أَيُّهَ ٱلثَّقَلَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].
suras.translation: O company of jinn and mankind, if you are able to pass beyond the regions of the heavens and the earth, then pass. You will not pass except by authority [from Allah].
suras.arabic: يَـٰمَعْشَرَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ إِنِ ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ أَن تَنفُذُوا۟ مِنْ أَقْطَارِ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ فَٱنفُذُوا۟ ۚ لَا تَنفُذُونَ إِلَّا بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
suras.translation: Then on that Day none will be asked about his sin among men or jinn.
suras.arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ لَّا يُسْـَٔلُ عَن ذَنۢبِهِۦٓ إِنسٌ وَلَا جَآنٌّ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
suras.translation: The criminals will be known by their marks, and they will be seized by the forelocks and the feet.
suras.arabic: يُعْرَفُ ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ بِسِيمَـٰهُمْ فَيُؤْخَذُ بِٱلنَّوَٰصِى وَٱلْأَقْدَامِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
suras.translation: This is Hell, which the criminals deny.
suras.arabic: هَـٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى يُكَذِّبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُجْرِمُونَ

suras.text: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].
suras.translation: They will go around between it and scalding water, heated [to the utmost degree].
suras.arabic: يَطُوفُونَ بَيْنَهَا وَبَيْنَ حَمِيمٍ ءَانٍ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -
suras.translation: But for he who has feared the position of his Lord are two gardens -
suras.arabic: وَلِمَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ جَنَّتَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In both of them are two springs, flowing.
suras.translation: In both of them are two springs, flowing.
suras.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ تَجْرِيَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.
suras.translation: In both of them are of every fruit, two kinds.
suras.arabic: فِيهِمَا مِن كُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ زَوْجَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
suras.translation: [They are] reclining on beds whose linings are of silk brocade, and the fruit of the two gardens is hanging low.
suras.arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ فُرُشٍۭ بَطَآئِنُهَا مِنْ إِسْتَبْرَقٍ ۚ وَجَنَى ٱلْجَنَّتَيْنِ دَانٍ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -
suras.translation: In them are women limiting [their] glances, untouched before them by man or jinni -
suras.arabic: فِيهِنَّ قَـٰصِرَٰتُ ٱلطَّرْفِ لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: As if they were rubies and coral.
suras.translation: As if they were rubies and coral.
suras.arabic: كَأَنَّهُنَّ ٱلْيَاقُوتُ وَٱلْمَرْجَانُ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?
suras.translation: Is the reward for good [anything] but good?
suras.arabic: هَلْ جَزَآءُ ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنِ إِلَّا ٱلْإِحْسَـٰنُ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -
suras.translation: And below them both [in excellence] are two [other] gardens -
suras.arabic: وَمِن دُونِهِمَا جَنَّتَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In both of them are two springs, spouting.
suras.translation: In both of them are two springs, spouting.
suras.arabic: فِيهِمَا عَيْنَانِ نَضَّاخَتَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.
suras.translation: In both of them are fruit and palm trees and pomegranates.
suras.arabic: فِيهِمَا فَـٰكِهَةٌ وَنَخْلٌ وَرُمَّانٌ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: In them are good and beautiful women -
suras.translation: In them are good and beautiful women -
suras.arabic: فِيهِنَّ خَيْرَٰتٌ حِسَانٌ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -
suras.translation: Fair ones reserved in pavilions -
suras.arabic: حُورٌ مَّقْصُورَٰتٌ فِى ٱلْخِيَامِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Untouched before them by man or jinni -
suras.translation: Untouched before them by man or jinni -
suras.arabic: لَمْ يَطْمِثْهُنَّ إِنسٌ قَبْلَهُمْ وَلَا جَآنٌّ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny? -
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.translation: So which of the favors of your Lord would you deny?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ ءَالَآءِ رَبِّكُمَا تُكَذِّبَانِ

suras.text: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
suras.translation: Blessed is the name of your Lord, Owner of Majesty and Honor.
suras.arabic: تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱسْمُ رَبِّكَ ذِى ٱلْجَلَـٰلِ وَٱلْإِكْرَامِ

suras.text: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
suras.translation: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
suras.arabic: لَيْسَ لِوَقْعَتِهَا كَاذِبَةٌ

suras.text: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].
suras.translation: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].
suras.arabic: خَافِضَةٌ رَّافِعَةٌ

suras.text: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
suras.translation: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
suras.arabic: إِذَا رُجَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ رَجًّا

suras.text: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
suras.translation: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
suras.arabic: وَبُسَّتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ بَسًّا

suras.text: And you become [of] three kinds:
suras.translation: And you become [of] three kinds:
suras.arabic: وَكُنتُمْ أَزْوَٰجًا ثَلَـٰثَةً

suras.text: And the forerunners, the forerunners -
suras.translation: And the forerunners, the forerunners -
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ ٱلسَّـٰبِقُونَ

suras.text: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
suras.translation: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
suras.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

suras.text: A [large] company of the former peoples
suras.translation: A [large] company of the former peoples
suras.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: And a few of the later peoples,
suras.translation: And a few of the later peoples,
suras.arabic: وَقَلِيلٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: On thrones woven [with ornament],
suras.translation: On thrones woven [with ornament],
suras.arabic: عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍ مَّوْضُونَةٍ

suras.text: Reclining on them, facing each other.
suras.translation: Reclining on them, facing each other.
suras.arabic: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَيْهَا مُتَقَـٰبِلِينَ

suras.text: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
suras.translation: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
suras.arabic: يَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ

suras.text: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -
suras.translation: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -
suras.arabic: بِأَكْوَابٍ وَأَبَارِيقَ وَكَأْسٍ مِّن مَّعِينٍ

suras.text: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
suras.translation: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
suras.arabic: وَلَحْمِ طَيْرٍ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ

suras.text: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
suras.translation: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
suras.arabic: وَحُورٌ عِينٌ

suras.text: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,
suras.translation: The likenesses of pearls well-protected,
suras.arabic: كَأَمْثَـٰلِ ٱللُّؤْلُؤِ ٱلْمَكْنُونِ

suras.text: As reward for what they used to do.
suras.translation: As reward for what they used to do.
suras.arabic: جَزَآءًۢ بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
suras.translation: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
suras.arabic: لَا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا تَأْثِيمًا

suras.text: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."
suras.translation: Only a saying: "Peace, peace."
suras.arabic: إِلَّا قِيلًا سَلَـٰمًا سَلَـٰمًا

suras.text: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
suras.translation: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
suras.arabic: فِى سِدْرٍ مَّخْضُودٍ

suras.text: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
suras.translation: And [banana] trees layered [with fruit]
suras.arabic: وَطَلْحٍ مَّنضُودٍ

suras.text: And fruit, abundant [and varied],
suras.translation: And fruit, abundant [and varied],
suras.arabic: وَفَـٰكِهَةٍ كَثِيرَةٍ

suras.text: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,
suras.translation: Neither limited [to season] nor forbidden,
suras.arabic: لَّا مَقْطُوعَةٍ وَلَا مَمْنُوعَةٍ

suras.text: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
suras.translation: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
suras.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنشَأْنَـٰهُنَّ إِنشَآءً

suras.text: A company of the former peoples
suras.translation: A company of the former peoples
suras.arabic: ثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: And a company of the later peoples.
suras.translation: And a company of the later peoples.
suras.arabic: وَثُلَّةٌ مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
suras.translation: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
suras.arabic: فِى سَمُومٍ وَحَمِيمٍ

suras.text: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
suras.translation: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَبْلَ ذَٰلِكَ مُتْرَفِينَ

suras.text: And they used to persist in the great violation,
suras.translation: And they used to persist in the great violation,
suras.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يُصِرُّونَ عَلَى ٱلْحِنثِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
suras.translation: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
suras.arabic: وَكَانُوا۟ يَقُولُونَ أَئِذَا مِتْنَا وَكُنَّا تُرَابًا وَعِظَـٰمًا أَءِنَّا لَمَبْعُوثُونَ

suras.text: And our forefathers [as well]?"
suras.translation: And our forefathers [as well]?"
suras.arabic: أَوَءَابَآؤُنَا ٱلْأَوَّلُونَ

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
suras.translation: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
suras.arabic: لَمَجْمُوعُونَ إِلَىٰ مِيقَـٰتِ يَوْمٍ مَّعْلُومٍ

suras.text: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
suras.translation: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّكُمْ أَيُّهَا ٱلضَّآلُّونَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
suras.translation: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
suras.arabic: لَـَٔاكِلُونَ مِن شَجَرٍ مِّن زَقُّومٍ

suras.text: And filling with it your bellies
suras.translation: And filling with it your bellies
suras.arabic: فَمَالِـُٔونَ مِنْهَا ٱلْبُطُونَ

suras.text: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
suras.translation: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
suras.arabic: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ عَلَيْهِ مِنَ ٱلْحَمِيمِ

suras.text: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.
suras.translation: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.
suras.arabic: فَشَـٰرِبُونَ شُرْبَ ٱلْهِيمِ

suras.text: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
suras.translation: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
suras.arabic: نَحْنُ خَلَقْنَـٰكُمْ فَلَوْلَا تُصَدِّقُونَ

suras.text: Have you seen that which you emit?
suras.translation: Have you seen that which you emit?
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تُمْنُونَ

suras.text: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
suras.translation: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
suras.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَخْلُقُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُونَ

suras.text: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
suras.translation: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
suras.arabic: نَحْنُ قَدَّرْنَا بَيْنَكُمُ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ

suras.text: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
suras.translation: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
suras.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ أَمْثَـٰلَكُمْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِى مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?
suras.translation: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتُمُ ٱلنَّشْأَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ فَلَوْلَا تَذَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
suras.translation: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُم مَّا تَحْرُثُونَ

suras.text: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
suras.translation: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
suras.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ تَزْرَعُونَهُۥٓ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلزَّٰرِعُونَ

suras.text: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
suras.translation: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
suras.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ حُطَـٰمًا فَظَلْتُمْ تَفَكَّهُونَ

suras.text: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;
suras.translation: [Saying], "Indeed, we are [now] in debt;
suras.arabic: إِنَّا لَمُغْرَمُونَ

suras.text: Rather, we have been deprived."
suras.translation: Rather, we have been deprived."
suras.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ

suras.text: And have you seen the water that you drink?
suras.translation: And have you seen the water that you drink?
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلْمَآءَ ٱلَّذِى تَشْرَبُونَ

suras.text: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
suras.translation: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
suras.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنزَلْتُمُوهُ مِنَ ٱلْمُزْنِ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنزِلُونَ

suras.text: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
suras.translation: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
suras.arabic: لَوْ نَشَآءُ جَعَلْنَـٰهُ أُجَاجًا فَلَوْلَا تَشْكُرُونَ

suras.text: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
suras.translation: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
suras.arabic: أَفَرَءَيْتُمُ ٱلنَّارَ ٱلَّتِى تُورُونَ

suras.text: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
suras.translation: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
suras.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَنشَأْتُمْ شَجَرَتَهَآ أَمْ نَحْنُ ٱلْمُنشِـُٔونَ

suras.text: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
suras.translation: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
suras.arabic: نَحْنُ جَعَلْنَـٰهَا تَذْكِرَةً وَمَتَـٰعًا لِّلْمُقْوِينَ

suras.text: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,
suras.translation: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,
suras.arabic: ۞ فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِمَوَٰقِعِ ٱلنُّجُومِ

suras.text: None touch it except the purified.
suras.translation: None touch it except the purified.
suras.arabic: لَّا يَمَسُّهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْمُطَهَّرُونَ

suras.text: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
suras.translation: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
suras.arabic: أَفَبِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَنتُم مُّدْهِنُونَ

suras.text: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
suras.translation: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
suras.arabic: وَتَجْعَلُونَ رِزْقَكُمْ أَنَّكُمْ تُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
suras.translation: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
suras.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلْحُلْقُومَ

suras.text: And you are at that time looking on -
suras.translation: And you are at that time looking on -
suras.arabic: وَأَنتُمْ حِينَئِذٍ تَنظُرُونَ

suras.text: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
suras.translation: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
suras.arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنكُمْ وَلَـٰكِن لَّا تُبْصِرُونَ

suras.text: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
suras.translation: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
suras.arabic: فَلَوْلَآ إِن كُنتُمْ غَيْرَ مَدِينِينَ

suras.text: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
suras.translation: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
suras.arabic: تَرْجِعُونَهَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
suras.translation: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُقَرَّبِينَ

suras.text: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.
suras.translation: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.
suras.arabic: فَرَوْحٌ وَرَيْحَانٌ وَجَنَّتُ نَعِيمٍ

suras.text: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
suras.translation: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِن كَانَ مِنَ ٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ ٱلضَّآلِّينَ

suras.text: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
suras.translation: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
suras.arabic: فَنُزُلٌ مِّنْ حَمِيمٍ

suras.text: Indeed, this is the true certainty,
suras.translation: Indeed, this is the true certainty,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَهُوَ حَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ

suras.text: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.
suras.translation: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. He gives life and causes death, and He is over all things competent.
suras.arabic: لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

suras.text: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.
suras.translation: He is the First and the Last, the Ascendant and the Intimate, and He is, of all things, Knowing.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلْأَوَّلُ وَٱلْـَٔاخِرُ وَٱلظَّـٰهِرُ وَٱلْبَاطِنُ ۖ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عَلِيمٌ

suras.text: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
suras.translation: His is the dominion of the heavens and earth. And to Allah are returned [all] matters.
suras.arabic: لَّهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ

suras.text: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward.
suras.translation: Believe in Allah and His Messenger and spend out of that in which He has made you successors. For those who have believed among you and spent, there will be a great reward.
suras.arabic: ءَامِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا جَعَلَكُم مُّسْتَخْلَفِينَ فِيهِ ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ مِنكُمْ وَأَنفَقُوا۟ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ

suras.text: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers?
suras.translation: And why do you not believe in Allah while the Messenger invites you to believe in your Lord and He has taken your covenant, if you should [truly] be believers?
suras.arabic: وَمَا لَكُمْ لَا تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ ۙ وَٱلرَّسُولُ يَدْعُوكُمْ لِتُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِرَبِّكُمْ وَقَدْ أَخَذَ مِيثَـٰقَكُمْ إِن كُنتُم مُّؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful.
suras.translation: It is He who sends down upon His Servant [Muhammad] verses of clear evidence that He may bring you out from darknesses into the light. And indeed, Allah is to you Kind and Merciful.
