suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُنَزِّلُ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِۦٓ ءَايَـٰتٍۭ بَيِّنَـٰتٍ لِّيُخْرِجَكُم مِّنَ ٱلظُّلُمَـٰتِ إِلَى ٱلنُّورِ ۚ وَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بِكُمْ لَرَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward?
suras.translation: Who is it that would loan Allah a goodly loan so He will multiply it for him and he will have a noble reward?
suras.arabic: مَّن ذَا ٱلَّذِى يُقْرِضُ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا فَيُضَـٰعِفَهُۥ لَهُۥ وَلَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ

suras.text: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand.
suras.translation: Know that Allah gives life to the earth after its lifelessness. We have made clear to you the signs; perhaps you will understand.
suras.arabic: ٱعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحْىِ ٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهَا ۚ قَدْ بَيَّنَّا لَكُمُ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward.
suras.translation: Indeed, the men who practice charity and the women who practice charity and [they who] have loaned Allah a goodly loan - it will be multiplied for them, and they will have a noble reward.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُصَّدِّقِينَ وَٱلْمُصَّدِّقَـٰتِ وَأَقْرَضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعَفُ لَهُمْ وَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ كَرِيمٌ

suras.text: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.translation: Race toward forgiveness from your Lord and a Garden whose width is like the width of the heavens and earth, prepared for those who believed in Allah and His messengers. That is the bounty of Allah which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.arabic: سَابِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا كَعَرْضِ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ أُعِدَّتْ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ وَرُسُلِهِۦ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful -
suras.translation: In order that you not despair over what has eluded you and not exult [in pride] over what He has given you. And Allah does not like everyone self-deluded and boastful -
suras.arabic: لِّكَيْلَا تَأْسَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ مَا فَاتَكُمْ وَلَا تَفْرَحُوا۟ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰكُمْ ۗ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ

suras.text: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.translation: [Those] who are stingy and enjoin upon people stinginess. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَبْخَلُونَ وَيَأْمُرُونَ ٱلنَّاسَ بِٱلْبُخْلِ ۗ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ

suras.text: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.
suras.translation: And We have already sent Noah and Abraham and placed in their descendants prophethood and scripture; and among them is he who is guided, but many of them are defiantly disobedient.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا وَإِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَجَعَلْنَا فِى ذُرِّيَّتِهِمَا ٱلنُّبُوَّةَ وَٱلْكِتَـٰبَ ۖ فَمِنْهُم مُّهْتَدٍ ۖ وَكَثِيرٌ مِّنْهُمْ فَـٰسِقُونَ

suras.text: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, fear Allah and believe in His Messenger; He will [then] give you a double portion of His mercy and make for you a light by which you will walk and forgive you; and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَءَامِنُوا۟ بِرَسُولِهِۦ يُؤْتِكُمْ كِفْلَيْنِ مِن رَّحْمَتِهِۦ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ نُورًا تَمْشُونَ بِهِۦ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.translation: [This is] so that the People of the Scripture may know that they are not able [to obtain] anything from the bounty of Allah and that [all] bounty is in the hand of Allah; He gives it to whom He wills. And Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.arabic: لِّئَلَّا يَعْلَمَ أَهْلُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبِ أَلَّا يَقْدِرُونَ عَلَىٰ شَىْءٍ مِّن فَضْلِ ٱللَّهِ ۙ وَأَنَّ ٱلْفَضْلَ بِيَدِ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: And those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then [wish to] go back on what they said - then [there must be] the freeing of a slave before they touch one another. That is what you are admonished thereby; and Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.translation: And those who pronounce thihar from their wives and then [wish to] go back on what they said - then [there must be] the freeing of a slave before they touch one another. That is what you are admonished thereby; and Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ يُظَـٰهِرُونَ مِن نِّسَآئِهِمْ ثُمَّ يَعُودُونَ لِمَا قَالُوا۟ فَتَحْرِيرُ رَقَبَةٍ مِّن قَبْلِ أَن يَتَمَآسَّا ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ تُوعَظُونَ بِهِۦ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ خَبِيرٌ

suras.text: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, when you converse privately, do not converse about sin and aggression and disobedience to the Messenger but converse about righteousness and piety. And fear Allah, to whom you will be gathered.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا تَنَـٰجَيْتُمْ فَلَا تَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْإِثْمِ وَٱلْعُدْوَٰنِ وَمَعْصِيَتِ ٱلرَّسُولِ وَتَنَـٰجَوْا۟ بِٱلْبِرِّ وَٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ٱلَّذِىٓ إِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ

suras.text: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
suras.translation: Private conversation is only from Satan that he may grieve those who have believed, but he will not harm them at all except by permission of Allah. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا ٱلنَّجْوَىٰ مِنَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ لِيَحْزُنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَلَيْسَ بِضَآرِّهِمْ شَيْـًٔا إِلَّا بِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, when you [wish to] privately consult the Messenger, present before your consultation a charity. That is better for you and purer. But if you find not [the means] - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِذَا نَـٰجَيْتُمُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَقَدِّمُوا۟ بَيْنَ يَدَىْ نَجْوَىٰكُمْ صَدَقَةً ۚ ذَٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ وَأَطْهَرُ ۚ فَإِن لَّمْ تَجِدُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.
suras.translation: Satan has overcome them and made them forget the remembrance of Allah. Those are the party of Satan. Unquestionably, the party of Satan - they will be the losers.
suras.arabic: ٱسْتَحْوَذَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنُ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ ذِكْرَ ٱللَّهِ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ حِزْبُ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ ۚ أَلَآ إِنَّ حِزْبَ ٱلشَّيْطَـٰنِ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled.
suras.translation: Indeed, the ones who oppose Allah and His Messenger - those will be among the most humbled.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُحَآدُّونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى ٱلْأَذَلِّينَ

suras.text: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
suras.translation: Allah has written, "I will surely overcome, I and My messengers." Indeed, Allah is Powerful and Exalted in Might.
suras.arabic: كَتَبَ ٱللَّهُ لَأَغْلِبَنَّ أَنَا۠ وَرُسُلِىٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ

suras.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient.
suras.translation: Whatever you have cut down of [their] palm trees or left standing on their trunks - it was by permission of Allah and so He would disgrace the defiantly disobedient.
suras.arabic: مَا قَطَعْتُم مِّن لِّينَةٍ أَوْ تَرَكْتُمُوهَا قَآئِمَةً عَلَىٰٓ أُصُولِهَا فَبِإِذْنِ ٱللَّهِ وَلِيُخْزِىَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ

suras.text: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent.
suras.translation: And what Allah restored [of property] to His Messenger from them - you did not spur for it [in an expedition] any horses or camels, but Allah gives His messengers power over whom He wills, and Allah is over all things competent.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَفَآءَ ٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ رَسُولِهِۦ مِنْهُمْ فَمَآ أَوْجَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ خَيْلٍ وَلَا رِكَابٍ وَلَـٰكِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُسَلِّطُ رُسُلَهُۥ عَلَىٰ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

suras.text: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful.
suras.translation: For the poor emigrants who were expelled from their homes and their properties, seeking bounty from Allah and [His] approval and supporting Allah and His Messenger, [there is also a share]. Those are the truthful.
suras.arabic: لِلْفُقَرَآءِ ٱلْمُهَـٰجِرِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُخْرِجُوا۟ مِن دِيَـٰرِهِمْ وَأَمْوَٰلِهِمْ يَبْتَغُونَ فَضْلًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِضْوَٰنًا وَيَنصُرُونَ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥٓ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلصَّـٰدِقُونَ

suras.text: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful."
suras.translation: And [there is a share for] those who came after them, saying, "Our Lord, forgive us and our brothers who preceded us in faith and put not in our hearts [any] resentment toward those who have believed. Our Lord, indeed You are Kind and Merciful."
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ جَآءُو مِنۢ بَعْدِهِمْ يَقُولُونَ رَبَّنَا ٱغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلِإِخْوَٰنِنَا ٱلَّذِينَ سَبَقُونَا بِٱلْإِيمَـٰنِ وَلَا تَجْعَلْ فِى قُلُوبِنَا غِلًّا لِّلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ إِنَّكَ رَءُوفٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided.
suras.translation: If they are expelled, they will not leave with them, and if they are fought, they will not aid them. And [even] if they should aid them, they will surely turn their backs; then [thereafter] they will not be aided.
suras.arabic: لَئِنْ أُخْرِجُوا۟ لَا يَخْرُجُونَ مَعَهُمْ وَلَئِن قُوتِلُوا۟ لَا يَنصُرُونَهُمْ وَلَئِن نَّصَرُوهُمْ لَيُوَلُّنَّ ٱلْأَدْبَـٰرَ ثُمَّ لَا يُنصَرُونَ

suras.text: They will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls. Their violence among themselves is severe. You think they are together, but their hearts are diverse. That is because they are a people who do not reason.
suras.translation: They will not fight you all except within fortified cities or from behind walls. Their violence among themselves is severe. You think they are together, but their hearts are diverse. That is because they are a people who do not reason.
suras.arabic: لَا يُقَـٰتِلُونَكُمْ جَمِيعًا إِلَّا فِى قُرًى مُّحَصَّنَةٍ أَوْ مِن وَرَآءِ جُدُرٍۭ ۚ بَأْسُهُم بَيْنَهُمْ شَدِيدٌ ۚ تَحْسَبُهُمْ جَمِيعًا وَقُلُوبُهُمْ شَتَّىٰ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ قَوْمٌ لَّا يَعْقِلُونَ

suras.text: So the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the Fire, abiding eternally therein. And that is the recompense of the wrong-doers.
suras.translation: So the outcome for both of them is that they will be in the Fire, abiding eternally therein. And that is the recompense of the wrong-doers.
suras.arabic: فَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَتَهُمَآ أَنَّهُمَا فِى ٱلنَّارِ خَـٰلِدَيْنِ فِيهَا ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ جَزَٰٓؤُا۟ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, fear Allah. And let every soul look to what it has put forth for tomorrow - and fear Allah. Indeed, Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَلْتَنظُرْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ لِغَدٍ ۖ وَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient.
suras.translation: And be not like those who forgot Allah, so He made them forget themselves. Those are the defiantly disobedient.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَكُونُوا۟ كَٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ فَأَنسَىٰهُمْ أَنفُسَهُمْ ۚ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْفَـٰسِقُونَ

suras.text: If We had sent down this Qur\'an upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of Allah. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought.
suras.translation: If We had sent down this Qur\'an upon a mountain, you would have seen it humbled and coming apart from fear of Allah. And these examples We present to the people that perhaps they will give thought.
suras.arabic: لَوْ أَنزَلْنَا هَـٰذَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ عَلَىٰ جَبَلٍ لَّرَأَيْتَهُۥ خَـٰشِعًا مُّتَصَدِّعًا مِّنْ خَشْيَةِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَتِلْكَ ٱلْأَمْثَـٰلُ نَضْرِبُهَا لِلنَّاسِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
suras.translation: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed. He is the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۖ عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ۖ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ

suras.text: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.translation: He is Allah, other than whom there is no deity, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Perfection, the Bestower of Faith, the Overseer, the Exalted in Might, the Compeller, the Superior. Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ٱلْمَلِكُ ٱلْقُدُّوسُ ٱلسَّلَـٰمُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُ ٱلْمُهَيْمِنُ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْجَبَّارُ ٱلْمُتَكَبِّرُ ۚ سُبْحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ

suras.text: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: He is Allah, the Creator, the Inventor, the Fashioner; to Him belong the best names. Whatever is in the heavens and earth is exalting Him. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱللَّهُ ٱلْخَـٰلِقُ ٱلْبَارِئُ ٱلْمُصَوِّرُ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْأَسْمَآءُ ٱلْحُسْنَىٰ ۚ يُسَبِّحُ لَهُۥ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve.
suras.translation: If they gain dominance over you, they would be to you as enemies and extend against you their hands and their tongues with evil, and they wish you would disbelieve.
suras.arabic: إِن يَثْقَفُوكُمْ يَكُونُوا۟ لَكُمْ أَعْدَآءً وَيَبْسُطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْكُمْ أَيْدِيَهُمْ وَأَلْسِنَتَهُم بِٱلسُّوٓءِ وَوَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تَكْفُرُونَ

suras.text: There has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.translation: There has certainly been for you in them an excellent pattern for anyone whose hope is in Allah and the Last Day. And whoever turns away - then indeed, Allah is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ كَانَ لَكُمْ فِيهِمْ أُسْوَةٌ حَسَنَةٌ لِّمَن كَانَ يَرْجُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱلْيَوْمَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ ٱلْغَنِىُّ ٱلْحَمِيدُ

suras.text: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: Perhaps Allah will put, between you and those to whom you have been enemies among them, affection. And Allah is competent, and Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: ۞ عَسَى ٱللَّهُ أَن يَجْعَلَ بَيْنَكُمْ وَبَيْنَ ٱلَّذِينَ عَادَيْتُم مِّنْهُم مَّوَدَّةً ۚ وَٱللَّهُ قَدِيرٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.
suras.translation: Allah does not forbid you from those who do not fight you because of religion and do not expel you from your homes - from being righteous toward them and acting justly toward them. Indeed, Allah loves those who act justly.
suras.arabic: لَّا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ لَمْ يُقَـٰتِلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَلَمْ يُخْرِجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ أَن تَبَرُّوهُمْ وَتُقْسِطُوٓا۟ إِلَيْهِمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُقْسِطِينَ

suras.text: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers.
suras.translation: Allah only forbids you from those who fight you because of religion and expel you from your homes and aid in your expulsion - [forbids] that you make allies of them. And whoever makes allies of them, then it is those who are the wrongdoers.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا يَنْهَىٰكُمُ ٱللَّهُ عَنِ ٱلَّذِينَ قَـٰتَلُوكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ وَأَخْرَجُوكُم مِّن دِيَـٰرِكُمْ وَظَـٰهَرُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ إِخْرَاجِكُمْ أَن تَوَلَّوْهُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَلَّهُمْ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلظَّـٰلِمُونَ

suras.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth exalts Allah, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبَّحَ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?
suras.translation: O you who have believed, why do you say what you do not do?
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لِمَ تَقُولُونَ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do.
suras.translation: Great is hatred in the sight of Allah that you say what you do not do.
suras.arabic: كَبُرَ مَقْتًا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ أَن تَقُولُوا۟ مَا لَا تَفْعَلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.
suras.translation: Indeed, Allah loves those who fight in His cause in a row as though they are a [single] structure joined firmly.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ يُحِبُّ ٱلَّذِينَ يُقَـٰتِلُونَ فِى سَبِيلِهِۦ صَفًّا كَأَنَّهُم بُنْيَـٰنٌ مَّرْصُوصٌ

suras.text: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
suras.translation: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allah untruth while he is being invited to Islam. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
suras.arabic: وَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ٱلْكَذِبَ وَهُوَ يُدْعَىٰٓ إِلَى ٱلْإِسْلَـٰمِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allah dislike it.
suras.translation: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion, although those who associate others with Allah dislike it.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَرْسَلَ رَسُولَهُۥ بِٱلْهُدَىٰ وَدِينِ ٱلْحَقِّ لِيُظْهِرَهُۥ عَلَى ٱلدِّينِ كُلِّهِۦ وَلَوْ كَرِهَ ٱلْمُشْرِكُونَ

suras.text: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know.
suras.translation: [It is that] you believe in Allah and His Messenger and strive in the cause of Allah with your wealth and your lives. That is best for you, if you should know.
suras.arabic: تُؤْمِنُونَ بِٱللَّهِ وَرَسُولِهِۦ وَتُجَـٰهِدُونَ فِى سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ بِأَمْوَٰلِكُمْ وَأَنفُسِكُمْ ۚ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.
suras.translation: He will forgive for you your sins and admit you to gardens beneath which rivers flow and pleasant dwellings in gardens of perpetual residence. That is the great attainment.
suras.arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ وَيُدْخِلْكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ وَمَسَـٰكِنَ طَيِّبَةً فِى جَنَّـٰتِ عَدْنٍ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ

suras.text: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.
suras.translation: And [you will obtain] another [favor] that you love - victory from Allah and an imminent conquest; and give good tidings to the believers.
suras.arabic: وَأُخْرَىٰ تُحِبُّونَهَا ۖ نَصْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَفَتْحٌ قَرِيبٌ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ

suras.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah, the Sovereign, the Pure, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ٱلْمَلِكِ ٱلْقُدُّوسِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَكِيمِ

suras.text: It is He who has sent among the unlettered a Messenger from themselves reciting to them His verses and purifying them and teaching them the Book and wisdom - although they were before in clear error -
suras.translation: It is He who has sent among the unlettered a Messenger from themselves reciting to them His verses and purifying them and teaching them the Book and wisdom - although they were before in clear error -
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى بَعَثَ فِى ٱلْأُمِّيِّـۧنَ رَسُولًا مِّنْهُمْ يَتْلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايَـٰتِهِۦ وَيُزَكِّيهِمْ وَيُعَلِّمُهُمُ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْحِكْمَةَ وَإِن كَانُوا۟ مِن قَبْلُ لَفِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: And [to] others of them who have not yet joined them. And He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: وَءَاخَرِينَ مِنْهُمْ لَمَّا يَلْحَقُوا۟ بِهِمْ ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.translation: That is the bounty of Allah, which He gives to whom He wills, and Allah is the possessor of great bounty.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ فَضْلُ ٱللَّهِ يُؤْتِيهِ مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ ذُو ٱلْفَضْلِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes [of books]. Wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of Allah. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
suras.translation: The example of those who were entrusted with the Torah and then did not take it on is like that of a donkey who carries volumes [of books]. Wretched is the example of the people who deny the signs of Allah. And Allah does not guide the wrongdoing people.
suras.arabic: مَثَلُ ٱلَّذِينَ حُمِّلُوا۟ ٱلتَّوْرَىٰةَ ثُمَّ لَمْ يَحْمِلُوهَا كَمَثَلِ ٱلْحِمَارِ يَحْمِلُ أَسْفَارًۢا ۚ بِئْسَ مَثَلُ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."
suras.translation: Say, "O you who are Jews, if you claim that you are allies of Allah, excluding the [other] people, then wish for death, if you should be truthful."
suras.arabic: قُلْ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ هَادُوٓا۟ إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَآءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ ٱلنَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا۟ ٱلْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: But they will not wish for it, ever, because of what their hands have put forth. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers.
suras.translation: But they will not wish for it, ever, because of what their hands have put forth. And Allah is Knowing of the wrongdoers.
suras.arabic: وَلَا يَتَمَنَّوْنَهُۥٓ أَبَدًۢا بِمَا قَدَّمَتْ أَيْدِيهِمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلِيمٌۢ بِٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, the death from which you flee - indeed, it will meet you. Then you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you about what you used to do."
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, the death from which you flee - indeed, it will meet you. Then you will be returned to the Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, and He will inform you about what you used to do."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّ ٱلْمَوْتَ ٱلَّذِى تَفِرُّونَ مِنْهُ فَإِنَّهُۥ مُلَـٰقِيكُمْ ۖ ثُمَّ تُرَدُّونَ إِلَىٰ عَـٰلِمِ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ فَيُنَبِّئُكُم بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers."
suras.translation: But when they saw a transaction or a diversion, [O Muhammad], they rushed to it and left you standing. Say, "What is with Allah is better than diversion and than a transaction, and Allah is the best of providers."
suras.arabic: وَإِذَا رَأَوْا۟ تِجَـٰرَةً أَوْ لَهْوًا ٱنفَضُّوٓا۟ إِلَيْهَا وَتَرَكُوكَ قَآئِمًا ۚ قُلْ مَا عِندَ ٱللَّهِ خَيْرٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهْوِ وَمِنَ ٱلتِّجَـٰرَةِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَيْرُ ٱلرَّٰزِقِينَ

suras.text: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand.
suras.translation: That is because they believed, and then they disbelieved; so their hearts were sealed over, and they do not understand.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُمْ ءَامَنُوا۟ ثُمَّ كَفَرُوا۟ فَطُبِعَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يَفْقَهُونَ

suras.text: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
suras.translation: It is all the same for them whether you ask forgiveness for them or do not ask forgiveness for them; never will Allah forgive them. Indeed, Allah does not guide the defiantly disobedient people.
suras.arabic: سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ أَسْتَغْفَرْتَ لَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تَسْتَغْفِرْ لَهُمْ لَن يَغْفِرَ ٱللَّهُ لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَهْدِى ٱلْقَوْمَ ٱلْفَـٰسِقِينَ

suras.text: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, let not your wealth and your children divert you from remembrance of Allah. And whoever does that - then those are the losers.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ لَا تُلْهِكُمْ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَلَآ أَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ عَن ذِكْرِ ٱللَّهِ ۚ وَمَن يَفْعَلْ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْخَـٰسِرُونَ

suras.text: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.translation: But never will Allah delay a soul when its time has come. And Allah is Acquainted with what you do.
suras.arabic: وَلَن يُؤَخِّرَ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهَا ۚ وَٱللَّهُ خَبِيرٌۢ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent.
suras.translation: Whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth is exalting Allah. To Him belongs dominion, and to Him belongs [all] praise, and He is over all things competent.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يُسَبِّحُ لِلَّهِ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَمَا فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ ۖ لَهُ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ ٱلْحَمْدُ ۖ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

suras.text: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
suras.translation: It is He who created you, and among you is the disbeliever, and among you is the believer. And Allah, of what you do, is Seeing.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكُمْ فَمِنكُمْ كَافِرٌ وَمِنكُم مُّؤْمِنٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ بَصِيرٌ

suras.text: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination.
suras.translation: He created the heavens and earth in truth and formed you and perfected your forms; and to Him is the [final] destination.
suras.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَصَوَّرَكُمْ فَأَحْسَنَ صُوَرَكُمْ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلْمَصِيرُ

suras.text: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.
suras.translation: That is because their messengers used to come to them with clear evidences, but they said, "Shall human beings guide us?" and disbelieved and turned away. And Allah dispensed [with them]; and Allah is Free of need and Praiseworthy.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ بِأَنَّهُۥ كَانَت تَّأْتِيهِمْ رُسُلُهُم بِٱلْبَيِّنَـٰتِ فَقَالُوٓا۟ أَبَشَرٌ يَهْدُونَنَا فَكَفَرُوا۟ وَتَوَلَّوا۟ ۚ وَّٱسْتَغْنَى ٱللَّهُ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ غَنِىٌّ حَمِيدٌ

suras.text: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification.
suras.translation: And obey Allah and obey the Messenger; but if you turn away - then upon Our Messenger is only [the duty of] clear notification.
suras.arabic: وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ ٱلرَّسُولَ ۚ فَإِن تَوَلَّيْتُمْ فَإِنَّمَا عَلَىٰ رَسُولِنَا ٱلْبَلَـٰغُ ٱلْمُبِينُ

suras.text: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
suras.translation: Allah - there is no deity except Him. And upon Allah let the believers rely.
suras.arabic: ٱللَّهُ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَعَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَلْيَتَوَكَّلِ ٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: O you who have believed, indeed, among your wives and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, indeed, among your wives and your children are enemies to you, so beware of them. But if you pardon and overlook and forgive - then indeed, Allah is Forgiving and Merciful.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِنَّ مِنْ أَزْوَٰجِكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدِكُمْ عَدُوًّا لَّكُمْ فَٱحْذَرُوهُمْ ۚ وَإِن تَعْفُوا۟ وَتَصْفَحُوا۟ وَتَغْفِرُوا۟ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

suras.text: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.
suras.translation: Your wealth and your children are but a trial, and Allah has with Him a great reward.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَمْوَٰلُكُمْ وَأَوْلَـٰدُكُمْ فِتْنَةٌ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عِندَهُۥٓ أَجْرٌ عَظِيمٌ

suras.text: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.
suras.translation: So fear Allah as much as you are able and listen and obey and spend [in the way of Allah]; it is better for your selves. And whoever is protected from the stinginess of his soul - it is those who will be the successful.
suras.arabic: فَٱتَّقُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا ٱسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَٱسْمَعُوا۟ وَأَطِيعُوا۟ وَأَنفِقُوا۟ خَيْرًا لِّأَنفُسِكُمْ ۗ وَمَن يُوقَ شُحَّ نَفْسِهِۦ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ

suras.text: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing.
suras.translation: If you loan Allah a goodly loan, He will multiply it for you and forgive you. And Allah is Most Appreciative and Forbearing.
suras.arabic: إِن تُقْرِضُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا يُضَـٰعِفْهُ لَكُمْ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ شَكُورٌ حَلِيمٌ

suras.text: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.translation: Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
suras.arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ وَٱلشَّهَـٰدَةِ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْحَكِيمُ

suras.text: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent.
suras.translation: And will provide for him from where he does not expect. And whoever relies upon Allah - then He is sufficient for him. Indeed, Allah will accomplish His purpose. Allah has already set for everything a [decreed] extent.
suras.arabic: وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ ۚ وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُۥٓ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ بَـٰلِغُ أَمْرِهِۦ ۚ قَدْ جَعَلَ ٱللَّهُ لِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدْرًا

suras.text: That is the command of Allah, which He has sent down to you; and whoever fears Allah - He will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward.
suras.translation: That is the command of Allah, which He has sent down to you; and whoever fears Allah - He will remove for him his misdeeds and make great for him his reward.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ أَمْرُ ٱللَّهِ أَنزَلَهُۥٓ إِلَيْكُمْ ۚ وَمَن يَتَّقِ ٱللَّهَ يُكَفِّرْ عَنْهُ سَيِّـَٔاتِهِۦ وَيُعْظِمْ لَهُۥٓ أَجْرًا

suras.text: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.
suras.translation: Let a man of wealth spend from his wealth, and he whose provision is restricted - let him spend from what Allah has given him. Allah does not charge a soul except [according to] what He has given it. Allah will bring about, after hardship, ease.
suras.arabic: لِيُنفِقْ ذُو سَعَةٍ مِّن سَعَتِهِۦ ۖ وَمَن قُدِرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقُهُۥ فَلْيُنفِقْ مِمَّآ ءَاتَىٰهُ ٱللَّهُ ۚ لَا يُكَلِّفُ ٱللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا مَآ ءَاتَىٰهَا ۚ سَيَجْعَلُ ٱللَّهُ بَعْدَ عُسْرٍ يُسْرًا

suras.text: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.
suras.translation: And it tasted the bad consequence of its affair, and the outcome of its affair was loss.
suras.arabic: فَذَاقَتْ وَبَالَ أَمْرِهَا وَكَانَ عَـٰقِبَةُ أَمْرِهَا خُسْرًا

suras.text: It is Allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth, the like of them. [His] command descends among them so you may know that Allah is over all things competent and that Allah has encompassed all things in knowledge.
suras.translation: It is Allah who has created seven heavens and of the earth, the like of them. [His] command descends among them so you may know that Allah is over all things competent and that Allah has encompassed all things in knowledge.
suras.arabic: ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ وَمِنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ مِثْلَهُنَّ يَتَنَزَّلُ ٱلْأَمْرُ بَيْنَهُنَّ لِتَعْلَمُوٓا۟ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ وَأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ قَدْ أَحَاطَ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍ عِلْمًۢا

suras.text: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants.
suras.translation: If you two [wives] repent to Allah, [it is best], for your hearts have deviated. But if you cooperate against him - then indeed Allah is his protector, and Gabriel and the righteous of the believers and the angels, moreover, are [his] assistants.
suras.arabic: إِن تَتُوبَآ إِلَى ٱللَّهِ فَقَدْ صَغَتْ قُلُوبُكُمَا ۖ وَإِن تَظَـٰهَرَا عَلَيْهِ فَإِنَّ ٱللَّهَ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰهُ وَجِبْرِيلُ وَصَـٰلِحُ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۖ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ ظَهِيرٌ

suras.text: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.
suras.translation: O you who have believed, protect yourselves and your families from a Fire whose fuel is people and stones, over which are [appointed] angels, harsh and severe; they do not disobey Allah in what He commands them but do what they are commanded.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ قُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَكُمْ وَأَهْلِيكُمْ نَارًا وَقُودُهَا ٱلنَّاسُ وَٱلْحِجَارَةُ عَلَيْهَا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةٌ غِلَاظٌ شِدَادٌ لَّا يَعْصُونَ ٱللَّهَ مَآ أَمَرَهُمْ وَيَفْعَلُونَ مَا يُؤْمَرُونَ

suras.text: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do.
suras.translation: O you who have disbelieved, make no excuses that Day. You will only be recompensed for what you used to do.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لَا تَعْتَذِرُوا۟ ٱلْيَوْمَ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -
suras.translation: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَـٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِى بِيَدِهِ ٱلْمُلْكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

suras.text: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -
suras.translation: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْمَوْتَ وَٱلْحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبْلُوَكُمْ أَيُّكُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًا ۚ وَهُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْغَفُورُ

suras.text: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?
suras.translation: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا ۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِى خَلْقِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ مِن تَفَـٰوُتٍ ۖ فَٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ هَلْ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورٍ

suras.text: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.
suras.translation: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱرْجِعِ ٱلْبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيْنِ يَنقَلِبْ إِلَيْكَ ٱلْبَصَرُ خَاسِئًا وَهُوَ حَسِيرٌ

suras.text: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.
suras.translation: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.
suras.arabic: إِذَآ أُلْقُوا۟ فِيهَا سَمِعُوا۟ لَهَا شَهِيقًا وَهِىَ تَفُورُ

suras.text: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"
suras.translation: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, "Did there not come to you a warner?"
suras.arabic: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلْغَيْظِ ۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلْقِىَ فِيهَا فَوْجٌ سَأَلَهُمْ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمْ يَأْتِكُمْ نَذِيرٌ

suras.text: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, \'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.\'"
suras.translation: They will say," Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, \'Allah has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.\'"
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ بَلَىٰ قَدْ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرٌ فَكَذَّبْنَا وَقُلْنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ كَبِيرٍ

suras.text: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.
suras.translation: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخْشَوْنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلْغَيْبِ لَهُم مَّغْفِرَةٌ وَأَجْرٌ كَبِيرٌ

suras.text: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?
suras.translation: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Acquainted?
suras.arabic: أَلَا يَعْلَمُ مَنْ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلْخَبِيرُ

suras.text: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
suras.translation: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
suras.arabic: هُوَ ٱلَّذِى جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ ذَلُولًا فَٱمْشُوا۟ فِى مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُوا۟ مِن رِّزْقِهِۦ ۖ وَإِلَيْهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ

suras.text: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?
suras.translation: Do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?
suras.arabic: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخْسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ فَإِذَا هِىَ تَمُورُ

suras.text: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.
suras.translation: Or do you feel secure that He who [holds authority] in the heaven would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.
suras.arabic: أَمْ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرْسِلَ عَلَيْكُمْ حَاصِبًا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ كَيْفَ نَذِيرِ

suras.text: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.translation: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ فَكَيْفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ

suras.text: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.
suras.translation: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.
suras.arabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ إِلَى ٱلطَّيْرِ فَوْقَهُمْ صَـٰٓفَّـٰتٍ وَيَقْبِضْنَ ۚ مَا يُمْسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَىْءٍۭ بَصِيرٌ

suras.text: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.
suras.translation: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.
suras.arabic: أَمَّنْ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى يَرْزُقُكُمْ إِنْ أَمْسَكَ رِزْقَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّجُّوا۟ فِى عُتُوٍّ وَنُفُورٍ

suras.text: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?
suras.translation: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?
suras.arabic: أَفَمَن يَمْشِى مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجْهِهِۦٓ أَهْدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمْشِى سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ

suras.text: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."
suras.translation: Say, "It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts; little are you grateful."
suras.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنشَأَكُمْ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمْعَ وَٱلْأَبْصَـٰرَ وَٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةَ ۖ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ

suras.text: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered."
suras.translation: Say, "It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered."
suras.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلَّذِى ذَرَأَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَإِلَيْهِ تُحْشَرُونَ

suras.text: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"
suras.arabic: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَـٰذَا ٱلْوَعْدُ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."
suras.translation: Say, "The knowledge is only with Allah, and I am only a clear warner."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا ٱلْعِلْمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."
suras.translation: Say, "He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error."
suras.arabic: قُلْ هُوَ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْنَا ۖ فَسَتَعْلَمُونَ مَنْ هُوَ فِى ضَلَـٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ

suras.text: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"
suras.translation: Say, "Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?"
suras.arabic: قُلْ أَرَءَيْتُمْ إِنْ أَصْبَحَ مَآؤُكُمْ غَوْرًا فَمَن يَأْتِيكُم بِمَآءٍ مَّعِينٍۭ

suras.text: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,
suras.translation: Nun. By the pen and what they inscribe,
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ نٓ ۚ وَٱلْقَلَمِ وَمَا يَسْطُرُونَ

suras.text: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.
suras.translation: You are not, [O Muhammad], by the favor of your Lord, a madman.
suras.arabic: مَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ بِمَجْنُونٍ

suras.text: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.
suras.translation: And indeed, for you is a reward uninterrupted.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَكَ لَأَجْرًا غَيْرَ مَمْنُونٍ

suras.text: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.
suras.translation: And indeed, you are of a great moral character.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ خُلُقٍ عَظِيمٍ

suras.text: So you will see and they will see
suras.translation: So you will see and they will see
suras.arabic: فَسَتُبْصِرُ وَيُبْصِرُونَ

suras.text: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].
suras.translation: Which of you is the afflicted [by a devil].
suras.arabic: بِأَييِّكُمُ ٱلْمَفْتُونُ

suras.text: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
suras.translation: Indeed, your Lord is most knowing of who has gone astray from His way, and He is most knowing of the [rightly] guided.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِٱلْمُهْتَدِينَ

suras.text: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].
suras.translation: They wish that you would soften [in your position], so they would soften [toward you].
suras.arabic: وَدُّوا۟ لَوْ تُدْهِنُ فَيُدْهِنُونَ

suras.text: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer
suras.translation: And do not obey every worthless habitual swearer
suras.arabic: وَلَا تُطِعْ كُلَّ حَلَّافٍ مَّهِينٍ

suras.text: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -
suras.translation: [And] scorner, going about with malicious gossip -
suras.arabic: هَمَّازٍ مَّشَّآءٍۭ بِنَمِيمٍ

suras.text: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,
suras.translation: A preventer of good, transgressing and sinful,
suras.arabic: مَّنَّاعٍ لِّلْخَيْرِ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

suras.text: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.
suras.translation: Cruel, moreover, and an illegitimate pretender.
suras.arabic: عُتُلٍّۭ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ زَنِيمٍ

suras.text: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,
suras.translation: Because he is a possessor of wealth and children,
suras.arabic: أَن كَانَ ذَا مَالٍ وَبَنِينَ

suras.text: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
suras.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
suras.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: We will brand him upon the snout.
suras.translation: We will brand him upon the snout.
suras.arabic: سَنَسِمُهُۥ عَلَى ٱلْخُرْطُومِ

suras.text: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.
suras.translation: So there came upon the garden an affliction from your Lord while they were asleep.
suras.arabic: فَطَافَ عَلَيْهَا طَآئِفٌ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمْ نَآئِمُونَ

suras.text: And it became as though reaped.
suras.translation: And it became as though reaped.
suras.arabic: فَأَصْبَحَتْ كَٱلصَّرِيمِ

suras.text: And they called one another at morning,
suras.translation: And they called one another at morning,
suras.arabic: فَتَنَادَوْا۟ مُصْبِحِينَ

suras.text: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."
suras.translation: [Saying], "Go early to your crop if you would cut the fruit."
suras.arabic: أَنِ ٱغْدُوا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْثِكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰرِمِينَ

suras.text: So they set out, while lowering their voices,
suras.translation: So they set out, while lowering their voices,
suras.arabic: فَٱنطَلَقُوا۟ وَهُمْ يَتَخَـٰفَتُونَ

suras.text: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."
suras.translation: [Saying], "There will surely not enter it today upon you [any] poor person."
suras.arabic: أَن لَّا يَدْخُلَنَّهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ عَلَيْكُم مِّسْكِينٌ

suras.text: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.
suras.translation: And they went early in determination, [assuming themselves] able.
suras.arabic: وَغَدَوْا۟ عَلَىٰ حَرْدٍ قَـٰدِرِينَ

suras.text: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;
suras.translation: But when they saw it, they said, "Indeed, we are lost;
suras.arabic: فَلَمَّا رَأَوْهَا قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا لَضَآلُّونَ

suras.text: Rather, we have been deprived."
suras.translation: Rather, we have been deprived."
suras.arabic: بَلْ نَحْنُ مَحْرُومُونَ

suras.text: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, \'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?\' "
suras.translation: The most moderate of them said, "Did I not say to you, \'Why do you not exalt [Allah]?\' "
suras.arabic: قَالَ أَوْسَطُهُمْ أَلَمْ أَقُل لَّكُمْ لَوْلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ

suras.text: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
suras.translation: They said, "Exalted is our Lord! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ سُبْحَـٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَـٰلِمِينَ

suras.text: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.
suras.translation: They said, "O woe to us; indeed we were transgressors.
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ يَـٰوَيْلَنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا طَـٰغِينَ

suras.text: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."
suras.translation: Perhaps our Lord will substitute for us [one] better than it. Indeed, we are toward our Lord desirous."
suras.arabic: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبْدِلَنَا خَيْرًا مِّنْهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.
suras.translation: Indeed, for the righteous with their Lord are the Gardens of Pleasure.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

suras.text: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?
suras.translation: Then will We treat the Muslims like the criminals?
suras.arabic: أَفَنَجْعَلُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ كَٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn
suras.translation: Or do you have a scripture in which you learn
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَكُمْ كِتَـٰبٌ فِيهِ تَدْرُسُونَ

suras.text: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?
suras.translation: That indeed for you is whatever you choose?
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لَكُمْ فِيهِ لَمَا تَخَيَّرُونَ

suras.text: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.
suras.translation: Ask them which of them, for that [claim], is responsible.
suras.arabic: سَلْهُمْ أَيُّهُم بِذَٰلِكَ زَعِيمٌ

suras.text: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.
suras.translation: Or do they have partners? Then let them bring their partners, if they should be truthful.
suras.arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ شُرَكَآءُ فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمْ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَـٰدِقِينَ

suras.text: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.
suras.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. And they used to be invited to prostration while they were sound.
suras.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۖ وَقَدْ كَانُوا۟ يُدْعَوْنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمْ سَـٰلِمُونَ

suras.text: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.
suras.translation: And I will give them time. Indeed, My plan is firm.
suras.arabic: وَأُمْلِى لَهُمْ ۚ إِنَّ كَيْدِى مَتِينٌ

suras.text: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
suras.translation: Or do you ask of them a payment, so they are by debt burdened down?
suras.arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ مُّثْقَلُونَ

suras.text: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
suras.translation: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down?
suras.arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ

suras.text: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.
suras.translation: And his Lord chose him and made him of the righteous.
suras.arabic: فَٱجْتَبَـٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَجَعَلَهُۥ مِنَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحِينَ

suras.text: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.
suras.translation: But it is not except a reminder to the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: What is the Inevitable Reality?
suras.translation: What is the Inevitable Reality?
suras.arabic: مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is the Inevitable Reality?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحَآقَّةُ

suras.text: Thamud and \'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.
suras.translation: Thamud and \'Aad denied the Striking Calamity.
suras.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ وَعَادٌۢ بِٱلْقَارِعَةِ

suras.text: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
suras.translation: Which Allah imposed upon them for seven nights and eight days in succession, so you would see the people therein fallen as if they were hollow trunks of palm trees.
suras.arabic: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيْهِمْ سَبْعَ لَيَالٍ وَثَمَـٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومًا فَتَرَى ٱلْقَوْمَ فِيهَا صَرْعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمْ أَعْجَازُ نَخْلٍ خَاوِيَةٍ

suras.text: Then do you see of them any remains?
suras.translation: Then do you see of them any remains?
suras.arabic: فَهَلْ تَرَىٰ لَهُم مِّنۢ بَاقِيَةٍ

suras.text: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].
suras.translation: And they disobeyed the messenger of their Lord, so He seized them with a seizure exceeding [in severity].
suras.arabic: فَعَصَوْا۟ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمْ فَأَخَذَهُمْ أَخْذَةً رَّابِيَةً

suras.text: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship
suras.translation: Indeed, when the water overflowed, We carried your ancestors in the sailing ship
suras.arabic: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلْمَآءُ حَمَلْنَـٰكُمْ فِى ٱلْجَارِيَةِ

suras.text: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.
suras.translation: That We might make it for you a reminder and [that] a conscious ear would be conscious of it.
suras.arabic: لِنَجْعَلَهَا لَكُمْ تَذْكِرَةً وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنٌ وَٰعِيَةٌ

suras.text: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -
suras.translation: And the earth and the mountains are lifted and leveled with one blow -
suras.arabic: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَٱلْجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةً وَٰحِدَةً

suras.text: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,
suras.translation: Then on that Day, the Resurrection will occur,
suras.arabic: فَيَوْمَئِذٍ وَقَعَتِ ٱلْوَاقِعَةُ

suras.text: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.
suras.translation: And the heaven will split [open], for that Day it is infirm.
suras.arabic: وَٱنشَقَّتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَهِىَ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاهِيَةٌ

suras.text: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].
suras.translation: And the angels are at its edges. And there will bear the Throne of your Lord above them, that Day, eight [of them].
suras.arabic: وَٱلْمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرْجَآئِهَا ۚ وَيَحْمِلُ عَرْشَ رَبِّكَ فَوْقَهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ ثَمَـٰنِيَةٌ

suras.text: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
suras.translation: So as for he who is given his record in his right hand, he will say, "Here, read my record!
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقْرَءُوا۟ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ

suras.text: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."
suras.translation: Indeed, I was certain that I would be meeting my account."
suras.arabic: إِنِّى ظَنَنتُ أَنِّى مُلَـٰقٍ حِسَابِيَهْ

suras.text: So he will be in a pleasant life -
suras.translation: So he will be in a pleasant life -
suras.arabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ

suras.text: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.
suras.translation: Its [fruit] to be picked hanging near.
suras.arabic: قُطُوفُهَا دَانِيَةٌ

suras.text: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."
suras.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you put forth in the days past."
suras.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَآ أَسْلَفْتُمْ فِى ٱلْأَيَّامِ ٱلْخَالِيَةِ

suras.text: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
suras.translation: But as for he who is given his record in his left hand, he will say, "Oh, I wish I had not been given my record
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى لَمْ أُوتَ كِتَـٰبِيَهْ

suras.text: And had not known what is my account.
suras.translation: And had not known what is my account.
suras.arabic: وَلَمْ أَدْرِ مَا حِسَابِيَهْ

suras.text: I wish my death had been the decisive one.
suras.translation: I wish my death had been the decisive one.
suras.arabic: يَـٰلَيْتَهَا كَانَتِ ٱلْقَاضِيَةَ

suras.text: Gone from me is my authority."
suras.translation: Gone from me is my authority."
suras.arabic: هَلَكَ عَنِّى سُلْطَـٰنِيَهْ

suras.text: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.
suras.translation: [Allah will say], "Seize him and shackle him.
suras.arabic: خُذُوهُ فَغُلُّوهُ

suras.text: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."
suras.translation: Then into a chain whose length is seventy cubits insert him."
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ فِى سِلْسِلَةٍ ذَرْعُهَا سَبْعُونَ ذِرَاعًا فَٱسْلُكُوهُ

suras.text: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
suras.translation: Indeed, he did not used to believe in Allah, the Most Great,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤْمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
suras.translation: Nor did he encourage the feeding of the poor.
suras.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ

suras.text: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
suras.translation: So there is not for him here this Day any devoted friend
suras.arabic: فَلَيْسَ لَهُ ٱلْيَوْمَ هَـٰهُنَا حَمِيمٌ

suras.text: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;
suras.translation: Nor any food except from the discharge of wounds;
suras.arabic: وَلَا طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِنْ غِسْلِينٍ

suras.text: None will eat it except the sinners.
suras.translation: None will eat it except the sinners.
suras.arabic: لَّا يَأْكُلُهُۥٓ إِلَّا ٱلْخَـٰطِـُٔونَ

suras.text: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is the word of a noble Messenger.
suras.translation: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is the word of a noble Messenger.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ

suras.text: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.
suras.translation: And it is not the word of a poet; little do you believe.
suras.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَاعِرٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
suras.translation: Nor the word of a soothsayer; little do you remember.
suras.arabic: وَلَا بِقَوْلِ كَاهِنٍ ۚ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ

suras.text: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: تَنزِيلٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
suras.translation: And if Muhammad had made up about Us some [false] sayings,
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ تَقَوَّلَ عَلَيْنَا بَعْضَ ٱلْأَقَاوِيلِ

suras.text: We would have seized him by the right hand;
suras.translation: We would have seized him by the right hand;
suras.arabic: لَأَخَذْنَا مِنْهُ بِٱلْيَمِينِ

suras.text: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.
suras.translation: Then We would have cut from him the aorta.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَقَطَعْنَا مِنْهُ ٱلْوَتِينَ

suras.text: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.
suras.translation: And there is no one of you who could prevent [Us] from him.
suras.arabic: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنْ أَحَدٍ عَنْهُ حَـٰجِزِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder for the righteous.
suras.translation: And indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder for the righteous.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَتَذْكِرَةٌ لِّلْمُتَّقِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.
suras.translation: And indeed, We know that among you are deniers.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَنَعْلَمُ أَنَّ مِنكُم مُّكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.
suras.translation: And indeed, it is the truth of certainty.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لَحَقُّ ٱلْيَقِينِ

suras.text: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.translation: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
suras.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلْعَظِيمِ

suras.text: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.
suras.translation: [It is] from Allah, owner of the ways of ascent.
suras.arabic: مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ ذِى ٱلْمَعَارِجِ

suras.text: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
suras.translation: The angels and the Spirit will ascend to Him during a Day the extent of which is fifty thousand years.
suras.arabic: تَعْرُجُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيْهِ فِى يَوْمٍ كَانَ مِقْدَارُهُۥ خَمْسِينَ أَلْفَ سَنَةٍ

suras.text: So be patient with gracious patience.
suras.translation: So be patient with gracious patience.
suras.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ صَبْرًا جَمِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,
suras.translation: Indeed, they see it [as] distant,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ يَرَوْنَهُۥ بَعِيدًا

suras.text: And the mountains will be like wool,
suras.translation: And the mountains will be like wool,
suras.arabic: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ

suras.text: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,
suras.translation: And no friend will ask [anything of] a friend,
suras.arabic: وَلَا يَسْـَٔلُ حَمِيمٌ حَمِيمًا

suras.text: And his nearest kindred who shelter him
suras.translation: And his nearest kindred who shelter him
suras.arabic: وَفَصِيلَتِهِ ٱلَّتِى تُـْٔوِيهِ

suras.text: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
suras.translation: And whoever is on earth entirely [so] then it could save him.
suras.arabic: وَمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ جَمِيعًا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ

suras.text: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],
suras.translation: No! Indeed, it is the Flame [of Hell],
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهَا لَظَىٰ

suras.text: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
suras.translation: It invites he who turned his back [on truth] and went away [from obedience]
suras.arabic: تَدْعُوا۟ مَنْ أَدْبَرَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ

suras.text: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.
suras.translation: And collected [wealth] and hoarded.
suras.arabic: وَجَمَعَ فَأَوْعَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:
suras.translation: Indeed, mankind was created anxious:
suras.arabic: ۞ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ خُلِقَ هَلُوعًا

suras.text: When evil touches him, impatient,
suras.translation: When evil touches him, impatient,
suras.arabic: إِذَا مَسَّهُ ٱلشَّرُّ جَزُوعًا

suras.text: Except the observers of prayer -
suras.translation: Except the observers of prayer -
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ

suras.text: Those who are constant in their prayer
suras.translation: Those who are constant in their prayer
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ دَآئِمُونَ

suras.text: And those within whose wealth is a known right
suras.translation: And those within whose wealth is a known right
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ فِىٓ أَمْوَٰلِهِمْ حَقٌّ مَّعْلُومٌ

suras.text: For the petitioner and the deprived -
suras.translation: For the petitioner and the deprived -
suras.arabic: لِّلسَّآئِلِ وَٱلْمَحْرُومِ

suras.text: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed -
suras.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they are not to be blamed -
suras.arabic: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزْوَٰجِهِمْ أَوْ مَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَـٰنُهُمْ فَإِنَّهُمْ غَيْرُ مَلُومِينَ

suras.text: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
suras.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then they are the transgressors -
suras.arabic: فَمَنِ ٱبْتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْعَادُونَ

suras.text: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
suras.translation: And those who are to their trusts and promises attentive
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ لِأَمَـٰنَـٰتِهِمْ وَعَهْدِهِمْ رَٰعُونَ

suras.text: And those who are in their testimonies upright
suras.translation: And those who are in their testimonies upright
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم بِشَهَـٰدَٰتِهِمْ قَآئِمُونَ

suras.text: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:
suras.translation: And those who [carefully] maintain their prayer:
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَلَىٰ صَلَاتِهِمْ يُحَافِظُونَ

suras.text: They will be in gardens, honored.
suras.translation: They will be in gardens, honored.
suras.arabic: أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ مُّكْرَمُونَ

suras.text: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?
suras.translation: [To sit] on [your] right and [your] left in separate groups?
suras.arabic: عَنِ ٱلْيَمِينِ وَعَنِ ٱلشِّمَالِ عِزِينَ

suras.text: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
suras.translation: Does every person among them aspire to enter a garden of pleasure?
suras.arabic: أَيَطْمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُدْخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمٍ

suras.text: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.
suras.translation: No! Indeed, We have created them from that which they know.
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّا خَلَقْنَـٰهُم مِّمَّا يَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
suras.translation: So I swear by the Lord of [all] risings and settings that indeed We are able
suras.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْمَشَـٰرِقِ وَٱلْمَغَـٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَـٰدِرُونَ

suras.text: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.
suras.translation: To replace them with better than them; and We are not to be outdone.
suras.arabic: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيْرًا مِّنْهُمْ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمَسْبُوقِينَ

suras.text: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -
suras.translation: So leave them to converse vainly and amuse themselves until they meet their Day which they are promised -
suras.arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ يَخُوضُوا۟ وَيَلْعَبُوا۟ حَتَّىٰ يُلَـٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى يُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.
suras.translation: The Day they will emerge from the graves rapidly as if they were, toward an erected idol, hastening.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يَخْرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ سِرَاعًا كَأَنَّهُمْ إِلَىٰ نُصُبٍ يُوفِضُونَ

suras.text: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
suras.translation: Their eyes humbled, humiliation will cover them. That is the Day which they had been promised.
suras.arabic: خَـٰشِعَةً أَبْصَـٰرُهُمْ تَرْهَقُهُمْ ذِلَّةٌ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلَّذِى كَانُوا۟ يُوعَدُونَ

suras.text: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
suras.translation: He said, "O my people, indeed I am to you a clear warner,
suras.arabic: قَالَ يَـٰقَوْمِ إِنِّى لَكُمْ نَذِيرٌ مُّبِينٌ

suras.text: [Saying], \'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
suras.translation: [Saying], \'Worship Allah, fear Him and obey me.
suras.arabic: أَنِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ وَٱتَّقُوهُ وَأَطِيعُونِ

suras.text: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.\' "
suras.translation: Allah will forgive you of your sins and delay you for a specified term. Indeed, the time [set by] Allah, when it comes, will not be delayed, if you only knew.\' "
suras.arabic: يَغْفِرْ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمْ وَيُؤَخِّرْكُمْ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلٍ مُّسَمًّى ۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُ ۖ لَوْ كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
suras.translation: He said, "My Lord, indeed I invited my people [to truth] night and day.
suras.arabic: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّى دَعَوْتُ قَوْمِى لَيْلًا وَنَهَارًا

suras.text: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
suras.translation: But my invitation increased them not except in flight.
suras.arabic: فَلَمْ يَزِدْهُمْ دُعَآءِىٓ إِلَّا فِرَارًا

suras.text: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
suras.translation: And indeed, every time I invited them that You may forgive them, they put their fingers in their ears, covered themselves with their garments, persisted, and were arrogant with [great] arrogance.
suras.arabic: وَإِنِّى كُلَّمَا دَعَوْتُهُمْ لِتَغْفِرَ لَهُمْ جَعَلُوٓا۟ أَصَـٰبِعَهُمْ فِىٓ ءَاذَانِهِمْ وَٱسْتَغْشَوْا۟ ثِيَابَهُمْ وَأَصَرُّوا۟ وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ ٱسْتِكْبَارًا

suras.text: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
suras.translation: Then I announced to them and [also] confided to them secretly
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنِّىٓ أَعْلَنتُ لَهُمْ وَأَسْرَرْتُ لَهُمْ إِسْرَارًا

suras.text: And said, \'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
suras.translation: And said, \'Ask forgiveness of your Lord. Indeed, He is ever a Perpetual Forgiver.
suras.arabic: فَقُلْتُ ٱسْتَغْفِرُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارًا

suras.text: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
suras.translation: He will send [rain from] the sky upon you in [continuing] showers
suras.arabic: يُرْسِلِ ٱلسَّمَآءَ عَلَيْكُم مِّدْرَارًا

suras.text: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
suras.translation: And give you increase in wealth and children and provide for you gardens and provide for you rivers.
suras.arabic: وَيُمْدِدْكُم بِأَمْوَٰلٍ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ جَنَّـٰتٍ وَيَجْعَل لَّكُمْ أَنْهَـٰرًا

suras.text: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
suras.translation: What is [the matter] with you that you do not attribute to Allah [due] grandeur
suras.arabic: مَّا لَكُمْ لَا تَرْجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارًا

suras.text: While He has created you in stages?
suras.translation: While He has created you in stages?
suras.arabic: وَقَدْ خَلَقَكُمْ أَطْوَارًا

suras.text: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
suras.translation: Do you not consider how Allah has created seven heavens in layers
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ تَرَوْا۟ كَيْفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبْعَ سَمَـٰوَٰتٍ طِبَاقًا

suras.text: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
suras.translation: And made the moon therein a [reflected] light and made the sun a burning lamp?
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلَ ٱلْقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورًا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمْسَ سِرَاجًا

suras.text: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
suras.translation: And Allah has caused you to grow from the earth a [progressive] growth.
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَرْضِ نَبَاتًا

suras.text: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
suras.translation: Then He will return you into it and extract you [another] extraction.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمْ فِيهَا وَيُخْرِجُكُمْ إِخْرَاجًا

suras.text: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
suras.translation: And Allah has made for you the earth an expanse
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلْأَرْضَ بِسَاطًا

suras.text: That you may follow therein roads of passage.\' "
suras.translation: That you may follow therein roads of passage.\' "
suras.arabic: لِّتَسْلُكُوا۟ مِنْهَا سُبُلًا فِجَاجًا

suras.text: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
suras.translation: And they conspired an immense conspiracy.
suras.arabic: وَمَكَرُوا۟ مَكْرًا كُبَّارًا

suras.text: And said, \'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa\' or Yaghuth and Ya\'uq and Nasr.
suras.translation: And said, \'Never leave your gods and never leave Wadd or Suwa\' or Yaghuth and Ya\'uq and Nasr.
suras.arabic: وَقَالُوا۟ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمْ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدًّا وَلَا سُوَاعًا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسْرًا

suras.text: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
suras.translation: And already they have misled many. And, [my Lord], do not increase the wrongdoers except in error."
suras.arabic: وَقَدْ أَضَلُّوا۟ كَثِيرًا ۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَـٰلًا

suras.text: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
suras.translation: Because of their sins they were drowned and put into the Fire, and they found not for themselves besides Allah [any] helpers.
suras.arabic: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٔـٰتِهِمْ أُغْرِقُوا۟ فَأُدْخِلُوا۟ نَارًا فَلَمْ يَجِدُوا۟ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارًا

suras.text: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
suras.translation: Indeed, if You leave them, they will mislead Your servants and not beget except [every] wicked one and [confirmed] disbeliever.
suras.arabic: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرْهُمْ يُضِلُّوا۟ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓا۟ إِلَّا فَاجِرًا كَفَّارًا

suras.text: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
suras.translation: My Lord, forgive me and my parents and whoever enters my house a believer and the believing men and believing women. And do not increase the wrongdoers except in destruction."
suras.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱغْفِرْ لِى وَلِوَٰلِدَىَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيْتِىَ مُؤْمِنًا وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنَـٰتِ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّـٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارًۢا

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, \'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur\'an.
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "It has been revealed to me that a group of the jinn listened and said, \'Indeed, we have heard an amazing Qur\'an.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أُوحِىَ إِلَىَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسْتَمَعَ نَفَرٌ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا سَمِعْنَا قُرْءَانًا عَجَبًا

suras.text: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.
suras.translation: It guides to the right course, and we have believed in it. And we will never associate with our Lord anyone.
