suras.arabic: يَهْدِىٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشْدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦ ۖ وَلَن نُّشْرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدًا

suras.text: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.
suras.translation: And that our foolish one has been saying about Allah an excessive transgression.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطًا

suras.text: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.
suras.translation: And we had thought that mankind and the jinn would never speak about Allah a lie.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلْإِنسُ وَٱلْجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا

suras.text: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden.
suras.translation: And there were men from mankind who sought refuge in men from the jinn, so they [only] increased them in burden.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالٌ مِّنَ ٱلْإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالٍ مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمْ رَهَقًا

suras.text: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].
suras.translation: And they had thought, as you thought, that Allah would never send anyone [as a messenger].
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُمْ ظَنُّوا۟ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمْ أَن لَّن يَبْعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدًا

suras.text: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.
suras.translation: And we have sought [to reach] the heaven but found it filled with powerful guards and burning flames.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَمَسْنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدْنَـٰهَا مُلِئَتْ حَرَسًا شَدِيدًا وَشُهُبًا

suras.text: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.
suras.translation: And we used to sit therein in positions for hearing, but whoever listens now will find a burning flame lying in wait for him.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقْعُدُ مِنْهَا مَقَـٰعِدَ لِلسَّمْعِ ۖ فَمَن يَسْتَمِعِ ٱلْـَٔانَ يَجِدْ لَهُۥ شِهَابًا رَّصَدًا

suras.text: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.
suras.translation: And we do not know [therefore] whether evil is intended for those on earth or whether their Lord intends for them a right course.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدْرِىٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ أَمْ أَرَادَ بِهِمْ رَبُّهُمْ رَشَدًا

suras.text: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.
suras.translation: And among us are the righteous, and among us are [others] not so; we were [of] divided ways.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّـٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ ۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدًا

suras.text: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.
suras.translation: And we have become certain that we will never cause failure to Allah upon earth, nor can we escape Him by flight.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعْجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَلَن نُّعْجِزَهُۥ هَرَبًا

suras.text: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.
suras.translation: And among us are Muslims [in submission to Allah], and among us are the unjust. And whoever has become Muslim - those have sought out the right course.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلْمُسْلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ ۖ فَمَنْ أَسْلَمَ فَأُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوْا۟ رَشَدًا

suras.text: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.\'
suras.translation: But as for the unjust, they will be, for Hell, firewood.\'
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلْقَـٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُوا۟ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبًا

suras.text: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision
suras.translation: And [Allah revealed] that if they had remained straight on the way, We would have given them abundant provision
suras.arabic: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسْتَقَـٰمُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسْقَيْنَـٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقًا

suras.text: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.
suras.translation: And [He revealed] that the masjids are for Allah, so do not invoke with Allah anyone.
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّ ٱلْمَسَـٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدْعُوا۟ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدًا

suras.text: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."
suras.translation: And that when the Servant of Allah stood up supplicating Him, they almost became about him a compacted mass."
suras.arabic: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبْدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدْعُوهُ كَادُوا۟ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيْهِ لِبَدًا

suras.text: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."
suras.translation: Say, [O Muhammad], "I only invoke my Lord and do not associate with Him anyone."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَآ أَدْعُوا۟ رَبِّى وَلَآ أُشْرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, I do not possess for you [the power of] harm or right direction."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَآ أَمْلِكُ لَكُمْ ضَرًّا وَلَا رَشَدًا

suras.text: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.
suras.translation: Say, "Indeed, there will never protect me from Allah anyone [if I should disobey], nor will I find in other than Him a refuge.
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنِّى لَن يُجِيرَنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدٌ وَلَنْ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلْتَحَدًا

suras.text: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.
suras.translation: But [I have for you] only notification from Allah, and His messages." And whoever disobeys Allah and His Messenger - then indeed, for him is the fire of Hell; they will abide therein forever.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا بَلَـٰغًا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَـٰلَـٰتِهِۦ ۚ وَمَن يَعْصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا

suras.text: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."
suras.translation: Say, "I do not know if what you are promised is near or if my Lord will grant for it a [long] period."
suras.arabic: قُلْ إِنْ أَدْرِىٓ أَقَرِيبٌ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمْ يَجْعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّىٓ أَمَدًا

suras.text: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone
suras.translation: [He is] Knower of the unseen, and He does not disclose His [knowledge of the] unseen to anyone
suras.arabic: عَـٰلِمُ ٱلْغَيْبِ فَلَا يُظْهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيْبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا

suras.text: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers
suras.translation: Except whom He has approved of messengers, and indeed, He sends before each messenger and behind him observers
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرْتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولٍ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسْلُكُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِۦ رَصَدًا

suras.text: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
suras.translation: That he may know that they have conveyed the messages of their Lord; and He has encompassed whatever is with them and has enumerated all things in number.
suras.arabic: لِّيَعْلَمَ أَن قَدْ أَبْلَغُوا۟ رِسَـٰلَـٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيْهِمْ وَأَحْصَىٰ كُلَّ شَىْءٍ عَدَدًۢا

suras.text: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],
suras.translation: O you who wraps himself [in clothing],
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُزَّمِّلُ

suras.text: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -
suras.translation: Arise [to pray] the night, except for a little -
suras.arabic: قُمِ ٱلَّيْلَ إِلَّا قَلِيلًا

suras.text: Half of it - or subtract from it a little
suras.translation: Half of it - or subtract from it a little
suras.arabic: نِّصْفَهُۥٓ أَوِ ٱنقُصْ مِنْهُ قَلِيلًا

suras.text: Or add to it, and recite the Qur\'an with measured recitation.
suras.translation: Or add to it, and recite the Qur\'an with measured recitation.
suras.arabic: أَوْ زِدْ عَلَيْهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَرْتِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.
suras.translation: Indeed, We will cast upon you a heavy word.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا سَنُلْقِى عَلَيْكَ قَوْلًا ثَقِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.
suras.translation: Indeed, the hours of the night are more effective for concurrence [of heart and tongue] and more suitable for words.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيْلِ هِىَ أَشَدُّ وَطْـًٔا وَأَقْوَمُ قِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.
suras.translation: Indeed, for you by day is prolonged occupation.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لَكَ فِى ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبْحًا طَوِيلًا

suras.text: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.
suras.translation: And remember the name of your Lord and devote yourself to Him with [complete] devotion.
suras.arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلْ إِلَيْهِ تَبْتِيلًا

suras.text: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.
suras.translation: [He is] the Lord of the East and the West; there is no deity except Him, so take Him as Disposer of [your] affairs.
suras.arabic: رَّبُّ ٱلْمَشْرِقِ وَٱلْمَغْرِبِ لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذْهُ وَكِيلًا

suras.text: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.
suras.translation: And be patient over what they say and avoid them with gracious avoidance.
suras.arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهْجُرْهُمْ هَجْرًا جَمِيلًا

suras.text: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.
suras.translation: And leave Me with [the matter of] the deniers, those of ease [in life], and allow them respite a little.
suras.arabic: وَذَرْنِى وَٱلْمُكَذِّبِينَ أُو۟لِى ٱلنَّعْمَةِ وَمَهِّلْهُمْ قَلِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
suras.translation: Indeed, with Us [for them] are shackles and burning fire
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لَدَيْنَآ أَنكَالًا وَجَحِيمًا

suras.text: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?
suras.translation: Then how can you fear, if you disbelieve, a Day that will make the children white- haired?
suras.arabic: فَكَيْفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرْتُمْ يَوْمًا يَجْعَلُ ٱلْوِلْدَٰنَ شِيبًا

suras.text: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.
suras.translation: The heaven will break apart therefrom; ever is His promise fulfilled.
suras.arabic: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرٌۢ بِهِۦ ۚ كَانَ وَعْدُهُۥ مَفْعُولًا

suras.text: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.
suras.translation: Indeed, this is a reminder, so whoever wills may take to his Lord a way.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا

suras.text: O you who covers himself [with a garment],
suras.translation: O you who covers himself [with a garment],
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ

suras.text: And do not confer favor to acquire more
suras.translation: And do not confer favor to acquire more
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ

suras.text: That Day will be a difficult day
suras.translation: That Day will be a difficult day
suras.arabic: فَذَٰلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ

suras.text: Leave Me with the one I created alone
suras.translation: Leave Me with the one I created alone
suras.arabic: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًا

suras.text: And to whom I granted extensive wealth
suras.translation: And to whom I granted extensive wealth
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالًا مَّمْدُودًا

suras.text: And children present [with him]
suras.translation: And children present [with him]
suras.arabic: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًا

suras.text: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life].
suras.translation: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life].
suras.arabic: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًا

suras.text: Then he desires that I should add more.
suras.translation: Then he desires that I should add more.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ

suras.text: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate.
suras.translation: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate.
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا عَنِيدًا

suras.text: I will cover him with arduous torment.
suras.translation: I will cover him with arduous torment.
suras.arabic: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا

suras.text: Indeed, he thought and deliberated.
suras.translation: Indeed, he thought and deliberated.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ

suras.text: Then he turned back and was arrogant
suras.translation: Then he turned back and was arrogant
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ

suras.text: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others].
suras.translation: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others].
suras.arabic: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ

suras.text: This is not but the word of a human being."
suras.translation: This is not but the word of a human being."
suras.arabic: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is Saqar?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is Saqar?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ

suras.text: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned],
suras.translation: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned],
suras.arabic: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ

suras.text: Over it are nineteen [angels].
suras.translation: Over it are nineteen [angels].
suras.arabic: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ

suras.text: And [by] the morning when it brightens,
suras.translation: And [by] the morning when it brightens,
suras.arabic: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ

suras.text: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]
suras.translation: Indeed, the Fire is of the greatest [afflictions]
suras.arabic: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ

suras.text: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind.
suras.translation: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind.
suras.arabic: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ

suras.text: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained
suras.translation: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained
suras.arabic: كُلُّ نَفْسٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ

suras.text: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other
suras.translation: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other
suras.arabic: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

suras.text: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar?"
suras.translation: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar?"
suras.arabic: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ

suras.text: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,
suras.translation: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ

suras.text: Nor did we used to feed the poor.
suras.translation: Nor did we used to feed the poor.
suras.arabic: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ

suras.text: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],
suras.translation: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],
suras.arabic: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ

suras.text: Until there came to us the certainty."
suras.translation: Until there came to us the certainty."
suras.arabic: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَىٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ

suras.text: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.
suras.translation: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.
suras.arabic: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَـٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ

suras.text: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away
suras.translation: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away
suras.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ

suras.text: As if they were alarmed donkeys
suras.translation: As if they were alarmed donkeys
suras.arabic: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌ

suras.text: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about.
suras.translation: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about.
suras.arabic: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً

suras.text: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter.
suras.translation: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter.
suras.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْـَٔاخِرَةَ

suras.text: No! Indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder
suras.translation: No! Indeed, the Qur\'an is a reminder
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ

suras.text: Then whoever wills will remember it.
suras.translation: Then whoever wills will remember it.
suras.arabic: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ

suras.text: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.
suras.translation: And they will not remember except that Allah wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ

suras.text: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].
suras.translation: And I swear by the reproaching soul [to the certainty of resurrection].
suras.arabic: وَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلنَّفْسِ ٱللَّوَّامَةِ

suras.text: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?
suras.translation: Does man think that We will not assemble his bones?
suras.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَلَّن نَّجْمَعَ عِظَامَهُۥ

suras.text: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
suras.translation: Yes. [We are] Able [even] to proportion his fingertips.
suras.arabic: بَلَىٰ قَـٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّىَ بَنَانَهُۥ

suras.text: But man desires to continue in sin.
suras.translation: But man desires to continue in sin.
suras.arabic: بَلْ يُرِيدُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ لِيَفْجُرَ أَمَامَهُۥ

suras.text: And the sun and the moon are joined,
suras.translation: And the sun and the moon are joined,
suras.arabic: وَجُمِعَ ٱلشَّمْسُ وَٱلْقَمَرُ

suras.text: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"
suras.translation: Man will say on that Day, "Where is the [place of] escape?"
suras.arabic: يَقُولُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ أَيْنَ ٱلْمَفَرُّ

suras.text: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.
suras.translation: To your Lord, that Day, is the [place of] permanence.
suras.arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمُسْتَقَرُّ

suras.text: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
suras.translation: Man will be informed that Day of what he sent ahead and kept back.
suras.arabic: يُنَبَّؤُا۟ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ

suras.text: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,
suras.translation: Rather, man, against himself, will be a witness,
suras.arabic: بَلِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِۦ بَصِيرَةٌ

suras.text: Even if he presents his excuses.
suras.translation: Even if he presents his excuses.
suras.arabic: وَلَوْ أَلْقَىٰ مَعَاذِيرَهُۥ

suras.text: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur\'an.
suras.translation: Move not your tongue with it, [O Muhammad], to hasten with recitation of the Qur\'an.
suras.arabic: لَا تُحَرِّكْ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعْجَلَ بِهِۦٓ

suras.text: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.
suras.translation: Indeed, upon Us is its collection [in your heart] and [to make possible] its recitation.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا جَمْعَهُۥ وَقُرْءَانَهُۥ

suras.text: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].
suras.translation: Then upon Us is its clarification [to you].
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا بَيَانَهُۥ

suras.text: No! But you love the immediate
suras.translation: No! But you love the immediate
suras.arabic: كَلَّا بَلْ تُحِبُّونَ ٱلْعَاجِلَةَ

suras.text: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,
suras.translation: [Some] faces, that Day, will be radiant,
suras.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاضِرَةٌ

suras.text: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,
suras.translation: And [some] faces, that Day, will be contorted,
suras.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بَاسِرَةٌ

suras.text: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.
suras.translation: Expecting that there will be done to them [something] backbreaking.
suras.arabic: تَظُنُّ أَن يُفْعَلَ بِهَا فَاقِرَةٌ

suras.text: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
suras.translation: No! When the soul has reached the collar bones
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا بَلَغَتِ ٱلتَّرَاقِىَ

suras.text: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"
suras.translation: And it is said, "Who will cure [him]?"
suras.arabic: وَقِيلَ مَنْ ۜ رَاقٍ

suras.text: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
suras.translation: And the dying one is certain that it is the [time of] separation
suras.arabic: وَظَنَّ أَنَّهُ ٱلْفِرَاقُ

suras.text: And the leg is wound about the leg,
suras.translation: And the leg is wound about the leg,
suras.arabic: وَٱلْتَفَّتِ ٱلسَّاقُ بِٱلسَّاقِ

suras.text: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.
suras.translation: To your Lord, that Day, will be the procession.
suras.arabic: إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْمَسَاقُ

suras.text: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.
suras.translation: And the disbeliever had not believed, nor had he prayed.
suras.arabic: فَلَا صَدَّقَ وَلَا صَلَّىٰ

suras.text: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].
suras.translation: And then he went to his people, swaggering [in pride].
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ يَتَمَطَّىٰٓ

suras.text: Does man think that he will be left neglected?
suras.translation: Does man think that he will be left neglected?
suras.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ أَن يُتْرَكَ سُدًى

suras.text: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
suras.translation: Had he not been a sperm from semen emitted?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ يَكُ نُطْفَةً مِّن مَّنِىٍّ يُمْنَىٰ

suras.text: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
suras.translation: Then he was a clinging clot, and [Allah] created [his form] and proportioned [him]
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ عَلَقَةً فَخَلَقَ فَسَوَّىٰ

suras.text: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.
suras.translation: And made of him two mates, the male and the female.
suras.arabic: فَجَعَلَ مِنْهُ ٱلزَّوْجَيْنِ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ

suras.text: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
suras.translation: Is not that [Creator] Able to give life to the dead?
suras.arabic: أَلَيْسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَـٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحْـِۧىَ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ

suras.text: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
suras.translation: Has there [not] come upon man a period of time when he was not a thing [even] mentioned?
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْإِنسَـٰنِ حِينٌ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهْرِ لَمْ يَكُن شَيْـًٔا مَّذْكُورًا

suras.text: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
suras.translation: Indeed, We guided him to the way, be he grateful or be he ungrateful.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا هَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرًا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will drink from a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of Kafur,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ يَشْرَبُونَ مِن كَأْسٍ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا

suras.text: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
suras.translation: A spring of which the [righteous] servants of Allah will drink; they will make it gush forth in force [and abundance].
suras.arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفْجِيرًا

suras.text: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
suras.translation: And they give food in spite of love for it to the needy, the orphan, and the captive,
suras.arabic: وَيُطْعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسْكِينًا وَيَتِيمًا وَأَسِيرًا

suras.text: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
suras.translation: [Saying], "We feed you only for the countenance of Allah. We wish not from you reward or gratitude.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا نُطْعِمُكُمْ لِوَجْهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمْ جَزَآءً وَلَا شُكُورًا

suras.text: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."
suras.translation: Indeed, We fear from our Lord a Day austere and distressful."
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوْمًا عَبُوسًا قَمْطَرِيرًا

suras.text: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
suras.translation: So Allah will protect them from the evil of that Day and give them radiance and happiness
suras.arabic: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمْ نَضْرَةً وَسُرُورًا

suras.text: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
suras.translation: And will reward them for what they patiently endured [with] a garden [in Paradise] and silk [garments].
suras.arabic: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُوا۟ جَنَّةً وَحَرِيرًا

suras.text: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
suras.translation: And near above them are its shades, and its [fruit] to be picked will be lowered in compliance.
suras.arabic: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيْهِمْ ظِلَـٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتْ قُطُوفُهَا تَذْلِيلًا

suras.text: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
suras.translation: And there will be circulated among them vessels of silver and cups having been [created] clear [as glass],
suras.arabic: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيْهِم بِـَٔانِيَةٍ مِّن فِضَّةٍ وَأَكْوَابٍ كَانَتْ قَوَارِيرَا۠

suras.text: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
suras.translation: Clear glasses [made] from silver of which they have determined the measure.
suras.arabic: قَوَارِيرَا۟ مِن فِضَّةٍ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقْدِيرًا

suras.text: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
suras.translation: And they will be given to drink a cup [of wine] whose mixture is of ginger
suras.arabic: وَيُسْقَوْنَ فِيهَا كَأْسًا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا

suras.text: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.
suras.translation: [From] a fountain within Paradise named Salsabeel.
suras.arabic: عَيْنًا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلْسَبِيلًا

suras.text: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
suras.translation: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal. When you see them, you would think them [as beautiful as] scattered pearls.
suras.arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ وِلْدَٰنٌ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيْتَهُمْ حَسِبْتَهُمْ لُؤْلُؤًا مَّنثُورًا

suras.text: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
suras.translation: Upon the inhabitants will be green garments of fine silk and brocade. And they will be adorned with bracelets of silver, and their Lord will give them a purifying drink.
suras.arabic: عَـٰلِيَهُمْ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضْرٌ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٌ ۖ وَحُلُّوٓا۟ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةٍ وَسَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ شَرَابًا طَهُورًا

suras.text: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."
suras.translation: [And it will be said], "Indeed, this is for you a reward, and your effort has been appreciated."
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمْ جَزَآءً وَكَانَ سَعْيُكُم مَّشْكُورًا

suras.text: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur\'an progressively.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is We who have sent down to you, [O Muhammad], the Qur\'an progressively.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا عَلَيْكَ ٱلْقُرْءَانَ تَنزِيلًا

suras.text: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
suras.translation: So be patient for the decision of your Lord and do not obey from among them a sinner or ungrateful [disbeliever].
suras.arabic: فَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعْ مِنْهُمْ ءَاثِمًا أَوْ كَفُورًا

suras.text: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
suras.translation: And mention the name of your Lord [in prayer] morning and evening
suras.arabic: وَٱذْكُرِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا

suras.text: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.
suras.translation: And during the night prostrate to Him and exalt Him a long [part of the] night.
suras.arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَٱسْجُدْ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحْهُ لَيْلًا طَوِيلًا

suras.text: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
suras.translation: Indeed, this is a reminder, so he who wills may take to his Lord a way.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذِهِۦ تَذْكِرَةٌ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا

suras.text: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
suras.translation: And you do not will except that Allah wills. Indeed, Allah is ever Knowing and Wise.
suras.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا

suras.text: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
suras.translation: By those [winds] sent forth in gusts
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلْمُرْسَلَـٰتِ عُرْفًا

suras.text: And the winds that blow violently
suras.translation: And the winds that blow violently
suras.arabic: فَٱلْعَـٰصِفَـٰتِ عَصْفًا

suras.text: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]
suras.translation: And [by] the winds that spread [clouds]
suras.arabic: وَٱلنَّـٰشِرَٰتِ نَشْرًا

suras.text: And those [angels] who bring criterion
suras.translation: And those [angels] who bring criterion
suras.arabic: فَٱلْفَـٰرِقَـٰتِ فَرْقًا

suras.text: And those [angels] who deliver a message
suras.translation: And those [angels] who deliver a message
suras.arabic: فَٱلْمُلْقِيَـٰتِ ذِكْرًا

suras.text: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.
suras.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is to occur.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَا تُوعَدُونَ لَوَٰقِعٌ

suras.text: For what Day was it postponed?
suras.translation: For what Day was it postponed?
suras.arabic: لِأَىِّ يَوْمٍ أُجِّلَتْ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Then We will follow them with the later ones.
suras.translation: Then We will follow them with the later ones.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ نُتْبِعُهُمُ ٱلْـَٔاخِرِينَ

suras.text: Thus do We deal with the criminals.
suras.translation: Thus do We deal with the criminals.
suras.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ نَفْعَلُ بِٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?
suras.translation: Did We not create you from a liquid disdained?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ نَخْلُقكُّم مِّن مَّآءٍ مَّهِينٍ

suras.text: And We placed it in a firm lodging
suras.translation: And We placed it in a firm lodging
suras.arabic: فَجَعَلْنَـٰهُ فِى قَرَارٍ مَّكِينٍ

suras.text: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.
suras.translation: And We determined [it], and excellent [are We] to determine.
suras.arabic: فَقَدَرْنَا فَنِعْمَ ٱلْقَـٰدِرُونَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Have We not made the earth a container
suras.translation: Have We not made the earth a container
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ كِفَاتًا

suras.text: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
suras.translation: And We placed therein lofty, firmly set mountains and have given you to drink sweet water.
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِىَ شَـٰمِخَـٰتٍ وَأَسْقَيْنَـٰكُم مَّآءً فُرَاتًا

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
suras.translation: [They will be told], "Proceed to that which you used to deny.
suras.arabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
suras.translation: Proceed to a shadow [of smoke] having three columns
suras.arabic: ٱنطَلِقُوٓا۟ إِلَىٰ ظِلٍّ ذِى ثَلَـٰثِ شُعَبٍ

suras.text: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
suras.translation: [But having] no cool shade and availing not against the flame."
suras.arabic: لَّا ظَلِيلٍ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ

suras.text: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,
suras.translation: Indeed, it throws sparks [as huge] as a fortress,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهَا تَرْمِى بِشَرَرٍ كَٱلْقَصْرِ

suras.text: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.
suras.translation: As if they were yellowish [black] camels.
suras.arabic: كَأَنَّهُۥ جِمَـٰلَتٌ صُفْرٌ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: This is a Day they will not speak,
suras.translation: This is a Day they will not speak,
suras.arabic: هَـٰذَا يَوْمُ لَا يَنطِقُونَ

suras.text: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.
suras.translation: Nor will it be permitted for them to make an excuse.
suras.arabic: وَلَا يُؤْذَنُ لَهُمْ فَيَعْتَذِرُونَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.
suras.translation: So if you have a plan, then plan against Me.
suras.arabic: فَإِن كَانَ لَكُمْ كَيْدٌ فَكِيدُونِ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among shades and springs
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى ظِلَـٰلٍ وَعُيُونٍ

suras.text: And fruits from whatever they desire,
suras.translation: And fruits from whatever they desire,
suras.arabic: وَفَوَٰكِهَ مِمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ

suras.text: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
suras.translation: [Being told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."
suras.arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.
suras.arabic: إِنَّا كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers.
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: Then in what statement after the Qur\'an will they believe?
suras.translation: Then in what statement after the Qur\'an will they believe?
suras.arabic: فَبِأَىِّ حَدِيثٍۭ بَعْدَهُۥ يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: About what are they asking one another?
suras.translation: About what are they asking one another?
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَمَّ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ

suras.text: That over which they are in disagreement.
suras.translation: That over which they are in disagreement.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى هُمْ فِيهِ مُخْتَلِفُونَ

suras.text: Then, no! They are going to know.
suras.translation: Then, no! They are going to know.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَيَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: Have We not made the earth a resting place?
suras.translation: Have We not made the earth a resting place?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَلِ ٱلْأَرْضَ مِهَـٰدًا

suras.text: And made your sleep [a means for] rest
suras.translation: And made your sleep [a means for] rest
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا نَوْمَكُمْ سُبَاتًا

suras.text: And made the night as clothing
suras.translation: And made the night as clothing
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلَّيْلَ لِبَاسًا

suras.text: And made the day for livelihood
suras.translation: And made the day for livelihood
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا ٱلنَّهَارَ مَعَاشًا

suras.text: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
suras.translation: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
suras.arabic: وَبَنَيْنَا فَوْقَكُمْ سَبْعًا شِدَادًا

suras.text: And made [therein] a burning lamp
suras.translation: And made [therein] a burning lamp
suras.arabic: وَجَعَلْنَا سِرَاجًا وَهَّاجًا

suras.text: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water
suras.translation: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water
suras.arabic: وَأَنزَلْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمُعْصِرَٰتِ مَآءً ثَجَّاجًا

suras.text: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
suras.translation: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
suras.arabic: لِّنُخْرِجَ بِهِۦ حَبًّا وَنَبَاتًا

suras.text: And gardens of entwined growth.
suras.translation: And gardens of entwined growth.
suras.arabic: وَجَنَّـٰتٍ أَلْفَافًا

suras.text: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
suras.translation: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يُنفَخُ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأْتُونَ أَفْوَاجًا

suras.text: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways
suras.translation: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways
suras.arabic: وَفُتِحَتِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ فَكَانَتْ أَبْوَٰبًا

suras.text: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
suras.translation: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
suras.arabic: وَسُيِّرَتِ ٱلْجِبَالُ فَكَانَتْ سَرَابًا

suras.text: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
suras.translation: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
suras.arabic: إِنَّ جَهَنَّمَ كَانَتْ مِرْصَادًا

suras.text: For the transgressors, a place of return,
suras.translation: For the transgressors, a place of return,
suras.arabic: لِّلطَّـٰغِينَ مَـَٔابًا

suras.text: In which they will remain for ages [unending].
suras.translation: In which they will remain for ages [unending].
suras.arabic: لَّـٰبِثِينَ فِيهَآ أَحْقَابًا

suras.text: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
suras.translation: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
suras.arabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرْدًا وَلَا شَرَابًا

suras.text: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
suras.translation: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
suras.arabic: إِلَّا حَمِيمًا وَغَسَّاقًا

suras.text: Indeed, they were not expecting an account
suras.translation: Indeed, they were not expecting an account
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ لَا يَرْجُونَ حِسَابًا

suras.text: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.
suras.translation: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.
suras.arabic: وَكَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَـٰتِنَا كِذَّابًا

suras.text: But all things We have enumerated in writing.
suras.translation: But all things We have enumerated in writing.
suras.arabic: وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنَـٰهُ كِتَـٰبًا

suras.text: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
suras.translation: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
suras.arabic: إِنَّ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ مَفَازًا

suras.text: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
suras.translation: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
suras.arabic: لَّا يَسْمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغْوًا وَلَا كِذَّٰبًا

suras.text: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,
suras.translation: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,
suras.arabic: جَزَآءً مِّن رَّبِّكَ عَطَآءً حِسَابًا

suras.text: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
suras.translation: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
suras.arabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ۖ لَا يَمْلِكُونَ مِنْهُ خِطَابًا

suras.text: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
suras.translation: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ صَفًّا ۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنْ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابًا

suras.text: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
suras.translation: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
suras.arabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْيَوْمُ ٱلْحَقُّ ۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا

suras.text: By those [angels] who extract with violence
suras.translation: By those [angels] who extract with violence
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا

suras.text: And [by] those who remove with ease
suras.translation: And [by] those who remove with ease
suras.arabic: وَٱلنَّـٰشِطَـٰتِ نَشْطًا

suras.text: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
suras.translation: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّـٰبِحَـٰتِ سَبْحًا

suras.text: And those who race each other in a race
suras.translation: And those who race each other in a race
suras.arabic: فَٱلسَّـٰبِقَـٰتِ سَبْقًا

suras.text: And those who arrange [each] matter,
suras.translation: And those who arrange [each] matter,
suras.arabic: فَٱلْمُدَبِّرَٰتِ أَمْرًا

suras.text: There will follow it the subsequent [one].
suras.translation: There will follow it the subsequent [one].
suras.arabic: تَتْبَعُهَا ٱلرَّادِفَةُ

suras.text: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,
suras.translation: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,
suras.arabic: قُلُوبٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ وَاجِفَةٌ

suras.text: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
suras.translation: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
suras.arabic: يَقُولُونَ أَءِنَّا لَمَرْدُودُونَ فِى ٱلْحَافِرَةِ

suras.text: Even if we should be decayed bones?
suras.translation: Even if we should be decayed bones?
suras.arabic: أَءِذَا كُنَّا عِظَـٰمًا نَّخِرَةً

suras.text: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
suras.translation: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
suras.arabic: قَالُوا۟ تِلْكَ إِذًا كَرَّةٌ خَاسِرَةٌ

suras.text: Indeed, it will be but one shout,
suras.translation: Indeed, it will be but one shout,
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا هِىَ زَجْرَةٌ وَٰحِدَةٌ

suras.text: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth\'s surface.
suras.translation: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth\'s surface.
suras.arabic: فَإِذَا هُم بِٱلسَّاهِرَةِ

suras.text: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
suras.translation: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
suras.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى

suras.text: And say to him, \'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
suras.translation: And say to him, \'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
suras.arabic: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ

suras.text: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?\'"
suras.translation: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?\'"
suras.arabic: وَأَهْدِيَكَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَتَخْشَىٰ

suras.text: And he showed him the greatest sign,
suras.translation: And he showed him the greatest sign,
suras.arabic: فَأَرَىٰهُ ٱلْـَٔايَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

suras.text: Then he turned his back, striving.
suras.translation: Then he turned his back, striving.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ يَسْعَىٰ

suras.text: And he gathered [his people] and called out
suras.translation: And he gathered [his people] and called out
suras.arabic: فَحَشَرَ فَنَادَىٰ

suras.text: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."
suras.translation: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."
suras.arabic: فَقَالَ أَنَا۠ رَبُّكُمُ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ

suras.text: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].
suras.translation: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].
suras.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ

suras.text: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
suras.translation: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
suras.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا

suras.text: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
suras.translation: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
suras.arabic: رَفَعَ سَمْكَهَا فَسَوَّىٰهَا

suras.text: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
suras.translation: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
suras.arabic: وَأَغْطَشَ لَيْلَهَا وَأَخْرَجَ ضُحَىٰهَا

suras.text: And after that He spread the earth.
suras.translation: And after that He spread the earth.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضَ بَعْدَ ذَٰلِكَ دَحَىٰهَآ

suras.text: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
suras.translation: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
suras.arabic: أَخْرَجَ مِنْهَا مَآءَهَا وَمَرْعَىٰهَا

suras.text: And the mountains He set firmly
suras.translation: And the mountains He set firmly
suras.arabic: وَٱلْجِبَالَ أَرْسَىٰهَا

suras.text: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
suras.translation: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
suras.arabic: مَتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ

suras.text: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -
suras.translation: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -
suras.arabic: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلطَّآمَّةُ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

suras.text: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
suras.translation: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
suras.arabic: وَبُرِّزَتِ ٱلْجَحِيمُ لِمَن يَرَىٰ

suras.text: And preferred the life of the world,
suras.translation: And preferred the life of the world,
suras.arabic: وَءَاثَرَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا

suras.text: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.
suras.translation: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ

suras.text: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
suras.translation: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّ ٱلْجَنَّةَ هِىَ ٱلْمَأْوَىٰ

suras.text: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
suras.translation: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
suras.arabic: يَسْـَٔلُونَكَ عَنِ ٱلسَّاعَةِ أَيَّانَ مُرْسَىٰهَا

suras.text: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
suras.translation: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
suras.arabic: فِيمَ أَنتَ مِن ذِكْرَىٰهَآ

suras.text: You are only a warner for those who fear it.
suras.translation: You are only a warner for those who fear it.
suras.arabic: إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُنذِرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰهَا

suras.text: The Prophet frowned and turned away
suras.translation: The Prophet frowned and turned away
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ عَبَسَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ

suras.text: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].
suras.translation: Because there came to him the blind man, [interrupting].
suras.arabic: أَن جَآءَهُ ٱلْأَعْمَىٰ

suras.text: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
suras.translation: But what would make you perceive, [O Muhammad], that perhaps he might be purified
suras.arabic: وَمَا يُدْرِيكَ لَعَلَّهُۥ يَزَّكَّىٰٓ

suras.text: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
suras.translation: Or be reminded and the remembrance would benefit him?
suras.arabic: أَوْ يَذَّكَّرُ فَتَنفَعَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰٓ

suras.text: As for he who thinks himself without need,
suras.translation: As for he who thinks himself without need,
suras.arabic: أَمَّا مَنِ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰ

suras.text: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
suras.translation: And not upon you [is any blame] if he will not be purified.
suras.arabic: وَمَا عَلَيْكَ أَلَّا يَزَّكَّىٰ

suras.text: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
suras.translation: But as for he who came to you striving [for knowledge]
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَن جَآءَكَ يَسْعَىٰ

suras.text: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
suras.translation: No! Indeed, these verses are a reminder;
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهَا تَذْكِرَةٌ

suras.text: So whoever wills may remember it.
suras.translation: So whoever wills may remember it.
suras.arabic: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ

suras.text: [It is recorded] in honored sheets,
suras.translation: [It is recorded] in honored sheets,
suras.arabic: فِى صُحُفٍ مُّكَرَّمَةٍ

suras.text: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,
suras.translation: [Carried] by the hands of messenger-angels,
suras.arabic: بِأَيْدِى سَفَرَةٍ

suras.text: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
suras.translation: Cursed is man; how disbelieving is he.
suras.arabic: قُتِلَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَآ أَكْفَرَهُۥ

suras.text: From what substance did He create him?
suras.translation: From what substance did He create him?
suras.arabic: مِنْ أَىِّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقَهُۥ

suras.text: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
suras.translation: From a sperm-drop He created him and destined for him;
suras.arabic: مِن نُّطْفَةٍ خَلَقَهُۥ فَقَدَّرَهُۥ

suras.text: Then He eased the way for him;
suras.translation: Then He eased the way for him;
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ ٱلسَّبِيلَ يَسَّرَهُۥ

suras.text: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
suras.translation: Then He causes his death and provides a grave for him.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ أَمَاتَهُۥ فَأَقْبَرَهُۥ

suras.text: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
suras.translation: No! Man has not yet accomplished what He commanded him.
suras.arabic: كَلَّا لَمَّا يَقْضِ مَآ أَمَرَهُۥ

suras.text: Then let mankind look at his food -
suras.translation: Then let mankind look at his food -
suras.arabic: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِلَىٰ طَعَامِهِۦٓ

suras.text: How We poured down water in torrents,
suras.translation: How We poured down water in torrents,
suras.arabic: أَنَّا صَبَبْنَا ٱلْمَآءَ صَبًّا

suras.text: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
suras.translation: Then We broke open the earth, splitting [it with sprouts],
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ شَقَقْنَا ٱلْأَرْضَ شَقًّا

suras.text: And caused to grow within it grain
suras.translation: And caused to grow within it grain
suras.arabic: فَأَنۢبَتْنَا فِيهَا حَبًّا

suras.text: And gardens of dense shrubbery
suras.translation: And gardens of dense shrubbery
suras.arabic: وَحَدَآئِقَ غُلْبًا

suras.text: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
suras.translation: [As] enjoyment for you and your grazing livestock.
suras.arabic: مَّتَـٰعًا لَّكُمْ وَلِأَنْعَـٰمِكُمْ

suras.text: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
suras.translation: But when there comes the Deafening Blast
suras.arabic: فَإِذَا جَآءَتِ ٱلصَّآخَّةُ

suras.text: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
suras.translation: For every man, that Day, will be a matter adequate for him.
suras.arabic: لِكُلِّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ شَأْنٌ يُغْنِيهِ

suras.text: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
suras.translation: [Some] faces, that Day, will be bright -
suras.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ مُّسْفِرَةٌ

suras.text: Laughing, rejoicing at good news.
suras.translation: Laughing, rejoicing at good news.
suras.arabic: ضَاحِكَةٌ مُّسْتَبْشِرَةٌ

suras.text: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
suras.translation: And [other] faces, that Day, will have upon them dust.
suras.arabic: وَوُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَلَيْهَا غَبَرَةٌ

suras.text: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
suras.translation: When the sun is wrapped up [in darkness]
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ

suras.text: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
suras.translation: A soul will [then] know what it has brought [with it].
suras.arabic: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّآ أَحْضَرَتْ

suras.text: So I swear by the retreating stars -
suras.translation: So I swear by the retreating stars -
suras.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلْخُنَّسِ

suras.text: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
suras.translation: Those that run [their courses] and disappear -
suras.arabic: ٱلْجَوَارِ ٱلْكُنَّسِ

suras.text: And by the night as it closes in
suras.translation: And by the night as it closes in
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذَا عَسْعَسَ

suras.text: And by the dawn when it breathes
suras.translation: And by the dawn when it breathes
suras.arabic: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَا تَنَفَّسَ

suras.text: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
suras.translation: [That] indeed, the Qur\'an is a word [conveyed by] a noble messenger
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلُ رَسُولٍ كَرِيمٍ

suras.text: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
suras.translation: [Who is] possessed of power and with the Owner of the Throne, secure [in position],
suras.arabic: ذِى قُوَّةٍ عِندَ ذِى ٱلْعَرْشِ مَكِينٍ

suras.text: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
suras.translation: Obeyed there [in the heavens] and trustworthy.
suras.arabic: مُّطَاعٍ ثَمَّ أَمِينٍ

suras.text: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
suras.translation: And your companion is not [at all] mad.
suras.arabic: وَمَا صَاحِبُكُم بِمَجْنُونٍ

suras.text: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
suras.translation: And he has already seen Gabriel in the clear horizon.
suras.arabic: وَلَقَدْ رَءَاهُ بِٱلْأُفُقِ ٱلْمُبِينِ

suras.text: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
suras.translation: And Muhammad is not a withholder of [knowledge of] the unseen.
suras.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ عَلَى ٱلْغَيْبِ بِضَنِينٍ

suras.text: And the Qur\'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
suras.translation: And the Qur\'an is not the word of a devil, expelled [from the heavens].
suras.arabic: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوْلِ شَيْطَـٰنٍ رَّجِيمٍ

suras.text: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
suras.translation: It is not except a reminder to the worlds
suras.arabic: إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ لِّلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
suras.translation: For whoever wills among you to take a right course.
suras.arabic: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَسْتَقِيمَ

suras.text: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
suras.translation: And you do not will except that Allah wills - Lord of the worlds.
suras.arabic: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ

suras.text: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
suras.translation: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
suras.arabic: عَلِمَتْ نَفْسٌ مَّا قَدَّمَتْ وَأَخَّرَتْ

suras.text: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
suras.translation: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ

suras.text: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?
suras.translation: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَكَ فَسَوَّىٰكَ فَعَدَلَكَ

suras.text: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
suras.translation: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
suras.arabic: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ

suras.text: No! But you deny the Recompense.
suras.translation: No! But you deny the Recompense.
suras.arabic: كَلَّا بَلْ تُكَذِّبُونَ بِٱلدِّينِ

suras.text: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
suras.translation: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ عَلَيْكُمْ لَحَـٰفِظِينَ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ

suras.text: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
suras.translation: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ ٱلْفُجَّارَ لَفِى جَحِيمٍ

suras.text: And never therefrom will they be absent.
suras.translation: And never therefrom will they be absent.
suras.arabic: وَمَا هُمْ عَنْهَا بِغَآئِبِينَ

suras.text: Woe to those who give less [than due],
suras.translation: Woe to those who give less [than due],
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّلْمُطَفِّفِينَ

suras.text: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
suras.translation: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ إِذَا ٱكْتَالُوا۟ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ

suras.text: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
suras.translation: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.
suras.arabic: وَإِذَا كَالُوهُمْ أَو وَّزَنُوهُمْ يُخْسِرُونَ

suras.text: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
suras.translation: Do they not think that they will be resurrected
suras.arabic: أَلَا يَظُنُّ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ أَنَّهُم مَّبْعُوثُونَ

suras.text: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
suras.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْفُجَّارِ لَفِى سِجِّينٍ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا سِجِّينٌ

suras.text: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
suras.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.
suras.arabic: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ

suras.text: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
suras.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,
suras.arabic: وَيْلٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ

suras.text: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
suras.translation: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.
suras.arabic: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِۦٓ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ

suras.text: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
suras.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."
suras.arabic: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ ءَايَـٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَـٰطِيرُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ

suras.text: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
suras.translation: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.
suras.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ

suras.text: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
suras.translation: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ

suras.text: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.
suras.translation: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّهُمْ لَصَالُوا۟ ٱلْجَحِيمِ

suras.text: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
suras.translation: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَـٰذَا ٱلَّذِى كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in \'illiyyun.
suras.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in \'illiyyun.
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ كِتَـٰبَ ٱلْأَبْرَارِ لَفِى عِلِّيِّينَ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is \'illiyyun?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is \'illiyyun?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا عِلِّيُّونَ

suras.text: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
suras.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed
suras.arabic: كِتَـٰبٌ مَّرْقُومٌ

suras.text: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
suras.translation: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
suras.arabic: يَشْهَدُهُ ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
suras.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْأَبْرَارَ لَفِى نَعِيمٍ

suras.text: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
suras.translation: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.
suras.arabic: تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِهِمْ نَضْرَةَ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

suras.text: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.
suras.translation: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.
suras.arabic: يُسْقَوْنَ مِن رَّحِيقٍ مَّخْتُومٍ

suras.text: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
suras.translation: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.
suras.arabic: خِتَـٰمُهُۥ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِى ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ ٱلْمُتَنَـٰفِسُونَ

suras.text: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
suras.translation: And its mixture is of Tasneem,
suras.arabic: وَمِزَاجُهُۥ مِن تَسْنِيمٍ

suras.text: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.
suras.translation: A spring from which those near [to Allah] drink.
suras.arabic: عَيْنًا يَشْرَبُ بِهَا ٱلْمُقَرَّبُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
suras.translation: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا۟ كَانُوا۟ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ يَضْحَكُونَ

suras.text: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.
suras.translation: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أُرْسِلُوا۟ عَلَيْهِمْ حَـٰفِظِينَ

suras.text: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
suras.translation: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
suras.arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ

suras.text: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
suras.translation: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it]
suras.arabic: وَأَلْقَتْ مَا فِيهَا وَتَخَلَّتْ

suras.text: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
suras.translation: And has responded to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -
suras.arabic: وَأَذِنَتْ لِرَبِّهَا وَحُقَّتْ

suras.text: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
suras.translation: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ

suras.text: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
suras.translation: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ

suras.text: And return to his people in happiness.
suras.translation: And return to his people in happiness.
suras.arabic: وَيَنقَلِبُ إِلَىٰٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا

suras.text: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
suras.translation: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ

suras.text: He will cry out for destruction
suras.translation: He will cry out for destruction
suras.arabic: فَسَوْفَ يَدْعُوا۟ ثُبُورًا

suras.text: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
suras.translation: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
suras.arabic: وَيَصْلَىٰ سَعِيرًا

suras.text: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
suras.translation: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ فِىٓ أَهْلِهِۦ مَسْرُورًا

suras.text: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].
suras.translation: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allah].
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ ظَنَّ أَن لَّن يَحُورَ

suras.text: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
suras.translation: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever of him, Seeing.
suras.arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا

suras.text: So I swear by the twilight glow
suras.translation: So I swear by the twilight glow
suras.arabic: فَلَآ أُقْسِمُ بِٱلشَّفَقِ

suras.text: And [by] the night and what it envelops
suras.translation: And [by] the night and what it envelops
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّيْلِ وَمَا وَسَقَ

suras.text: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
suras.translation: And [by] the moon when it becomes full
suras.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا ٱتَّسَقَ

suras.text: [That] you will surely experience state after state.
suras.translation: [That] you will surely experience state after state.
suras.arabic: لَتَرْكَبُنَّ طَبَقًا عَن طَبَقٍ

suras.text: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,
suras.translation: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,
suras.arabic: فَمَا لَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

suras.text: But those who have disbelieved deny,
suras.translation: But those who have disbelieved deny,
suras.arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ يُكَذِّبُونَ

suras.text: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
suras.translation: And Allah is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا يُوعُونَ

suras.text: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
suras.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ

suras.text: By the sky containing great stars
suras.translation: By the sky containing great stars
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلْبُرُوجِ

suras.text: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
suras.translation: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,
suras.arabic: وَشَاهِدٍ وَمَشْهُودٍ

suras.text: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,
suras.translation: [Containing] the fire full of fuel,
suras.arabic: ٱلنَّارِ ذَاتِ ٱلْوَقُودِ

suras.text: When they were sitting near it
suras.translation: When they were sitting near it
suras.arabic: إِذْ هُمْ عَلَيْهَا قُعُودٌ

suras.text: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,
suras.translation: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allah, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,
suras.arabic: وَمَا نَقَمُوا۟ مِنْهُمْ إِلَّآ أَن يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْحَمِيدِ

suras.text: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.
suras.translation: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allah, over all things, is Witness.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى لَهُۥ مُلْكُ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ ۚ وَٱللَّهُ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَىْءٍ شَهِيدٌ

suras.text: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
suras.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ

suras.text: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.
suras.translation: Indeed, the vengeance of your Lord is severe.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ بَطْشَ رَبِّكَ لَشَدِيدٌ

suras.text: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
suras.translation: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ يُبْدِئُ وَيُعِيدُ

suras.text: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
suras.translation: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,
suras.arabic: وَهُوَ ٱلْغَفُورُ ٱلْوَدُودُ

suras.text: Honorable Owner of the Throne,
suras.translation: Honorable Owner of the Throne,
suras.arabic: ذُو ٱلْعَرْشِ ٱلْمَجِيدُ

suras.text: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
suras.translation: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,
suras.arabic: بَلِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ فِى تَكْذِيبٍ

suras.text: While Allah encompasses them from behind.
suras.translation: While Allah encompasses them from behind.
suras.arabic: وَٱللَّهُ مِن وَرَآئِهِم مُّحِيطٌۢ

suras.text: But this is an honored Qur\'an
suras.translation: But this is an honored Qur\'an
suras.arabic: بَلْ هُوَ قُرْءَانٌ مَّجِيدٌ

suras.text: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
suras.translation: [Inscribed] in a Preserved Slate.
suras.arabic: فِى لَوْحٍ مَّحْفُوظٍۭ

suras.text: By the sky and the night comer -
suras.translation: By the sky and the night comer -
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلطَّارِقِ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is the night comer?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلطَّارِقُ

suras.text: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
suras.translation: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.
suras.arabic: إِن كُلُّ نَفْسٍ لَّمَّا عَلَيْهَا حَافِظٌ

suras.text: So let man observe from what he was created.
suras.translation: So let man observe from what he was created.
suras.arabic: فَلْيَنظُرِ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مِمَّ خُلِقَ

suras.text: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
suras.translation: He was created from a fluid, ejected,
suras.arabic: خُلِقَ مِن مَّآءٍ دَافِقٍ

suras.text: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
suras.translation: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.
suras.arabic: يَخْرُجُ مِنۢ بَيْنِ ٱلصُّلْبِ وَٱلتَّرَآئِبِ

suras.text: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
suras.translation: Indeed, Allah, to return him [to life], is Able.
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ رَجْعِهِۦ لَقَادِرٌ

suras.text: Then man will have no power or any helper.
suras.translation: Then man will have no power or any helper.
suras.arabic: فَمَا لَهُۥ مِن قُوَّةٍ وَلَا نَاصِرٍ

suras.text: By the sky which returns [rain]
suras.translation: By the sky which returns [rain]
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ ذَاتِ ٱلرَّجْعِ

suras.text: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
suras.translation: And [by] the earth which cracks open,
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضِ ذَاتِ ٱلصَّدْعِ

suras.text: Indeed, the Qur\'an is a decisive statement,
suras.translation: Indeed, the Qur\'an is a decisive statement,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُۥ لَقَوْلٌ فَصْلٌ

suras.text: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
suras.translation: Indeed, they are planning a plan,
suras.arabic: إِنَّهُمْ يَكِيدُونَ كَيْدًا

suras.text: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
suras.translation: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ سَبِّحِ ٱسْمَ رَبِّكَ ٱلْأَعْلَى

suras.text: And who destined and [then] guided
suras.translation: And who destined and [then] guided
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِى قَدَّرَ فَهَدَىٰ

suras.text: And who brings out the pasture
suras.translation: And who brings out the pasture
suras.arabic: وَٱلَّذِىٓ أَخْرَجَ ٱلْمَرْعَىٰ

suras.text: And [then] makes it black stubble.
suras.translation: And [then] makes it black stubble.
suras.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُۥ غُثَآءً أَحْوَىٰ

suras.text: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,
suras.translation: We will make you recite, [O Muhammad], and you will not forget,
suras.arabic: سَنُقْرِئُكَ فَلَا تَنسَىٰٓ

suras.text: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
suras.translation: Except what Allah should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَا شَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ يَعْلَمُ ٱلْجَهْرَ وَمَا يَخْفَىٰ

suras.text: And We will ease you toward ease.
suras.translation: And We will ease you toward ease.
suras.arabic: وَنُيَسِّرُكَ لِلْيُسْرَىٰ

suras.text: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
suras.translation: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;
suras.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِن نَّفَعَتِ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ

suras.text: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
suras.translation: He who fears [Allah] will be reminded.
suras.arabic: سَيَذَّكَّرُ مَن يَخْشَىٰ

suras.text: But the wretched one will avoid it -
suras.translation: But the wretched one will avoid it -
suras.arabic: وَيَتَجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَشْقَى

suras.text: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,
suras.translation: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى يَصْلَى ٱلنَّارَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰ

suras.text: Neither dying therein nor living.
suras.translation: Neither dying therein nor living.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَا يَمُوتُ فِيهَا وَلَا يَحْيَىٰ

suras.text: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
suras.translation: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself
suras.arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن تَزَكَّىٰ

suras.text: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
suras.translation: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.
suras.arabic: وَذَكَرَ ٱسْمَ رَبِّهِۦ فَصَلَّىٰ

suras.text: But you prefer the worldly life,
suras.translation: But you prefer the worldly life,
suras.arabic: بَلْ تُؤْثِرُونَ ٱلْحَيَوٰةَ ٱلدُّنْيَا

suras.text: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
suras.translation: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.
suras.arabic: وَٱلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ وَأَبْقَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
suras.translation: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,
suras.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا لَفِى ٱلصُّحُفِ ٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
suras.translation: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.
suras.arabic: صُحُفِ إِبْرَٰهِيمَ وَمُوسَىٰ

suras.text: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
suras.translation: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ هَلْ أَتَىٰكَ حَدِيثُ ٱلْغَـٰشِيَةِ

suras.text: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
suras.translation: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,
suras.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ خَـٰشِعَةٌ

suras.text: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
suras.translation: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.
suras.arabic: تَصْلَىٰ نَارًا حَامِيَةً

suras.text: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.
suras.translation: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.
suras.arabic: تُسْقَىٰ مِنْ عَيْنٍ ءَانِيَةٍ

suras.text: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
suras.translation: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant
suras.arabic: لَّيْسَ لَهُمْ طَعَامٌ إِلَّا مِن ضَرِيعٍ

suras.text: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
suras.translation: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.
suras.arabic: لَّا يُسْمِنُ وَلَا يُغْنِى مِن جُوعٍ

suras.text: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
suras.translation: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.
suras.arabic: وُجُوهٌ يَوْمَئِذٍ نَّاعِمَةٌ

suras.text: With their effort [they are] satisfied
suras.translation: With their effort [they are] satisfied
suras.arabic: لِّسَعْيِهَا رَاضِيَةٌ

suras.text: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
suras.translation: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.
suras.arabic: لَّا تَسْمَعُ فِيهَا لَـٰغِيَةً

suras.text: Within it is a flowing spring.
suras.translation: Within it is a flowing spring.
suras.arabic: فِيهَا عَيْنٌ جَارِيَةٌ

suras.text: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
suras.translation: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?
suras.arabic: أَفَلَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَى ٱلْإِبِلِ كَيْفَ خُلِقَتْ

suras.text: And at the sky - how it is raised?
suras.translation: And at the sky - how it is raised?
suras.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلسَّمَآءِ كَيْفَ رُفِعَتْ

suras.text: And at the mountains - how they are erected?
suras.translation: And at the mountains - how they are erected?
suras.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلْجِبَالِ كَيْفَ نُصِبَتْ

suras.text: And at the earth - how it is spread out?
suras.translation: And at the earth - how it is spread out?
suras.arabic: وَإِلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ كَيْفَ سُطِحَتْ

suras.text: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
suras.translation: So remind, [O Muhammad]; you are only a reminder.
suras.arabic: فَذَكِّرْ إِنَّمَآ أَنتَ مُذَكِّرٌ

suras.text: You are not over them a controller.
suras.translation: You are not over them a controller.
suras.arabic: لَّسْتَ عَلَيْهِم بِمُصَيْطِرٍ

suras.text: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
suras.translation: However, he who turns away and disbelieves -
suras.arabic: إِلَّا مَن تَوَلَّىٰ وَكَفَرَ

suras.text: Indeed, to Us is their return.
suras.translation: Indeed, to Us is their return.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ إِلَيْنَآ إِيَابَهُمْ

suras.text: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
suras.translation: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا حِسَابَهُم

suras.text: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
suras.translation: And [by] the even [number] and the odd
suras.arabic: وَٱلشَّفْعِ وَٱلْوَتْرِ

suras.text: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,
suras.translation: [With] Iram - who had lofty pillars,
suras.arabic: إِرَمَ ذَاتِ ٱلْعِمَادِ

suras.text: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
suras.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?
suras.arabic: ٱلَّتِى لَمْ يُخْلَقْ مِثْلُهَا فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ

suras.text: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
suras.translation: And [with] Thamud, who carved out the rocks in the valley?
suras.arabic: وَثَمُودَ ٱلَّذِينَ جَابُوا۟ ٱلصَّخْرَ بِٱلْوَادِ

suras.text: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
suras.translation: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ طَغَوْا۟ فِى ٱلْبِلَـٰدِ

suras.text: And increased therein the corruption.
suras.translation: And increased therein the corruption.
suras.arabic: فَأَكْثَرُوا۟ فِيهَا ٱلْفَسَادَ

suras.text: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
suras.translation: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ لَبِٱلْمِرْصَادِ

suras.text: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
suras.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."
