suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ فَأَكْرَمَهُۥ وَنَعَّمَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَكْرَمَنِ

suras.text: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
suras.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّآ إِذَا مَا ٱبْتَلَىٰهُ فَقَدَرَ عَلَيْهِ رِزْقَهُۥ فَيَقُولُ رَبِّىٓ أَهَـٰنَنِ

suras.text: No! But you do not honor the orphan
suras.translation: No! But you do not honor the orphan
suras.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ بَل لَّا تُكْرِمُونَ ٱلْيَتِيمَ

suras.text: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
suras.translation: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.
suras.arabic: وَلَا تَحَـٰٓضُّونَ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ

suras.text: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
suras.translation: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,
suras.arabic: وَتَأْكُلُونَ ٱلتُّرَاثَ أَكْلًا لَّمًّا

suras.text: And you love wealth with immense love.
suras.translation: And you love wealth with immense love.
suras.arabic: وَتُحِبُّونَ ٱلْمَالَ حُبًّا جَمًّا

suras.text: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -
suras.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed -
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِذَا دُكَّتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ دَكًّا دَكًّا

suras.text: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,
suras.translation: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,
suras.arabic: وَجَآءَ رَبُّكَ وَٱلْمَلَكُ صَفًّا صَفًّا

suras.text: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
suras.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but what good to him will be the remembrance?
suras.arabic: وَجِا۟ىٓءَ يَوْمَئِذٍۭ بِجَهَنَّمَ ۚ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَتَذَكَّرُ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ وَأَنَّىٰ لَهُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ

suras.text: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."
suras.translation: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."
suras.arabic: يَقُولُ يَـٰلَيْتَنِى قَدَّمْتُ لِحَيَاتِى

suras.text: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
suras.translation: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].
suras.arabic: وَلَا يُوثِقُ وَثَاقَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ

suras.text: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
suras.translation: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,
suras.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيَّتُهَا ٱلنَّفْسُ ٱلْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ

suras.text: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
suras.translation: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],
suras.arabic: ٱرْجِعِىٓ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً

suras.text: And enter among My [righteous] servants
suras.translation: And enter among My [righteous] servants
suras.arabic: فَٱدْخُلِى فِى عِبَـٰدِى

suras.text: I swear by this city, Makkah -
suras.translation: I swear by this city, Makkah -
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لَآ أُقْسِمُ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ

suras.text: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
suras.translation: And you, [O Muhammad], are free of restriction in this city -
suras.arabic: وَأَنتَ حِلٌّۢ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ

suras.text: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
suras.translation: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],
suras.arabic: وَوَالِدٍ وَمَا وَلَدَ

suras.text: We have certainly created man into hardship.
suras.translation: We have certainly created man into hardship.
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِى كَبَدٍ

suras.text: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
suras.translation: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?
suras.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ

suras.text: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
suras.translation: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."
suras.arabic: يَقُولُ أَهْلَكْتُ مَالًا لُّبَدًا

suras.text: Does he think that no one has seen him?
suras.translation: Does he think that no one has seen him?
suras.arabic: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّمْ يَرَهُۥٓ أَحَدٌ

suras.text: Have We not made for him two eyes?
suras.translation: Have We not made for him two eyes?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ نَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عَيْنَيْنِ

suras.text: And have shown him the two ways?
suras.translation: And have shown him the two ways?
suras.arabic: وَهَدَيْنَـٰهُ ٱلنَّجْدَيْنِ

suras.text: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
suras.translation: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.
suras.arabic: فَلَا ٱقْتَحَمَ ٱلْعَقَبَةَ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْعَقَبَةُ

suras.text: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
suras.translation: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger
suras.arabic: أَوْ إِطْعَـٰمٌ فِى يَوْمٍ ذِى مَسْغَبَةٍ

suras.text: An orphan of near relationship
suras.translation: An orphan of near relationship
suras.arabic: يَتِيمًا ذَا مَقْرَبَةٍ

suras.text: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
suras.translation: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْمَرْحَمَةِ

suras.text: Over them will be fire closed in.
suras.translation: Over them will be fire closed in.
suras.arabic: عَلَيْهِمْ نَارٌ مُّؤْصَدَةٌۢ

suras.text: And [by] the moon when it follows it
suras.translation: And [by] the moon when it follows it
suras.arabic: وَٱلْقَمَرِ إِذَا تَلَىٰهَا

suras.text: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
suras.translation: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it
suras.arabic: وَٱلسَّمَآءِ وَمَا بَنَىٰهَا

suras.text: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
suras.translation: And [by] the earth and He who spread it
suras.arabic: وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا طَحَىٰهَا

suras.text: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
suras.translation: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it
suras.arabic: وَنَفْسٍ وَمَا سَوَّىٰهَا

suras.text: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
suras.translation: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,
suras.arabic: فَأَلْهَمَهَا فُجُورَهَا وَتَقْوَىٰهَا

suras.text: He has succeeded who purifies it,
suras.translation: He has succeeded who purifies it,
suras.arabic: قَدْ أَفْلَحَ مَن زَكَّىٰهَا

suras.text: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
suras.translation: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].
suras.arabic: وَقَدْ خَابَ مَن دَسَّىٰهَا

suras.text: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
suras.translation: Thamud denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,
suras.arabic: كَذَّبَتْ ثَمُودُ بِطَغْوَىٰهَآ

suras.text: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.
suras.translation: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.
suras.arabic: إِذِ ٱنۢبَعَثَ أَشْقَىٰهَا

suras.text: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
suras.translation: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.
suras.arabic: وَلَا يَخَافُ عُقْبَـٰهَا

suras.text: And [by] He who created the male and female,
suras.translation: And [by] He who created the male and female,
suras.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقَ ٱلذَّكَرَ وَٱلْأُنثَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
suras.translation: Indeed, your efforts are diverse.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ سَعْيَكُمْ لَشَتَّىٰ

suras.text: As for he who gives and fears Allah
suras.translation: As for he who gives and fears Allah
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَنْ أَعْطَىٰ وَٱتَّقَىٰ

suras.text: And believes in the best [reward],
suras.translation: And believes in the best [reward],
suras.arabic: وَصَدَّقَ بِٱلْحُسْنَىٰ

suras.text: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
suras.translation: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنۢ بَخِلَ وَٱسْتَغْنَىٰ

suras.text: We will ease him toward difficulty.
suras.translation: We will ease him toward difficulty.
suras.arabic: فَسَنُيَسِّرُهُۥ لِلْعُسْرَىٰ

suras.text: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
suras.translation: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?
suras.arabic: وَمَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥٓ إِذَا تَرَدَّىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.
suras.translation: Indeed, [incumbent] upon Us is guidance.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ عَلَيْنَا لَلْهُدَىٰ

suras.text: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
suras.translation: And indeed, to Us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّ لَنَا لَلْـَٔاخِرَةَ وَٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
suras.translation: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.
suras.arabic: فَأَنذَرْتُكُمْ نَارًا تَلَظَّىٰ

suras.text: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
suras.translation: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one.
suras.arabic: لَا يَصْلَىٰهَآ إِلَّا ٱلْأَشْقَى

suras.text: Who had denied and turned away.
suras.translation: Who had denied and turned away.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰ

suras.text: But the righteous one will avoid it -
suras.translation: But the righteous one will avoid it -
suras.arabic: وَسَيُجَنَّبُهَا ٱلْأَتْقَى

suras.text: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
suras.translation: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى يُؤْتِى مَالَهُۥ يَتَزَكَّىٰ

suras.text: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
suras.translation: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded
suras.arabic: وَمَا لِأَحَدٍ عِندَهُۥ مِن نِّعْمَةٍ تُجْزَىٰٓ

suras.text: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
suras.translation: But only seeking the countenance of his Lord, Most High.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱبْتِغَآءَ وَجْهِ رَبِّهِ ٱلْأَعْلَىٰ

suras.text: And he is going to be satisfied.
suras.translation: And he is going to be satisfied.
suras.arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يَرْضَىٰ

suras.text: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
suras.translation: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muhammad], nor has He detested [you].
suras.arabic: مَا وَدَّعَكَ رَبُّكَ وَمَا قَلَىٰ

suras.text: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
suras.translation: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].
suras.arabic: وَلَلْـَٔاخِرَةُ خَيْرٌ لَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ

suras.text: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
suras.translation: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.
suras.arabic: وَلَسَوْفَ يُعْطِيكَ رَبُّكَ فَتَرْضَىٰٓ

suras.text: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
suras.translation: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ يَجِدْكَ يَتِيمًا فَـَٔاوَىٰ

suras.text: And He found you lost and guided [you],
suras.translation: And He found you lost and guided [you],
suras.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ ضَآلًّا فَهَدَىٰ

suras.text: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
suras.translation: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.
suras.arabic: وَوَجَدَكَ عَآئِلًا فَأَغْنَىٰ

suras.text: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
suras.translation: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا ٱلْيَتِيمَ فَلَا تَقْهَرْ

suras.text: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
suras.translation: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا ٱلسَّآئِلَ فَلَا تَنْهَرْ

suras.text: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
suras.translation: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا بِنِعْمَةِ رَبِّكَ فَحَدِّثْ

suras.text: And We removed from you your burden
suras.translation: And We removed from you your burden
suras.arabic: وَوَضَعْنَا عَنكَ وِزْرَكَ

suras.text: Which had weighed upon your back
suras.translation: Which had weighed upon your back
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنقَضَ ظَهْرَكَ

suras.text: And raised high for you your repute.
suras.translation: And raised high for you your repute.
suras.arabic: وَرَفَعْنَا لَكَ ذِكْرَكَ

suras.text: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
suras.translation: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
suras.arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا

suras.text: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
suras.translation: Indeed, with hardship [will be] ease.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ مَعَ ٱلْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا

suras.text: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
suras.translation: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.
suras.arabic: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَٱرْغَب

suras.text: And [by] this secure city [Makkah],
suras.translation: And [by] this secure city [Makkah],
suras.arabic: وَهَـٰذَا ٱلْبَلَدِ ٱلْأَمِينِ

suras.text: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
suras.translation: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
suras.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ

suras.text: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
suras.translation: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ رَدَدْنَـٰهُ أَسْفَلَ سَـٰفِلِينَ

suras.text: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
suras.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ

suras.text: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
suras.translation: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
suras.arabic: فَمَا يُكَذِّبُكَ بَعْدُ بِٱلدِّينِ

suras.text: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
suras.translation: Recite in the name of your Lord who created -
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ ٱقْرَأْ بِٱسْمِ رَبِّكَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ

suras.text: Created man from a clinging substance.
suras.translation: Created man from a clinging substance.
suras.arabic: خَلَقَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مِنْ عَلَقٍ

suras.text: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
suras.translation: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -
suras.arabic: ٱقْرَأْ وَرَبُّكَ ٱلْأَكْرَمُ

suras.text: Taught man that which he knew not.
suras.translation: Taught man that which he knew not.
suras.arabic: عَلَّمَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ مَا لَمْ يَعْلَمْ

suras.text: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses
suras.translation: No! [But] indeed, man transgresses
suras.arabic: كَلَّآ إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لَيَطْغَىٰٓ

suras.text: Because he sees himself self-sufficient.
suras.translation: Because he sees himself self-sufficient.
suras.arabic: أَن رَّءَاهُ ٱسْتَغْنَىٰٓ

suras.text: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
suras.translation: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ ٱلرُّجْعَىٰٓ

suras.text: Have you seen the one who forbids
suras.translation: Have you seen the one who forbids
suras.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يَنْهَىٰ

suras.text: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
suras.translation: Have you seen if he is upon guidance
suras.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَانَ عَلَى ٱلْهُدَىٰٓ

suras.text: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
suras.translation: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -
suras.arabic: أَرَءَيْتَ إِن كَذَّبَ وَتَوَلَّىٰٓ

suras.text: Does he not know that Allah sees?
suras.translation: Does he not know that Allah sees?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ يَعْلَم بِأَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَرَىٰ

suras.text: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
suras.translation: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock -
suras.arabic: كَلَّا لَئِن لَّمْ يَنتَهِ لَنَسْفَعًۢا بِٱلنَّاصِيَةِ

suras.text: Then let him call his associates;
suras.translation: Then let him call his associates;
suras.arabic: فَلْيَدْعُ نَادِيَهُۥ

suras.text: We will call the angels of Hell.
suras.translation: We will call the angels of Hell.
suras.arabic: سَنَدْعُ ٱلزَّبَانِيَةَ

suras.text: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
suras.translation: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allah].
suras.arabic: كَلَّا لَا تُطِعْهُ وَٱسْجُدْ وَٱقْتَرِب ۩

suras.text: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ

suras.text: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
suras.translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
suras.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ

suras.text: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
suras.translation: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
suras.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ

suras.text: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
suras.translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
suras.arabic: سَلَـٰمٌ هِىَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ ٱلْفَجْرِ

suras.text: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures
suras.translation: A Messenger from Allah, reciting purified scriptures
suras.arabic: رَسُولٌ مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ يَتْلُوا۟ صُحُفًا مُّطَهَّرَةً

suras.text: Within which are correct writings.
suras.translation: Within which are correct writings.
suras.arabic: فِيهَا كُتُبٌ قَيِّمَةٌ

suras.text: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.
suras.translation: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.
suras.arabic: وَمَا تَفَرَّقَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ إِلَّا مِنۢ بَعْدِ مَا جَآءَتْهُمُ ٱلْبَيِّنَةُ

suras.text: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.
suras.translation: And they were not commanded except to worship Allah, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakah. And that is the correct religion.
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أُمِرُوٓا۟ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ حُنَفَآءَ وَيُقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَيُؤْتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ ۚ وَذَٰلِكَ دِينُ ٱلْقَيِّمَةِ

suras.text: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.
suras.translation: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أُو۟لَـٰٓئِكَ هُمْ خَيْرُ ٱلْبَرِيَّةِ

suras.text: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.
suras.translation: Their reward with Allah will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allah being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.
suras.arabic: جَزَآؤُهُمْ عِندَ رَبِّهِمْ جَنَّـٰتُ عَدْنٍ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ خَـٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا ۖ رَّضِىَ ٱللَّهُ عَنْهُمْ وَرَضُوا۟ عَنْهُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ لِمَنْ خَشِىَ رَبَّهُۥ

suras.text: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
suras.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا زُلْزِلَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ زِلْزَالَهَا

suras.text: And the earth discharges its burdens
suras.translation: And the earth discharges its burdens
suras.arabic: وَأَخْرَجَتِ ٱلْأَرْضُ أَثْقَالَهَا

suras.text: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
suras.translation: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -
suras.arabic: وَقَالَ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا لَهَا

suras.text: That Day, it will report its news
suras.translation: That Day, it will report its news
suras.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ تُحَدِّثُ أَخْبَارَهَا

suras.text: Because your Lord has commanded it.
suras.translation: Because your Lord has commanded it.
suras.arabic: بِأَنَّ رَبَّكَ أَوْحَىٰ لَهَا

suras.text: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
suras.translation: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.
suras.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ

suras.text: So whoever does an atom\'s weight of good will see it,
suras.translation: So whoever does an atom\'s weight of good will see it,
suras.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ

suras.text: And whoever does an atom\'s weight of evil will see it.
suras.translation: And whoever does an atom\'s weight of evil will see it.
suras.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ

suras.text: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
suras.translation: And the producers of sparks [when] striking
suras.arabic: فَٱلْمُورِيَـٰتِ قَدْحًا

suras.text: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust,
suras.translation: Stirring up thereby [clouds of] dust,
suras.arabic: فَأَثَرْنَ بِهِۦ نَقْعًا

suras.text: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
suras.translation: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,
suras.arabic: فَوَسَطْنَ بِهِۦ جَمْعًا

suras.text: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
suras.translation: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ لِرَبِّهِۦ لَكَنُودٌ

suras.text: And indeed, he is to that a witness.
suras.translation: And indeed, he is to that a witness.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ عَلَىٰ ذَٰلِكَ لَشَهِيدٌ

suras.text: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
suras.translation: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.
suras.arabic: وَإِنَّهُۥ لِحُبِّ ٱلْخَيْرِ لَشَدِيدٌ

suras.text: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
suras.translation: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered
suras.arabic: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى ٱلْقُبُورِ

suras.text: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
suras.translation: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Acquainted.
suras.arabic: إِنَّ رَبَّهُم بِهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّخَبِيرٌۢ

suras.text: What is the Striking Calamity?
suras.translation: What is the Striking Calamity?
suras.arabic: مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْقَارِعَةُ

suras.text: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
suras.translation: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.
suras.arabic: وَتَكُونُ ٱلْجِبَالُ كَٱلْعِهْنِ ٱلْمَنفُوشِ

suras.text: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
suras.translation: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],
suras.arabic: فَأَمَّا مَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ

suras.text: He will be in a pleasant life.
suras.translation: He will be in a pleasant life.
suras.arabic: فَهُوَ فِى عِيشَةٍ رَّاضِيَةٍ

suras.text: But as for one whose scales are light,
suras.translation: But as for one whose scales are light,
suras.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوَٰزِينُهُۥ

suras.text: And what can make you know what that is?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what that is?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا هِيَهْ

suras.text: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you
suras.translation: Competition in [worldly] increase diverts you
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَلْهَىٰكُمُ ٱلتَّكَاثُرُ

suras.text: Until you visit the graveyards.
suras.translation: Until you visit the graveyards.
suras.arabic: حَتَّىٰ زُرْتُمُ ٱلْمَقَابِرَ

suras.text: Then no! You are going to know.
suras.translation: Then no! You are going to know.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ كَلَّا سَوْفَ تَعْلَمُونَ

suras.text: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
suras.translation: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...
suras.arabic: كَلَّا لَوْ تَعْلَمُونَ عِلْمَ ٱلْيَقِينِ

suras.text: You will surely see the Hellfire.
suras.translation: You will surely see the Hellfire.
suras.arabic: لَتَرَوُنَّ ٱلْجَحِيمَ

suras.text: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
suras.translation: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتَرَوُنَّهَا عَيْنَ ٱلْيَقِينِ

suras.text: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
suras.translation: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.
suras.arabic: ثُمَّ لَتُسْـَٔلُنَّ يَوْمَئِذٍ عَنِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ

suras.text: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
suras.translation: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.
suras.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلْحَقِّ وَتَوَاصَوْا۟ بِٱلصَّبْرِ

suras.text: Woe to every scorner and mocker
suras.translation: Woe to every scorner and mocker
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَيْلٌ لِّكُلِّ هُمَزَةٍ لُّمَزَةٍ

suras.text: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
suras.translation: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِى جَمَعَ مَالًا وَعَدَّدَهُۥ

suras.text: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
suras.translation: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
suras.arabic: يَحْسَبُ أَنَّ مَالَهُۥٓ أَخْلَدَهُۥ

suras.text: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
suras.translation: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
suras.arabic: كَلَّا ۖ لَيُنۢبَذَنَّ فِى ٱلْحُطَمَةِ

suras.text: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
suras.translation: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
suras.arabic: وَمَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا ٱلْحُطَمَةُ

suras.text: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
suras.translation: It is the fire of Allah, [eternally] fueled,
suras.arabic: نَارُ ٱللَّهِ ٱلْمُوقَدَةُ

suras.text: Which mounts directed at the hearts.
suras.translation: Which mounts directed at the hearts.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّتِى تَطَّلِعُ عَلَى ٱلْأَفْـِٔدَةِ

suras.text: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
suras.translation: Indeed, Hellfire will be closed down upon them
suras.arabic: إِنَّهَا عَلَيْهِم مُّؤْصَدَةٌ

suras.text: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
suras.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?
suras.arabic: أَلَمْ يَجْعَلْ كَيْدَهُمْ فِى تَضْلِيلٍ

suras.text: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
suras.translation: Striking them with stones of hard clay,
suras.arabic: تَرْمِيهِم بِحِجَارَةٍ مِّن سِجِّيلٍ

suras.text: And He made them like eaten straw.
suras.translation: And He made them like eaten straw.
suras.arabic: فَجَعَلَهُمْ كَعَصْفٍ مَّأْكُولٍۭ

suras.text: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
suras.translation: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ لِإِيلَـٰفِ قُرَيْشٍ

suras.text: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
suras.translation: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -
suras.arabic: إِۦلَـٰفِهِمْ رِحْلَةَ ٱلشِّتَآءِ وَٱلصَّيْفِ

suras.text: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
suras.translation: Let them worship the Lord of this House,
suras.arabic: فَلْيَعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّ هَـٰذَا ٱلْبَيْتِ

suras.text: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
suras.translation: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِىٓ أَطْعَمَهُم مِّن جُوعٍ وَءَامَنَهُم مِّنْ خَوْفٍۭ

suras.text: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
suras.translation: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ أَرَءَيْتَ ٱلَّذِى يُكَذِّبُ بِٱلدِّينِ

suras.text: For that is the one who drives away the orphan
suras.translation: For that is the one who drives away the orphan
suras.arabic: فَذَٰلِكَ ٱلَّذِى يَدُعُّ ٱلْيَتِيمَ

suras.text: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
suras.translation: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.
suras.arabic: وَلَا يَحُضُّ عَلَىٰ طَعَامِ ٱلْمِسْكِينِ

suras.text: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -
suras.translation: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ عَن صَلَاتِهِمْ سَاهُونَ

suras.text: Those who make show [of their deeds]
suras.translation: Those who make show [of their deeds]
suras.arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ يُرَآءُونَ

suras.text: And withhold [simple] assistance.
suras.translation: And withhold [simple] assistance.
suras.arabic: وَيَمْنَعُونَ ٱلْمَاعُونَ

suras.text: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.
suras.translation: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muhammad], al-Kawthar.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِنَّآ أَعْطَيْنَـٰكَ ٱلْكَوْثَرَ

suras.text: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].
suras.translation: So pray to your Lord and sacrifice [to Him alone].
suras.arabic: فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَٱنْحَرْ

suras.text: I do not worship what you worship.
suras.translation: I do not worship what you worship.
suras.arabic: لَآ أَعْبُدُ مَا تَعْبُدُونَ

suras.text: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
suras.translation: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.
suras.arabic: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ

suras.text: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
suras.translation: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.
suras.arabic: وَلَآ أَنَا۠ عَابِدٌ مَّا عَبَدتُّمْ

suras.text: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
suras.translation: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.
suras.arabic: وَلَآ أَنتُمْ عَـٰبِدُونَ مَآ أَعْبُدُ

suras.text: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
suras.translation: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."
suras.arabic: لَكُمْ دِينُكُمْ وَلِىَ دِينِ

suras.text: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
suras.translation: When the victory of Allah has come and the conquest,
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا جَآءَ نَصْرُ ٱللَّهِ وَٱلْفَتْحُ

suras.text: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
suras.translation: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allah in multitudes,
suras.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا

suras.text: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
suras.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of repentance.
suras.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا

suras.text: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
suras.translation: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ

suras.text: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
suras.translation: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
suras.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ

suras.text: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
suras.translation: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
suras.arabic: سَيَصْلَىٰ نَارًا ذَاتَ لَهَبٍ

suras.text: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
suras.translation: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
suras.arabic: فِى جِيدِهَا حَبْلٌ مِّن مَّسَدٍۭ

suras.text: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,
suras.translation: Say, "He is Allah, [who is] One,
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ هُوَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدٌ

suras.text: He neither begets nor is born,
suras.translation: He neither begets nor is born,
suras.arabic: لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ

suras.text: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
suras.translation: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."
suras.arabic: وَلَمْ يَكُن لَّهُۥ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌۢ

suras.text: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
suras.translation: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلْفَلَقِ

suras.text: From the evil of that which He created
suras.translation: From the evil of that which He created
suras.arabic: مِن شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ

suras.text: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
suras.translation: And from the evil of darkness when it settles
suras.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ

suras.text: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
suras.translation: And from the evil of the blowers in knots
suras.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ ٱلنَّفَّـٰثَـٰتِ فِى ٱلْعُقَدِ

suras.text: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
suras.translation: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."
suras.arabic: وَمِن شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَدَ

suras.text: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,
suras.translation: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,
suras.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ ٱلنَّاسِ

suras.text: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -
suras.translation: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -
suras.arabic: مِن شَرِّ ٱلْوَسْوَاسِ ٱلْخَنَّاسِ

suras.text: From among the jinn and mankind."
suras.translation: From among the jinn and mankind."
suras.arabic: مِنَ ٱلْجِنَّةِ وَٱلنَّاسِ
